Joshua18:20 Dej Yaladee ua ciam teb sab hnub tuaj. No yog xeem Npeeyamee thiab lawv tej cum li qub txeeg qub teg
Joshua18:21 Xeem Npeeyamee thiab lawv tej cum tej moos yog Yelikhau
Joshua18:22 Npe Alanpa
Joshua18:23 Avi
Joshua18:24 Khefa Lamauni
Joshua18:25 Kinpe‑oo
Joshua18:26 Mixape
Joshua18:27 Lekhee
Joshua18:28 Xela
Joshua19:1 Rho daim ntawv uas ob los mas yog xeem Xime‑oo thiab lawv tej cum li. Lawv qub txeeg qub teg kuj nyob xyaw hauv cov Yuda qub txeeg qub teg.
Joshua19:2 Cov moos no yog lawv qub txeeg qub teg
Joshua19:3 Haxasu‑as
Joshua19:4 Eethaula
Joshua19:5 Xilaj
Joshua19:6 Npe Lenpa‑au thiab Saluhee. Huvsi muaj kaum peb lub moos thiab tej zej zog ib ncig cov moos ntawd.
Joshua19:7 Thiab lub moos Ayi
Joshua19:8 thiab tej zej zog ib ncig cov moos ntawd dav mus txog lub moos Npa‑alab Npe‑aw thiab lub moos Lama uas nyob hauv Neke. Cov no yog xeem Xime‑oo thiab lawv tej cum li qub txeeg qub teg.
Joshua19:9 Xeem Xime‑oo qub txeeg qub teg yog faib hauv Yuda tebchaws los rau lawv rau qhov xeem Yuda li tebchaws ntau tshaj lawv lawm
Joshua19:10 Rho daim ntawv uas peb los mas yog xeem Xenpuloo thiab lawv tej cum li. Tej tebchaws uas poob ua cov Xenpuloo qub txeeg qub teg dav mus txog Xalib.
Joshua19:11 Lawv ciam teb kuj mus rau sab hnub poob thiab mus txog Malala thiab los chwv rhuav Danpese
Joshua19:12 Ntawm Xalib tug ciam teb lem mus rau sab hnub tuaj uas ncaj qhov uas hnub tuaj
Joshua19:13 txuas qhov ntawd hla mus rau sab hnub tuaj
Joshua19:14 Sab ped ciam teb nkhaus mus rau Hanathoo mus kawg rau ntawm lub hav Itha‑ee
Joshua19:15 thiab lub moos Khathas
Joshua19:16 No yog xeem Xenpuloo thiab lawv tej cum li qub txeeg qub teg
Joshua19:17 Rho daim ntawv uas plaub los mas yog xeem Ixakha thiab lawv tej cum li.
Joshua19:18 Lawv li tebchaws mas muaj cov moos li no nyob hauv
Joshua19:19 Hafala‑i
Joshua19:20 Lanpi
Joshua19:21 Leme
Joshua19:22 Ciam teb kuj chwv lub moos Thanpau
Joshua19:23 No yog xeem Ixakha thiab lawv tej cum li qub txeeg qub teg
Joshua19:24 Rho daim ntawv uas tsib los mas yog xeem Asaw thiab lawv tej cum li.
Joshua19:25 Lawv li tebchaws mas muaj cov moos no nyob hauv
Joshua19:26 Alamelej
Joshua19:27 thiab nkhaus mus rau sab hnub tuaj mus rau Npedakoo thiab koom Xenpuloo ciam teb thiab raws lub hav Itha‑ee mus rau sab ped txog Npe‑eme thiab Ne‑i‑ee
Joshua19:28 Enploo
Joshua19:29 Ciam teb kuj nkhaus kiag mus rau Lama mus txog lub nroog Thailab uas muaj ntsa loog khov kho
Joshua19:30 Uma
Joshua19:31 No yog xeem Asaw thiab lawv tej cum li qub txeeg qub teg
Joshua19:32 Rho daim ntawv uas rau los mas yog Nathali li
Joshua19:33 Lawv ciam teb pib ntawm Helej ntawm tsob ntoo qheb hauv Xanani mus rau Adaminekhe thiab Yane‑ee
Joshua19:34 Thiab ciam teb kuj lem mus rau sab hnub poob mus txog Anau Thanpau
Joshua19:35 Lawv tej moos uas muaj ntsa loog yog tej no
Joshua19:36 Adama
Joshua19:37 Khede
Joshua19:38 Yiloo
Joshua19:39 No yog xeem Nathali thiab lawv tej cum li qub txeeg qub teg
Joshua19:40 Rho daim ntawv uas xya los mas yog xeem Daj thiab lawv tej cum li.
Joshua19:41 Tej tebchaws uas yog lawv qub txeeg qub teg muaj tej moos no nyob hauv yog Xaula
Joshua19:42 Sa‑alanpi
Joshua19:43 Eloo
Joshua19:44 Eethekhe
Joshua19:45 Yehuj
Joshua19:46 thiab Meyakhoo thiab Lakhoo thiab thaj teb uas ncaj lub moos Yaupa.
Joshua19:47 Thaum xeem Daj lub tebchaws poob lawd
Joshua19:48 No yog xeem Daj thiab lawv tej cum li qub txeeg qub teg
Joshua19:49 Thaum uas faib lub tebchaws ua qub txeeg qub teg txhua zog tag lawd cov Yixayee kuj muab qub txeeg qub teg hauv lawv faib rau Noo tus tub Yausua.
Joshua19:50 Raws li Yawmsaub hais mas lawv muab lub moos uas nws thov rau nws
Joshua19:51 Tej uas hais no yog pov thawj Ele‑axa thiab Noo tus tub Yausua thiab cov thawj hauv txhua cum txhua xeem Yixayee muab ua ntawv rho faib ua qub txeeg qub teg ntawm Silau tab meeg Yawmsaub xubntiag ntawm qhov rooj lub tsev ntaub sib ntsib. Ua li no lawv thiaj muab lub tebchaws faib tag lawm.
Joshua20:1 Yawmsaub hais rau Yausua tias
Joshua20:2 “Cia li hais rau cov Yixayee tias
Joshua20:3 xwv tus uas tua neeg uas tsis yog txhob txwm tua thiab tsis paub thiaj tau khiav mus rau hauv. Tej moos no yuav ua lub chaw rau nej cawm siav kom thiaj dim tus uas rob caub.
Joshua20:4 Tus uas tua neeg ntawd yuav khiav mus rau cov moos ntawd ib lub thiab mus sawv ntawm txojkev uas nkag rau hauv lub rooj loog ntawd thiab piav nws zaj xwm txheej rau cov kev txwj laus hauv lub moos ntawd paub. Mas lawv yuav coj nws nkag mus rau hauv lub moos thiab tu chaw rau nws nyob mas tus ntawd yuav nrog lawv nyob.
Joshua20:5 Yog tus rob caub caum mus txog los cov kev txwj laus yuav tsis muab tus uas tua neeg ntawd rau hauv tus rob caub txhais tes
Joshua20:6 Tus ntawd yuav nyob hauv lub moos ntawd mus txog thaum nws mus sawv hais plaub tab meeg ntawm cov pejxeem xubntiag tag thiab nyob txog thaum tus uas ua tuam pov thawj hlob lub sijhawm ntawd tuag lawm. Tus uas tua neeg ntawd li rov mus tau rau nws vaj nws tsev hauv nws lub moos uas nws khiav tuaj.’ ”
Joshua20:7 Lawv thiaj tu lub moos Khede hauv Kalilais uas yog pem toj siab hauv Nathali tebchaws
Joshua20:8 Sab dej Yaladee hnub tuaj uas ncaj lub moos Yelikhau lawv tu lub moos Npexaw hauv tebchaws moj sab qhua uas nyob tej nras tiaj toj siab hauv xeem Lunpee tebchaws
Joshua20:9 Tej moos no yog tej uas tu cia rau cov Yixayee sawvdaws thiab lwm haiv neeg uas nrog lawv nyob
Joshua21:1 Thaum ntawd cov uas ua thawj hauv xeem Levi txhua cum tuaj cuag pov thawj Ele‑axa thiab Noo tus tub Yausua thiab cov uas ua thawj hauv txhua xeem txhua cum Yixayee
Joshua21:2 mas hais rau lawv ntawm Silau hauv Khana‑as tebchaws tias
Joshua21:3 Ua li no cov Yixayee thiaj li rho lawv qub txeeg qub teg tej lub moos uas yuav hais no thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig cov moos ntawd pub rau cov Levi raws li Yawmsaub hais kom lawv ua.
Joshua21:4 Rho tau ntawv los yog Khauha tej cum. Ua li no cov Levi uas yog pov thawj Aloo caj ces thiaj tau kaum peb lub moos uas rho hauv xeem Yuda thiab xeem Xime‑oo thiab xeem Npeeyamee los.
Joshua21:5 Cov Khauha uas tseem tshuav rho ntawv tau kaum lub moos hauv xeem Efa‑i tej cum thiab xeem Daj thiab ib nrab xeem Manaxe.
Joshua21:6 Cov Kwsoo rho ntawv tau kaum peb lub moos hauv xeem Ixakha tej cum thiab hauv xeem Asaw thiab xeem Nathali thiab ib nrab xeem Manaxe hauv Npasas tebchaws.
Joshua21:7 Melali tej cum tau kaum ob lub moos hauv xeem Lunpee thiab xeem Kas thiab xeem Xenpuloo.
Joshua21:8 Tej moos thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig no cov Yixayee ua ntawv rho pub rau cov Levi raws li uas Yawmsaub kom Mauxe hais rau lawv lawd.
Joshua21:9 Lawv muab tej moos uas yuav hais no hauv xeem Yuda thiab xeem Xime‑oo
Joshua21:10 pub rau Aloo caj ces uas yog ib cum hauv cov Khauha uas yog xeem Levi
Joshua21:11 Lawv muab lub moos Khiliya Anpa (Anpa yog Anaj txiv)
Joshua21:12 Tiamsis tej teb thiab tej zej zog uas nyob ib ncig lub moos mas twb muab rau Yefune tus tub Khalej yuav ua nws tug lawm.
Joshua21:13 Lawv muab lub moos Heploo thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig rau pov thawj Aloo caj ces. Heploo yog ib lub moos cawm siav rau tus uas tua neeg. Thiab lawv muab tej moos no thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig cov moos no
Joshua21:14 thiab Yathi
Joshua21:15 Hauloo
Joshua21:16 Ayi
Joshua21:17 Hauv xeem Npeeyamee yog muab tej moos no thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig
Joshua21:18 Anathau thiab Amoos
Joshua21:19 Aloo caj ces uas ua pov thawj tej moos huvsi muaj kaum peb lub moos thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig.
Joshua21:20 Cov Khauha uas tseem tshuav uas yog Khauha tej cum hauv xeem Levi
Joshua21:21 Tej moos uas lawv muab yog lub moos Sekhee thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig
Joshua21:22 Kixa‑i thiab Npe Hauloo
Joshua21:23 Hauv xeem Daj yog muab tej moos no thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig
Joshua21:24 Aiyaloo thiab Kalimoo
Joshua21:25 Hauv ib nrab xeem Manaxe yog muab lub moos Tha‑ana thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig
Joshua21:26 Khauha tej cum uas tseem tshuav ntawd tej moos mas huvsi yog kaum lub moos thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig.
Joshua21:27 Tej lub moos uas muab rau Kwsoo caj ces uas yog ib cum hauv xeem Levi
Joshua21:28 Hauv xeem Ixakha yog muab tej moos no thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig
Joshua21:29 Yamu thiab Eekani
Joshua21:30 Hauv xeem Asaw yog muab tej moos no thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig
Joshua21:31 Heekha thiab Lehau
Joshua21:32 Hauv xeem Nathali yog muab lub moos Khede hauv Kalilais
Joshua21:33 Kwsoo tej cum tej moos mas huvsi muaj kaum peb lub moos thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig.
Joshua21:34 Tej moos uas muab rau cov Levi uas tseem tshuav
Joshua21:35 Dinas thiab Nahalas
Joshua21:36 Hauv xeem Lunpee yog muab tej moos no thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig
Joshua21:37 Khedemau thiab Mefa‑a
Joshua21:38 Hauv xeem Kas yog muab lub moos Lamau hauv Kile‑a thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig
Joshua21:39 Hesanpoo thiab Yaxaw
Joshua21:40 Tej moos uas muab rau cov Levi uas tseem tshuav
Joshua21:41 Levi tej moos uas nyob hauv cov Yixayee lub tebchaws uas yog lawv teej lawv tug huvsi yog plaub caug yim lub moos thiab tej tshav zaub ib ncig.
Joshua21:42 Tej moos no puavleej muaj tshav zaub vij puag ncig txhua lub moos ib yam nkaus.
Joshua21:43 Raws li uas hais los no Yawmsaub muab lub tebchaws uas Yawmsaub tau cog lus tseg tias yuav pub rau lawv tej poj koob yawm txwv huvsi pub rau cov Yixayee. Thaum lawv txeeb tau ua lawv tug lawd lawv cia li mus nyob kiag ruaj rau hauv.
Joshua21:44 Yawmsaub pub lawv nyob ruaj nyob tus tau so rau txhua fab
Joshua21:45 Txhua yam zoo uas Yawmsaub tau cog lus tseg rau cov Yixayee tsis tshuav ib yam dabtsi uas tsis tau tiav
Joshua22:1 Thaum ntawd Yausua hu xeem Lunpee thiab xeem Kas thiab ib nrab xeem Manaxe tuaj
Joshua22:2 mas hais rau lawv tias
Joshua22:3 Ntev los txog niaj hnub nimno nej tsis tso nej cov kwvtij tseg
Joshua22:4 Nimno Yawmsaub uas yog nej tus Vajtswv twb pub nej cov kwvtij tau so lawm
Joshua22:5 Nej yuav tsum ceev faj ua raws li tej lus nkaw thiab txoj kevcai uas Yawmsaub tus tub qhe Mauxe hais rau nej lawd. Nej yuav hlub Yawmsaub uas yog nej tus Vajtswv thiab ua nej lub neej raws li nws txhua txojkev huvsi
Joshua22:6 Yausua thiaj foom koob hmoov rau lawv thiab xa lawv mus ces lawv txawm rov mus lawv vaj lawv tsev.
Joshua22:7 Ib nrab xeem Manaxe ntawd
Joshua22:8 thiab hais rau lawv tias
Joshua22:9 Cov Lunpee thiab cov Kas thiab ib nrab xeem Manaxe tau ncaim cov Yixayee ntawm Silau hauv Khana‑as tebchaws rov qab mus tsev rau hauv Kile‑a tebchaws
Joshua22:10 Thaum lawv los txog ntawm ntug dej Yaladee uas nyob Khana‑as sab tebchaws
Joshua22:11 Mas cov Yixayee hnov luag hais tias
Joshua22:12 Mas thaum cov Yixayee tau hnov li ntawd ib tsoom pejxeem Yixayee sawvdaws txawm sau zog ua ke rau ntawm Silau yuav mus ua rog rau lawv.
Joshua22:13 Mas cov Yixayee thiaj txib pov thawj Ele‑axa tus tub Fineha mus cuag cov Lunpee thiab cov Kas thiab ib nrab xeem Manaxe hauv Kile‑a tebchaws
Joshua22:14 thiab kaum tus uas ua hlob
Joshua22:15 Thaum lawv tuaj txog cov Lunpee thiab cov Kas thiab ib nrab xeem Manaxe hauv Kile‑a tebchaws lawv kuj hais rau cov ntawd tias
Joshua22:16 “Yawmsaub cov neeg sawvdaws hais li no tias
Joshua22:17 Tej kev txhaum uas peb ua ntawm Pe‑au tseem tsis txaus thiab lov? Los txog niaj hnub nimno peb tseem ntxuav tsis tau kom peb huv huv li thiab tej kev txhaum ntawd ua kom vij sub vij sw poob rau Yawmsaub cov neeg xwb.
Joshua22:18 Mas hnub no nej tseem yuav tso Yawmsaub tseg thiab lov? Hnub no yog nej sawv twv Yawmsaub mas tagkis nws yuav chim rau ib tsoom Yixayee sawvdaws.
Joshua22:19 Yog nej lub tebchaws qias tsis huv nej cia li hla mus rau hauv Yawmsaub lub tebchaws uas muaj Yawmsaub lub tsev ntaub
Joshua22:20 Xelag tus tub Akhas twb ua tsis ncaj rau tej uas muab cais pub rau Yawmsaub los tsis yog? Mas Yawmsaub txojkev chim thiaj li poob rau saum cov Yixayee sawvdaws. Tsis yog nws tib leeg puam tsuaj rau nws lub txim xwb.’ ”
Joshua22:21 Xeem Lunpee thiab xeem Kas thiab ib nrab xeem Manaxe txawm teb cov thawj hauv txhua cum Yixayee tias
Joshua22:22 “Tus uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus pom
Joshua22:23 Qhov uas peb ua lub thaj ntawd
Joshua22:24 Tsis yog li ntawd. Qhov uas peb ua li ntawd twb yog ntshai tsam lwm hnub nej tej tub ki yuav hais rau peb tej tub ki tias
Joshua22:25 Rau qhov Yawmsaub twb muab tus dej Yaladee ua ciam teb quas peb thiab nej cov Lunpee thiab cov Kas lawm nev. Nej tsis muaj feem hauv Yawmsaub.’ Yog li ntawd peb ntshai tsam nej tej tub ki yuav ua rau peb tej tub ki tseg tsis pe hawm Yawmsaub.
Joshua22:26 “Vim li no peb thiaj hais tias
Joshua22:27 Tiamsis yog peb ua los ua tsoob zeej timkhawv rau peb thiab nej
Joshua22:28 Peb xav tias yog muaj leejtwg hais li no rau peb lossis hais rau peb caj ces tom qab
Joshua22:29 Peb yeej tsis yog yuav sawv twv Yawmsaub tso Yawmsaub tseg hnub no es ua dua ib lub thaj los ua tej kevcai hlawv huvsi xyeem thiab xyeem qoob loo thiab tua tsiaj xyeem
Joshua22:30 Thaum pov thawj Fineha thiab cov ua hlob uas yog cov thawj hauv txhua cum Yixayee uas nrog nws nyob ua ke ntawd hnov tej lus uas cov Lunpee thiab cov Kas thiab cov Manaxe hais ntawd mas lawv kuj txaus siab heev.
Joshua22:31 Pov thawj Ele‑axa tus tub Fineha hais rau cov Lunpee thiab cov Kas thiab cov Manaxe tias
Joshua22:32 Pov thawj Ele‑axa tus tub Fineha thiab cov uas ua hlob kuj tawm ntawm cov Lunpee thiab cov Kas hauv Kile‑a tebchaws rov qab mus cuag cov Yixayee hauv Khana‑as tebchaws thiab qhia lawv paub.
Joshua22:33 Tej lus uas lawv mus qhia ntawd txaus cov Yixayee siab thiab cov Yixayee kuj qhuas Vajtswv. Tsis muaj leejtwg yuav hais txog ua rog rau lawv thiab ua rau lub tebchaws uas cov Lunpee thiab cov Kas nyob lawd puam tsuaj li lawm.
Joshua22:34 Cov Lunpee thiab cov Kas hu lub thaj ntawd tias “Lub thaj tsoob zeej timkhawv.” Lawv hais tias “Lub thaj ua tsoob zeej timkhawv rau peb ob tog tias Yawmsaub yog Vajtswv.”
Joshua23:1 Los rau yav tom qab ntev loo thaum Yawmsaub pub cov Yixayee tau so tsis ua rog rau tej yeeb ncuab uas nyob ib ncig lawv
Joshua23:2 Yausua hu cov Yixayee sawvdaws
Joshua23:3 Nej twb pom txhua yam uas Yawmsaub uas yog nej tus Vajtswv tau ua rau tej haiv neeg no huvsi vim yog saib rau nej
Joshua23:4 Saib maj
Joshua23:5 Nej tus Vajtswv Yawmsaub yuav muab lawv thawb kom khiav ntawm nej hauv ntej mus thiab yuav ntiab lawv khiav dhau plaws ntawm nej lub qhov muag mus. Mas nej yuav txeeb tau lawv lub tebchaws ua nej tug raws li nej tus Vajtswv Yawmsaub cog lus rau nej.
Joshua23:6 Vim li no nej cia li ua khov kho tuav rawv thiab ua raws nraim li txhua yam uas sau cia rau hauv Mauxe phau kevcai
Joshua23:7 xwv nej thiaj tsis nrog tej haiv neeg uas tshuav nyob hauv nej nruab nrab koom ua ke
Joshua23:8 Tiamsis nej yuav tsum nrog Yawmsaub uas yog nej tus Vajtswv tsheej xeeb yam li nej ua los txog niaj hnub nimno.
Joshua23:9 Rau qhov Yawmsaub ntiab tej haiv neeg uas loj thiab muaj zog dua nej khiav ntawm nej hauv ntej mus. Thiab tsis muaj leejtwg tiv tau nej los txog niaj hnub nimno.
Joshua23:10 Nej ib leeg ntiab tau ib txhiab leej khiav
Joshua23:11 Yog li no nej yuav tsum ceev faj tib zoo hlub Yawmsaub uas yog nej tus Vajtswv.
Joshua23:12 Yog nej tig rov qab es mus koom tej haiv neeg uas tseem tshuav nyob rau hauv nej no
Joshua23:13 ces nej cia li paub tseeb tias
Joshua23:14 “Nimno kuv tabtom yuav dua mus. Nej txhua tus lub siab thiab tus ntsuj plig yeej paub tias txhua yam zoo uas nej tus Vajtswv Yawmsaub cog lus rau nej tsis poob ib los li
Joshua23:15 Txhua yam zoo uas nej tus Vajtswv Yawmsaub cog lus rau nej twb ua tiav rau nej li cas lawm
Joshua23:16 Yog nej fav xeeb rau nej tus Vajtswv Yawmsaub tej lus cog tseg uas nws muab cob rau nej es mus ua koom tu luag tej dab thiab pe tej dab ntawd
Joshua24:1 Mas Yausua sau zog txhua xeem Yixayee huvsi tuaj rau ntawm Sekhee
Joshua24:2 Mas Yausua hais rau ib tsoom pejxeem sawvdaws tias
Joshua24:3 Mas kuv coj nej txiv Aplahas tawm sab ntug dej Yufeti hnub tuaj los thiab coj nws los thoob plaws Khana‑as tebchaws thiab ua rau nws muaj tub ki coob coob. Kuv pub Yiha rau nws.
Joshua24:4 Kuv pub Yakhauj thiab Exau rau Yiha. Kuv pub tej toj siab Xe‑i tebchaws rau Exau ua nws tug
Joshua24:5 Kuv txib Mauxe thiab Aloo los thiab kuv ua rau cov Iyi raug kev txom nyem vim tej uas kuv ua rau hauv lawv nruab nrab. Thiab yav tom qab kuv coj nej tawm los.
Joshua24:6 Kuv coj nej tej poj koob yawm txwv tawm hauv Iyi tebchaws los mas nej los txog dej Hiavtxwv Liab. Cov Iyi tej tsheb ua rog thiab tej tub rog caij nees caum nej tej poj koob yawm txwv los txog dej Hiavtxwv Liab.
Joshua24:7 Thaum lawv quaj thov Yawmsaub
Joshua24:8 Mas kuv coj nej los rau hauv cov Amaulai lub tebchaws uas nyob sab ntug dej Yaladee hnub tuaj. Lawv ua rog rau nej mas kuv muab lawv cob rau hauv nej txhais tes thiab nej txeeb tau lawv lub tebchaws
Joshua24:9 Thaum ntawd Xipaula tus tub Npalaj uas ua vajntxwv kav Mau‑a sawv tsees tawm tsam cov Yixayee. Npalaj txib neeg mus hu Npe‑au tus tub Npala‑as tuaj tsawm foom nej.
Joshua24:10 Tiamsis kuv tsis quav ntsej Npala‑as
Joshua24:11 Nej hla tus dej Yaladee los rau ntawm lub moos Yelikhau
Joshua24:12 Kuv tso daiv tso nkawj ua nej ntej mus ntiab cov Amaulai ob tug vajntxwv khiav ntawm nej hauv ntej mus
Joshua24:13 Kuv muab lub tebchaws uas nej tsis tau khwv rau hauv pub rau nej thiab pub tej moos uas nej tsis tau tsim rau nej mas nej tau mus nyob rau hauv. Nej tau noj tej vaj txiv hmab thiab tej vaj txiv aulib uas nej tsis tau cog.’
Joshua24:14 “Yog li no nimno nej cia li paub ntshai thiab hwm Yawmsaub thiab ua koom tu nws tuaj nruab siab tiag tiag mus li. Cia li muab tej dab uas nej tej poj koob yawm txwv txeev teev sab dej tim ub thiab hauv Iyi tebchaws tso pov tseg thiab ua koom tu Yawmsaub.
Joshua24:15 Yog nej tsis kam ua koom tu Yawmsaub
Joshua24:16 Cov pejxeem teb tias
Joshua24:17 rau qhov Yawmsaub uas yog peb tus Vajtswv yog tus uas coj peb thiab peb tej poj koob yawm txwv tawm hauv Iyi tebchaws hauv txojkev ua qhev los
Joshua24:18 Thiab Yawmsaub ntiab tej neeg sawvdaws khiav ntawm peb hauv ntej huvsi mus
Joshua24:19 Tiamsis Yausua hais rau cov pejxeem tias
Joshua24:20 Yog nej tso Yawmsaub tseg mus ua koom tu luag tej dab
Joshua24:21 Cov pejxeem hais rau Yausua tias
Joshua24:22 Mas Yausua hais rau cov pejxeem tias
Joshua24:23 Yausua hais tias
Joshua24:24 Mas cov pejxeem hais rau Yausua tias
Joshua24:25 Yog li no Yausua thiaj kom cov pejxeem cog lus tseg rau hnub ntawd thiab nws muab tej kab ke thiab tej kevcai cob rau lawv ntawm lub moos Sekhee.
Joshua24:26 Thiab Yausua sau tej lus no rau hauv Yawmsaub phau ntawv kevcai. Nws muab ib lub pob zeb loj teeb rau hauv tus qab ntoo qheb ntawm lub chaw pe hawm Yawmsaub.
Joshua24:27 Thiab Yausua hais rau cov pejxeem sawvdaws tias
Joshua24:28 Ces Yausua txawm tso cov pejxeem nyias rov mus rau nyias thaj tebchaws uas yog lawv qub txeeg qub teg.
Joshua24:29 Dhau ntawd Noo tus tub Yausua uas yog Yawmsaub tus qhev txawm tuag
Joshua24:30 Lawv muab nws log rau hauv nws thaj teb uas yog nws qub txeeg qub teg ntawm lub moos Thinaxela uas nyob pem toj siab Efa‑i tebchaws ntawm lub roob Ka‑a sab ped.
Joshua24:31 Cov Yixayee ua koom tu Yawmsaub tag Yausua sim neej thiab tag cov kev txwj laus uas nyob ntev dhau Yausua sim neej thiab paub txog txhua yam uas Yawmsaub tau ua rau cov Yixayee.
Joshua24:32 Yauxej cov pob txha uas cov Yixayee coj hauv Iyi tebchaws los ntawd lawv muab log rau hauv lub moos Sekhee
Joshua24:33 Aloo tus tub Ele‑axa kuj tuag
Judges1:1 Thaum uas Yausua tuag lawd cov Yixayee nug Yawmsaub tias
Judges1:2 Yawmsaub hais tias
Judges1:3 Mas xeem Yuda thiaj hais rau xeem Xime‑oo uas ua tij tias
Judges1:4 Xeem Yuda thiaj li mus
Judges1:5 Lawv ntsib Adauninpexe ntawm Npexe mas ua rog rau nws. Lawv tua yeej cov Khana‑as thiab cov Pelixai.
Judges1:6 Adauninpexe khiav lawm tiamsis lawv caum ntes tau nws
Judges1:7 Adauninpexe hais tias
Judges1:8 Cov Yuda mus ua rog rau lub moos Yeluxalees thiab txeeb tau thiab xuas ntaj tua lub moos thiab muab hlawv huvsi.
Judges1:9 Dhau ntawd cov Yuda kuj nqes mus ua rog rau cov Khana‑as uas nyob pem toj siab hauv Neke thiab tej pov roob Sefela.
Judges1:10 Cov Yuda kuj mus ntaus cov Khana‑as uas nyob hauv lub moos Heploo (lub moos Heploo ntawd yav nram ntej hu ua Khiliya Anpa). Lawv tua tau Sesai thiab Ahimas thiab Thamai.
Judges1:11 Lawv tawm qhov ntawd mus ua rog rau cov uas nyob hauv lub moos Denpi. Denpi yav nram ntej hu ua Khiliya Xefaw.
Judges1:12 Khalej hais tias
Judges1:13 Mas Auni‑ee uas yog Khalej tus kwv Khena tus tub txeeb tau lub moos ntawd mas Khalej muab nws tus ntxhais Axav rau nws ua pojniam.
Judges1:14 Thaum sib yuav lawd Axav txawm taij nws tus txiv thov leej txiv pub ib daim teb. Thaum Axav nqes saum nws tus nees luav los mas Khalej nug tias
Judges1:15 Axav teb tias
Judges1:16 Mauxe yawm txiv caj ces uas yog neeg Khenai nrog cov Yuda ua ke tawm ntawm lub moos toov laj nce mus rau tebchaws moj sab qhua Yuda uas nyob hauv Neke ze lub moos Alaj
Judges1:17 Xeem Yuda kuj nrog xeem Xime‑oo uas yog nws tij mus tua yeej cov Khana‑as uas nyob hauv lub moos Xefa thiab muab lub moos ntawd ua puam tsuaj huvsi
Judges1:18 Xeem Yuda txeeb tau lub moos Kaxa thiab lub moos Akheloo thiab lub moos Ekhoo thiab cov moos ntawd li kav xyuam huvsi.
Judges1:19 Yawmsaub nrog nraim xeem Yuda
Judges1:20 Lub moos Heploo lawv muab rau Khalej raws li Mauxe hais cia lawd. Khalej thiaj ntiab Anaj peb tug tub khiav mus.
Judges1:21 Tiamsis xeem Npeeyamee tsis ntiab cov Yenpu uas nyob hauv Yeluxalees khiav mus. Ua li no mas cov Yenpu thiaj li nrog cov Npeeyamee nyob ua ke hauv Yeluxalees los txog niaj hnub nimno.
Judges1:22 Yauxej caj ces mus ua rog rau lub moos Npe‑ee mas Yawmsaub nrog nraim lawv.
Judges1:23 Yauxej caj ces tso neeg mus tshuaj Npe‑ee (yav nram ntej lub moos no hu ua Lu).
Judges1:24 Mas cov neeg tshuaj xov pom ib tug txivneej tawm hauv lub moos tuaj
Judges1:25 Nws kuj qhia kev nkag hauv lub moos rau lawv
Judges1:26 Tus txivneej ntawd thiaj mus nyob rau hauv cov Hithai lub tebchaws thiab ua ib lub moos
Judges1:27 Xeem Manaxe tsis ntiab cov neeg hauv tej moos no thiab tej zej zog ib ncig ntawd khiav
Judges1:28 Mas thaum cov Yixayee muaj zog tuaj lawv kuj yuam cov Khana‑as ua haujlwm rau lawv
Judges1:29 Thiab xeem Efa‑i kuj tsis ntiab cov Khana‑as uas nyob hauv lub moos Kexaw tawm khiav. Cov Khana‑as tseem nrog lawv nyob ua ke hauv lub moos Kexaw.
Judges1:30 Xeem Xenpuloo tsis ntiab cov neeg hauv lub moos Khibloo thiab hauv Nahaloo khiav. Cov Khana‑as tseem nrog lawv nyob ua ke thiab raug quab yuam ua haujlwm.
Judges1:31 Xeem Asaw tsis ntiab cov neeg hauv lub moos Akhau thiab Xaidoo thiab Alab thiab Axij thiab Henpa thiab Afi thiab Lehau khiav.
Judges1:32 Cov Asaw nrog cov qub neeg Khana‑as nyob ua ke hauv lub tebchaws ntawd rau qhov lawv tsis muab ntiab khiav mus.
Judges1:33 Xeem Nathali tsis ntiab cov neeg hauv Npeseme thiab hauv Npe‑anav khiav. Lawv cia li nrog cov qub neeg Khana‑as nyob ua ke hauv lub tebchaws ntawd. Tiamsis cov neeg hauv ob lub moos ntawd kuj raug quab yuam ua haujlwm rau lawv.
Judges1:34 Cov Amaulai tiv thaiv xeem Daj rau pem toj siab tsis kheev lawv nqes los nram nruab tiag.
Judges1:35 Cov Amaulai kwv tawv nyob hauv lub moos Hahele thiab hauv Aiyaloo thiab hauv Sa‑anpi
Judges1:36 Cov Amaulai ciam teb yog txij ntua txojkev uas hla lub dawm roob Akhanpi thiab txij ntua lub moos Xelaj los rau sab ped mus li.
Judges2:1 Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj tawm ntawm lub moos Kilakas mus txog lub moos Npaukhi
Judges2:2 thiab nej yuav tsum tsis txhob nrog cov neeg hauv lub tebchaws no sib cog lus kiag li. Nej yuav tsum muab lawv tej thaj teev dab rhuav pov tseg huvsi.’ Tiamsis nej tsis mloog tej lus uas kuv hais. Nej ua dabtsi li no?
Judges2:3 Yog li no nimno kuv thiaj hais rau nej tias
Judges2:4 Thaum Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj hais tej lus no rau cov Yixayee tag lawd
Judges2:5 Lawv thiaj hu lub chaw ntawd tias Npaukhi thiab lawv tua tsiaj xyeem rau Yawmsaub qhov ntawd.
Judges2:6 Thaum Yausua tso cov pejxeem mus lawd
Judges2:7 Cov Yixayee ua koom tu Yawmsaub tag Yausua sim neej thiab tag cov kev txwj laus uas nyob ntev dhau Yausua sim neej thiab pom txhua yam haujlwm loj uas Yawmsaub tau ua rau cov Yixayee.
Judges2:8 Noo tus tub Yausua uas yog Yawmsaub tus qhev txawm tuag rau thaum hnub nyoog muaj ib puas kaum xyoo.
Judges2:9 Lawv muab nws log rau hauv nws thaj teb uas yog nws qub txeeg qub teg ntawm lub moos Thinahele uas nyob pem toj siab Efa‑i tebchaws ntawm lub roob Ka‑a sab ped.
Judges2:10 Cov neeg uas nyob tiam ntawd kuj dua tag mus nrog lawv tej poj koob yawm txwv nyob huvsi lawm
Judges2:11 Cov Yixayee kuj ua tej uas Yawmsaub pom tias phem thiab mus teev tej dab Npa‑as
Judges2:12 Lawv tso Yawmsaub tseg
Judges2:13 Lawv tso Yawmsaub tseg mus ua koom tu tej dab Npa‑as thiab tej dab Athalau.
Judges2:14 Vim li no Yawmsaub thiaj npau taws rau cov Yixayee
Judges2:15 Lawv mus ntaus rog thaum twg los Yawmsaub txhais tes kuj tawm tsam lawv ua rau lawv swb kiag raws li Yawmsaub tau ntuas lawv thiab cog lus ruaj rau lawv lawm. Mas lawv raug kev ceeblaj txom nyem heev.
Judges2:16 Ces Yawmsaub txawm tsa kom muaj cov thawj uas cawm lawv dim ntawm cov uas lws lawv txhais tes.
Judges2:17 Los lawv kuj tsis mloog cov thawj ntawd tej lus. Lawv tseem mus deev luag tej dab thiab pe tej dab ntawd. Lawv tig hlo ntawm txojkev uas lawv tej poj koob yawm txwv taug sai kawg li lawm. Lawv tej poj koob yawm txwv ua raws li Yawmsaub txoj kevcai tiamsis lawv tsis ua raws li ntawd.
Judges2:18 Yawmsaub tsa kom muaj tus thawj thaum twg Yawmsaub kuj nrog nraim tus thawj ntawd
Judges2:19 Tiamsis thaum tus thawj ntawd tag txojsia
Judges2:20 Vim li no Yawmsaub txojkev npau taws thiaj tshwm plaws rau cov Yixayee thiab nws hais tias
Judges2:21 mas txij no mus kuv yuav tsis muab tej haiv neeg uas thaum Yausua tuag tseem tshuav nyob ntiab tawm ntawm nej hauv ntej mus
Judges2:22 xwv kuv thiaj tau siv tej haiv neeg ntawd sim cov Yixayee saib lawv yuav ceev faj taug Yawmsaub txojkev ib yam li lawv tej poj koob yawm txwv los tsis taug.”
Judges2:23 Vim li no Yawmsaub thiaj tso tej neeg ntawd nyob
Judges3:1 No yog cov neeg uas Yawmsaub tseg cia tshuav nyob xwv thiaj tau sim txhua tus Yixayee uas tsis tau txeev paub ua rog hauv Khana‑as.
Judges3:2 Yawmsaub ua li no tsuas yog xav qhia kev ua rog rau cov Yixayee txhua tiam uas tsis tau txeev paub ua rog dua.
Judges3:3 Yog tshuav cov Filixatee tsib tug vajntxwv
Judges3:4 Cov neeg no tshuav nyob los sim cov Yixayee xwv thiaj paub tias cov Yixayee yuav mloog Yawmsaub tej lus nkaw uas Yawmsaub twb kom Mauxe hais rau lawv tej poj koob yawm txwv los tsis mloog.
Judges3:5 Yog li no cov Yixayee thiaj nyob txuam rau hauv cov Khana‑as
Judges3:6 Lawv mus yuav cov neeg ntawd tej ntxhais ua pojniam thiab muab lawv tej ntxhais qua rau cov neeg ntawd tej tub
Judges3:7 Cov Yixayee ua tej uas Yawmsaub pom tias phem kawg li. Lawv tsis nco Yawmsaub uas yog lawv tus Vajtswv lawm
Judges3:8 Vim li ntawd Yawmsaub txojkev npau taws thiaj tshwm plaws rau cov Yixayee
Judges3:9 Mas thaum cov Yixayee quaj thov Yawmsaub mas Yawmsaub thiaj tsa kom muaj ib tug pab cov Yixayee
Judges3:10 Yawmsaub tus Ntsuj Plig thiaj los kav nws lub siab thiab nws ua thawj kav cov Yixayee thiab nws tawm mus ua rog. Mas Yawmsaub muab Alas Nahala‑i tus vajntxwv Kusa Lisatha‑i rau hauv nws txhais tes
Judges3:11 Ua li no lub tebchaws thiaj li so tsis ua rog tau plaub caug xyoo. Mas Khena tus tub Auni‑ee txawm tuag lawm.
Judges3:12 Cov Yixayee rov ua tej uas Yawmsaub pom tias phem kawg li
Judges3:13 Eloos thiaj hu cov Asmoo thiab cov Amalej tuaj ua ke mus ntaus yeej cov Yixayee thiab txeeb tau lub moos toov laj.
Judges3:14 Cov Yixayee thiaj li zwm rau Mau‑a tus vajntxwv Eloos tau kaum yim xyoo.
Judges3:15 Thaum cov Yixayee quaj thov Yawmsaub mas Yawmsaub kuj tsa muaj ib tug los pab lawv
Judges3:16 Ehuj ntaus ib rab ntaj ob sab ntse ntev ib tshim coj nrog cev muab ntxig raws sab ncej qab xis rau hauv lub ris.
Judges3:17 Nws txawm coj se mus cev rau Mau‑a tus vajntxwv Eloos. Eloos yog ib tug rog rog heev.
Judges3:18 Thaum Ehuj muab cov se cob tag lawm ces nws txawm kom cov uas kwv cov se ntawd rov qab.
Judges3:19 Mas nws tig rov qab ntawm cov dab mlom pob zeb uas lawv txaug uas nyob ze Kilakas rov los hais tias
Judges3:20 Mas Ehuj nkag mus cuag vajntxwv rau thaum uas vajntxwv tib leeg zaum txheej saud hauv nws chav uas laj ntxiag. Mas Ehuj hais tias
Judges3:21 Ehuj thiaj xuas txhais tes laug rho kiag ntaj hauv sab ceg xis nkaug kiag Eloos plab.
Judges3:22 Rab ntaj ploj ntais tag nrho tus ko
Judges3:23 Ces Ehuj txawm tawm rau nraum qab khav
Judges3:24 Thaum Ehuj mus lawd vajntxwv cov tub teg tub taws los saib mas pom tias chav tsev txheej saum lub qhov rooj muab ntsas phoo xauv lawm
Judges3:25 Lawv tos ntev xeeb txob lawm. Thaum nws tseem tsis qheb qhov rooj txheej saud li
Judges3:26 Thaum uas lawv tseem tos tos ntawd Ehuj twb khiav dhau ntawm cov dab mlom pob zeb twb mus txog Xe‑ila lawm.
Judges3:27 Thaum nws los txog nws thiaj tshuab raj kub yaj hauv tebchaws toj siab Efa‑i
Judges3:28 Nws hais rau lawv tias
Judges3:29 Zaum ntawd lawv tua cov Mau‑a tuag kwvlam ib vam leej yog cov uas khov sim kho thiab muaj zog huvsi
Judges3:30 Cov Mau‑a thiaj swb thiab zwm rau cov Yixayee hnub ntawd. Mas lub tebchaws thiaj so tsis ua rog tau yim caum xyoo.
Judges3:31 Dhau Ehuj lawm mas muaj Anav tus tub Saka. Nws xuas tus hmuv raws nyuj tua cov Filixatee tuag rau pua leej. Nws kuj pab cov Yixayee dim thiab.
Judges4:1 Thaum Ehuj tuag lawd
Judges4:2 Yawmsaub thiaj muab lawv cob rau hauv cov Khana‑as tus vajntxwv Yanpi uas nyob lub moos Haxau txhais tes. Nws tus thawj rog hu ua Xixela uas nyob hauv lub moos Halause Hakau‑i.
Judges4:3 Cov Yixayee txawm quaj thov Yawmsaub pab
Judges4:4 Mas ib tug pojniam cev Vajtswv lus hu ua Denpaula
Judges4:5 Nws pheej nyob hauv tsob qab toov laj Denpaula uas nyob ntawm Lama thiab Npe‑ee ntu nruab nrab pem toj siab Efa‑i tebchaws
Judges4:6 Denpaula txib neeg mus hu Npala uas yog Anpinau‑a tus tub tuaj ntawm Khede hauv Nathali tebchaws tuaj mas hais rau nws tias
Judges4:7 Mas kuv yuav ntxias Xixela uas yog vajntxwv Yanpi tus thawj rog kom coj nws cov tub rog thiab nws cov tsheb ua rog tuaj ntsib koj ntawm tus dej Khisoo
Judges4:8 Npala thiaj teb Denpaula tias
Judges4:9 Denpaula teb tias
Judges4:10 Npala thiaj hu xeem Xenpuloo thiab xeem Nathali tuaj rau ntawm Khede
Judges4:11 Henpaw uas yog neeg Khenai tau ncaim ntawm cov Khenai sawvdaws uas yog Mauxe yawm txiv Haunpas caj ces los tsa tsev ntaub nyob rau ntawm tus ntoo qheb hauv Xanani uas nyob ze lub moos Khede.
Judges4:12 Thaum muaj neeg mus hais rau Xixela tias Anpinau‑a tus tub Npala nce mus rau saum lub roob Thanpau lawm
Judges4:13 Xixela txawm txhij nws cuaj pua lub tsheb hlau ua rog huvsi thiab tag nrho nws cov tub rog tuaj rau ntawm lub moos Halause Hakau‑i mus txog tus dej Khisoo.
Judges4:14 Denpaula hais rau Npala tias
Judges4:15 Yawmsaub ua rau Xixela thiab nws tej tsheb ua rog huvsi thiab nws pab tub rog huvsi tawg khiav swb kiag Npala tej hniav ntaj
Judges4:16 Ces Npala txawm caum tej tsheb ua rog thiab cov tub rog mus txog Halause Hakau‑i. Mas Xixela pab tub rog raug hniav ntaj tuag tag tsis tshuav ib tug li.
Judges4:17 Tiamsis Xixela dhia khiav mus txog Ya‑ee uas yog Henpaw tus pojniam uas yog neeg Khenai lub tsev ntaub
Judges4:18 Ya‑ee txawm tawm tuaj tos Xixela thiab hais tias
Judges4:19 Xixela hais rau nws tias
Judges4:20 Xixela hais rau nws tias
Judges4:21 Tiamsis Ya‑ee uas yog Henpaw tus pojniam muab ib tug tswg hlau uas rub tsev ntaub thiab tuav ib rab rauj nyas los muab tus tswg hlau twb nkaus Xixela xub ntsos npuj tshab plaws rau hauv av rau thaum nws tabtom tsaug zog heev rau qhov yog txog siav. Ces Xixela txawm tuag lawm.
Judges4:22 Thaum Npala caum Xixela tuaj txog
Judges4:23 Hnub ntawd Yawmsaub thiaj ua rau cov Yixayee kov yeej Khana‑as tus vajntxwv Yanpi.
Judges4:24 Cov Yixayee txhais tes ua hnyav zuj zus rau Khana‑as tus vajntxwv Yanpi mus txog thaum lawv ua kom vajntxwv Yanpi puam tsuaj tag.
Judges5:1 Denpaula thiab Anpinau‑a tus tub Npala hu zaj nkauj rau hnub ntawd tias
Judges5:2 “Cia li qhuas Yawmsaub
Judges5:3 Au tej vajntxwv
Judges5:4 “Au Yawmsaub
Judges5:5 Tej roob kuj ua zog koog rau ntawm Yawmsaub xubntiag
Judges5:6 “Ntu uas Anav tus tub Saka nyob thiab ntu uas Ya‑ee nyob
Judges5:7 Tej tub qoob tub loos hauv Yixayee tebchaws kuj tseg tsis ua teb lawm
Judges5:8 Thaum xaiv tej dab tshiab los teev kev ua rog kuj tuaj txog ntawm rooj loog. Yeej tsis pom ib daim hlau thaiv ua rog thiab ib rab hmuv rau hauv plaub vam tus tub rog hauv Yixayee li.
Judges5:9 Kuv lub siab dai qas dhuam Yixayee cov thawj
Judges5:10 “Nej cov uas caij tej nees luav dawb
Judges5:11 Cia li mloog zaj kwv txhiaj uas hais ntawm qhov dej. Lawv hais txog qhov uas Yawmsaub kov yeej
Judges5:12 ‘Denpaula
Judges5:13 Thaum ntawd cov uas muaj meej uas tseem tshuav nyob nqes los
Judges5:14 Cov uas cog cag rau hauv Amalej tau nqes pem Efa‑i los. Npeeyamee
Judges5:15 Ixakha cov uas ua thawj kuj nrog Denpaula los
Judges5:16 Ua li cas nej nyob ntawm nkuaj yaj tos
Judges5:17 Kile‑a kuj nyob sab dej Yaladee hnub tuaj. Daj nyob dabtsi ntawm lub nkoj txwg? Asaw nyob twjywm ntawm ntug hiavtxwv
Judges5:18 Xenpuloo yog cov uas zoo siab tso nyog txojsia mus pab. Nathali kuj ib yam nkaus rau hauv tej tshav rog pem toj siab.
Judges5:19 “Cov vajntxwv tuaj
Judges5:20 Tej hnub qub saum ntuj kuj ua rog
Judges5:21 Tus niag dej Khisoo kuav lawv mus
Judges5:22 Lub suab nees dhia rau nrov qas qees
Judges5:23 Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj hais tias
Judges5:24 “Cia Ya‑ee tau hmoov zoo tshaj plaws tej pojniam huvsi
Judges5:25 Xixela thov dej haus
Judges5:26 Nws txawm cev tes muab tus tswg tsev ntaub thiab nws txhais tes xis tuav tus pam thawj uas cov ua haujlwm siv. Nws ntaus Xixela ib teg
Judges5:27 Xixela ntog
Judges5:28 “Leej niam saib qhov rais ntsoov
Judges5:29 Tej pojniam uas ntse teb nws
Judges5:30 ‘Yog lawv tseem tshawb nrhiav thiab faib tej qhov txhia chaw uas txeeb tau los kab
Judges5:31 “Au Yawmsaub
Judges6:1 Cov Yixayee ua tej uas Yawmsaub pom tias phem
Judges6:2 Cov Midee txhais tes tsuj yuam cov Yixayee. Vim tim cov Midee mas cov Yixayee thiaj npaj chaw nraim cev rau pem tej roob thiab hauv tej qhov tsua thiab tej chaw uas ruaj khov.
Judges6:3 Cov Yixayee cog qoob thaum twg mas cov Midee thiab cov Amalej thiab cov neeg uas nyob sab hnub tuaj txawm tuaj ua rog rau lawv
Judges6:4 thiab tuaj tsuam chaw nyob rau hauv lub tebchaws thiab muab lawv tej qoob loo ua puam tsuaj tag thoob plaws mus txog lub moos Kaxa tsis tseg ib yam dabtsi cia tau noj li tsis hais yaj nyuj nees luav huvsi.
Judges6:5 Luag coj kiag tsiaj txhu thiab lub tsev ntaub tuaj coob yam nkaus li tej pab kooj txig. Neeg thiab tej ntxhuav kuj coob suav tsis txheeb. Thaum luag tuaj luag ua rau lub tebchaws piam tag.
Judges6:6 Cov Yixayee thiaj poob qes kawg li vim yog tim cov Midee. Cov Yixayee thiaj quaj thov Yawmsaub pab.
Judges6:7 Thaum cov Yixayee quaj thov Yawmsaub vim yog tim cov Midee
Judges6:8 Yawmsaub kuj txib ib tug xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus tuaj rau hauv cov Yixayee. Tus ntawd hais rau lawv tias
Judges6:9 Kuv cawm nej dim hauv cov Iyi txhais tes thiab dim hauv txhua tus uas tsim txom nej txhais tes thiab ntiab lawv khiav ntawm nej hauv ntej mus thiab muab lawv lub tebchaws rau nej.
Judges6:10 Thiab kuv twb hais rau nej tias
Judges6:11 Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj tuaj zaum hauv Yau‑as tus qab ntoo qheb ntawm Aufa
Judges6:12 Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj los tshwm rau Kide‑oo thiab hais rau nws tias
Judges6:13 Kide‑oo txawm hais rau nws tias
Judges6:14 Yawmsaub tig los hais rau nws tias
Judges6:15 Kide‑oo txawm hais tias
Judges6:16 Yawmsaub hais rau nws tias
Judges6:17 Kide‑oo hais rau Yawmsaub tias
Judges6:18 Thov koj tsis txhob tawm ntawm no mus
Judges6:19 Kide‑oo txawm nkag rau hauv tsev npaj ib tug menyuam tshis thiab ib efa hmoov mog ua ncuav tsis xyaw keeb. Nws muab cov nqaij tso rau hauv lub choo thiab muab cov kua nqaij tso rau hauv lub laujkaub coj tuaj xyeem rau nws hauv tsob qab ntoo qheb.
Judges6:20 Vajtswv tus tubtxib saum ntuj hais rau Kide‑oo tias
Judges6:21 Ces Yawmsaub tus tubtxib txawm muab tus hau pas nrig hauv nws txhais tes cev mus twb rau cov nqaij thiab cov ncuav tsis xyaw keeb. Ces hluavtaws txawm cig plaws ntawm lub pob zeb kub tej nqaij thiab tej ncuav tsis xyaw keeb tag huvsi. Ces Yawmsaub tus tubtxib txawm ploj ntais ntawm nws qhov muag mus lawm.
Judges6:22 Kide‑oo thiaj paub tias yog Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj tiag tiag li thiab Kide‑oo hais tias
Judges6:23 Tiamsis Yawmsaub hais rau Kide‑oo tias
Judges6:24 Ces Kide‑oo txawm ua ib lub thaj rau Yawmsaub rau qhov ntawd thiab hu lub thaj ntawd tias Yawmsaub yog txojkev kaj siab lug. Niaj hnub nimno lub thaj ntawd tseem nyob ntawm Aufa uas yog Anpiyexaw cum li moos.
Judges6:25 Mas hmo ntawd Yawmsaub hais rau Kide‑oo tias
Judges6:26 Thiab ua ib lub thaj xyeem rau Yawmsaub uas yog koj tus Vajtswv rau saum lub chaw ruaj khov no
Judges6:27 Kide‑oo txawm coj nws cov tub qhe kaum leej nrog nws mus ua raws li Yawmsaub hais rau nws
Judges6:28 Hnub tom qab thaum cov neeg hauv lub moos sawv ntxov mas pom lub thaj teev dab Npa‑as pob tag thiab pom tias tus ncej dab Asela uas nyob ib sab raug muab ntov lawm thiab pom tias muab tus txiv nyuj uas ob xyeem rau saum lub thaj uas ua tshiab ntawd.
Judges6:29 Lawv txawm sib hais hais tias
Judges6:30 Ces cov neeg hauv lub moos txawm hais rau Yau‑as tias
Judges6:31 Tiamsis Yau‑as hais rau txhua tus uas tuaj tawm tsam nws hais tias
Judges6:32 Vim li no hnub ntawd lawv thiaj tis npe rau Kide‑oo hais tias Yelunpa‑as
Judges6:33 Mas cov Midee sawvdaws thiab cov Amalej sawvdaws thiab cov uas nyob sab hnub tuaj sau zog ua ke hla tus dej Yaladee tuaj tsuam chaw nyob ntawm lub hav Yile‑ee.
Judges6:34 Tiamsis Yawmsaub tus Ntsuj Plig los kav kiag Kide‑oo
Judges6:35 Nws tso neeg mus hu thoob plaws Manaxe tebchaws kom tuaj nrog nws mus. Thiab nws tso neeg mus hu xeem Asaw xeem Xenpuloo thiab xeem Nathali
Judges6:36 Kide‑oo hais rau Vajtswv tias
Judges6:37 kuv muab cov plaub yaj tso rau ntawm tshav ntaus mog
Judges6:38 Kuj muaj li ntawd. Hnub tom qab thaum Kide‑oo sawv ntxov tsees thiab nws muab cov plaub yaj tso tau ib phaj dej lwg puv nkaus.
Judges6:39 Mas Kide‑oo hais rau Vajtswv tias
Judges6:40 Hmo ntawd Yawmsaub kuj ua raws li ntawd. Cov plaub yaj mas qhuav qhawv
Judges7:1 Yelunpa‑as uas yog Kide‑oo thiab cov neeg sawvdaws uas nrog nws sawv ntxov mus ua yeej rau ntawm qhov dej txhawv Halau. Cov Midee lub yeej kuj nyob ntawm lawv sab ped hauv lub hav uas ze lub roob Maule.
Judges7:2 Yawmsaub hais rau Kide‑oo tias
Judges7:3 Yog li ntawd cia li tshaj tawm rau sawvdaws tias
Judges7:4 Yawmsaub hais rau Kide‑oo tias
Judges7:5 Nws thiaj coj cov neeg nqes mus nram hav dej. Yawmsaub hais rau Kide‑oo tias
Judges7:6 Cov uas xuas tes ntaus dej los yaim muaj peb puas leej
Judges7:7 Yawmsaub hais rau Kide‑oo tias
Judges7:8 Cov uas nyob txawm khaws cov uas mus tsev tej mov noj thiab raj kub yaj cia. Dua li cov mas Kide‑oo hais kom sawvdaws nyias rov mus rau nyias vaj nyias tsev
Judges7:9 Hmo ntawd Yawmsaub hais rau Kide‑oo tias
Judges7:10 Tiamsis yog koj ntshai mus ntaus mas koj cia li coj koj tus qhev Pula nrog koj mus kom txog lawv lub yeej.
Judges7:11 Koj yuav hnov lawv hais dabtsi mas dhau ntawd koj txhais tes yuav muaj zog mus ntaus lawv lub yeej.” Kide‑oo thiaj coj nws tus qhev Pula nrog nws mus txog ntawm cov tub rog uas zov khuav sab nraum lub yeej.
Judges7:12 Mas cov Midee thiab cov Amalej thiab cov neeg uas nyob sab hnub tuaj sawvdaws pw thoob plaws lub hav coob yam nkaus li tej niag pab kooj txig. Lawv tej ntxhuav kuj suav tsis txheeb
Judges7:13 Thaum Kide‑oo ob tug tuaj txog muaj ib tug yawg txawm piav nws zaj npau suav rau ib tug mloog hais tias
Judges7:14 Nws tus kwvluag txawm teb tias
Judges7:15 Thaum Kide‑oo hnov ob tug piav zaj npau suav thiab lub ntsiab npau suav ntawd lawm
Judges7:16 Kide‑oo thiaj muab peb puas leej ntawd faib ua peb pab
Judges7:17 Thiab nws hais rau lawv tias
Judges7:18 Thaum kuv thiab pab uas nrog kuv ua ke tshuab raj kub yaj
Judges7:19 Kide‑oo thiab ib puas leej tub rog uas nrog nws thiaj tuaj txog sab nraum lawv lub yeej rau thaum ib tag hmo
Judges7:20 Peb pab tub rog txawm tshuab raj kub yaj thiab tsoo tej hub av tawg
Judges7:21 Lawv nyias sawv nyias qhov chaw vij thoob plaws lub yeej ntawd
Judges7:22 Thaum peb puas leej ntawd tshuab raj kub yaj Yawmsaub ua rau Midee cov tub rog sawvdaws rov sib tua ib leeg tua ib leeg
Judges7:23 Cov Yixayee raug hu tawm hauv Nathali thiab Asaw thiab thoob plaws Manaxe tebchaws tuaj
Judges7:24 Kide‑oo txib neeg mus thoob plaws pem toj siab Efa‑i tebchaws hais tias
Judges7:25 Lawv ntes tau cov Midee ob tug thawj
Judges8:1 Cov Efa‑i txawm hais rau Kide‑oo tias
Judges8:2 Mas nws hais rau lawv tias
Judges8:3 Vajtswv muab cov Midee ob tug thawj yog Aulej thiab Xe‑ev rau hauv nej txhais tes
Judges8:4 Kide‑oo thiab peb puas leej uas nrog nws kuj tuaj txog ntawm tus dej Yaladee thiab hla mus rau sab tid. Txawm yog lawv tsaug leeg heev los lawv tseem caum qab mus.
Judges8:5 Kide‑oo txawm hais rau cov neeg Xukhau tias
Judges8:6 Cov nom tswv hauv lub moos Xukhau teb tias
Judges8:7 Kide‑oo thiaj hais tias
Judges8:8 Nws tawm qhov ntawd mus txog lub moos Penu‑ee thiab hais rau cov neeg qhov ntawd ib yam nkaus. Mas cov neeg Penu‑ee teb nws ib yam li cov neeg hauv lub moos Xukhau teb.
Judges8:9 Kide‑oo thiaj hais rau cov neeg Penu‑ee tias
Judges8:10 Thaum ntawd Xenpa thiab Xamuna nrog ib vam tsib txhiab leej tub rog nyob hauv lub moos Khakhau
Judges8:11 Kide‑oo taug txojkev uas cov tub lag tub luam taug yog ntawm lub moos Naunpa thiab lub moos Yaunpeha sab hnub tuaj
Judges8:12 Xenpa thiab Xamuna thiaj khiav
Judges8:13 Thaum Yau‑as tus tub Kide‑oo mus ua rog rov qab los txog ntawm txojkev uas nce mus rau lub moos Hele
Judges8:14 nws ntes tau ib tug tub hluas uas nyob hauv lub moos Xukhau thiab nug tus hluas ntawd. Tus hluas ntawd kuj sau cov nom tswv thiab cov kev txwj laus hauv Xukhau tej npe
Judges8:15 Kide‑oo thiaj tuaj rau ntawm cov neeg hauv lub moos Xukhau thiab hais tias
Judges8:16 Kide‑oo kuj ntes cov kev txwj laus hauv lub moos thiab xuas pos kaus ntsaj pos kaus ntsim qhuab qhia cov neeg Xukhau.
Judges8:17 Thiab nws muab lub chaw tsom faj ntawm lub moos Penu‑ee rhuav pov tseg thiab muab cov txivneej hauv lub moos ntawd tua pov tseg.
Judges8:18 Kide‑oo hais rau Xenpa thiab Xamuna tias
Judges8:19 Nws hais tias
Judges8:20 Ces nws hais rau nws tus tub hlob Yethaw tias
Judges8:21 Ces Xenpa thiab Xamuna txawm hais tias
Judges8:22 Dhau ntawd cov Yixayee hais rau Kide‑oo tias
Judges8:23 Kide‑oo teb lawv tias
Judges8:24 Thiab Kide‑oo hais rau lawv tias
Judges8:25 Lawv kuj teb nws tias
Judges8:26 Cov kauj co kub uas nws thov tau ntawd hnyav ib txhiab xya pua sekhee
Judges8:27 Kide‑oo muab tej kub no ua ib lub efau khaws cia rau hauv nws lub moos Aufa. Ces cov Yixayee sawvdaws txawm mus pe hawm lub efau ntawd mas lub efau ntawd thiaj ua rooj hlua cuab Kide‑oo thiab nws caj ces.
Judges8:28 Cov Midee swb kiag cov Yixayee
Judges8:29 Yelunpa‑as uas yog Yau‑as tus tub kuj mus nyob hauv nws lub tsev.
Judges8:30 Kide‑oo muaj xya caum tus tub uas yog nws roj nws ntshav xeeb
Judges8:31 Kide‑oo tus niam yau uas nyob hauv lub moos Sekhee kuj yug tau ib tug tub rau nws
Judges8:32 Yau‑as tus tub Kide‑oo hnub nyoog laus heev lawm li tuag. Lawv muab nws log rau hauv nws txiv Yau‑as lub qhov ntxa hauv lub moos Aufa uas yog Anpiyexaw cum li moos.
Judges8:33 Thaum Kide‑oo tuag lawd cov Yixayee txawm tig hlo mus deev tej dab Npa‑as thiab lawv teev Npa‑as Npeli ua lawv tus vajtswv.
Judges8:34 Cov Yixayee tsis nco txog Yawmsaub uas yog lawv tus Vajtswv uas cawm lawv dim hauv lawv cov yeeb ncuab txhais tes rau txhua fab.
Judges8:35 Lawv tsis hlub Yelunpa‑as tsev neeg uas yog Kide‑oo
Judges9:1 Yelunpa‑as tus tub Anpimelej txawm mus cuag nws niam cov neej tsa hauv lub moos Sekhee mas hais rau lawv thiab lawv cum sawvdaws tias
Judges9:2 “Thov nej mus hais tej lus no rau cov neeg Sekhee sawvdaws hnov hais tias
Judges9:3 Mas nws niam tej neej tsa thiaj hais tej lus no rau cov neeg Sekhee mloog. Ces lawv txawm qaug siab kiag tuaj Anpimelej tog
Judges9:4 Lawv thiaj muab xya caum daim nyiaj hauv lub tsev dab Npa‑as Npeli pub rau Anpimelej. Nws coj mus ntiav cov neeg loj leeb tsis tsheej haj tuaj nws tog.
Judges9:5 Nws txawm mus rau hauv nws txiv tsev hauv lub moos Aufa thiab tua nws cov kwvtij uas yog Yelunpa‑as xya caum tus tub rau saum tib daim lag zeb. Tsuas yog tshuav Yauthas uas yog Yelunpa‑as tus tub ntxawg xwb vim nws mus tsiv nraim lawm.
Judges9:6 Cov neeg Sekhee thiab cov neeg Npemilau sawvdaws sau zog tuaj ua ke. Lawv mus tsa Anpimelej ua vajntxwv rau ntawm tus ncej zeb uas nyob ntawm ib sab tus ntoo qheb hauv Sekhee.
Judges9:7 Thaum muaj neeg mus hais rau Yauthas paub mas nws kuj mus rau saum lub ncov roob Kelixi qw nrov nrov hais rau lawv tias
Judges9:8 Muaj ib zaug cov ntoo tau mus tsa ib tug ntoo ua vajntxwv kav lawv. Lawv hais rau tsob txiv aulib tias
Judges9:9 Tiamsis tsob txiv aulib teb lawv tias
Judges9:10 Mas cov ntoo ho hais rau tsob txiv cev tias
Judges9:11 Tiamsis tsob txiv cev teb lawv tias
Judges9:12 Cov ntoo ho hais rau tsob txiv hmab tias
Judges9:13 Tiamsis tsob txiv hmab teb tias
Judges9:14 Cov ntoo sawvdaws ho hais rau tsob pos tias
Judges9:15 Tsob pos hais rau cov ntoo ntawd tias
Judges9:16 “Qhov uas nej tsa Anpimelej ua vajntxwv ntawd
Judges9:17 (rau qhov kuv txiv twb ua rog pab nej
Judges9:18 Tiamsis hnub no nej sawv twv kuv txiv tsev neeg
Judges9:19 yog hnub no nej ua tuaj nruab siab thiab ua ncaj rau Yelunpa‑as thiab nws tsev neeg
Judges9:20 Yog qhov uas nej ua li ntawd tsis ncaj mas cia hluavtaws tawm hauv Anpimelej los kub cov neeg Sekhee thiab cov neeg Npemilau pov tseg. Thiab cia hluavtaws tawm hauv cov Sekhee thiab cov Npemilau kub Anpimelej pov tseg.”
Judges9:21 Yauthas thiaj li khiav mus nyob rau ntawm Npe‑aw vim yog ntshai nws tijlaug Anpimelej.
Judges9:22 Anpimelej kav cov Yixayee tau peb xyoos.
Judges9:23 Yawmsaub tshoov siab rau Anpimelej thiab cov neeg Sekhee kom tsis sib hum. Cov Sekhee thiaj fav xeeb rau Anpimelej
Judges9:24 thiaj ua pauj rau qhov uas lawv ua limhiam rau Yelunpa‑as xya caum leej tub
Judges9:25 Cov Sekhee sawv twv Anpimelej thiab tso neeg mus zov kev saum lub ncov roob lws txhua tus uas taug txojkev ntawd. Txawm muaj neeg mus hais rau Anpimelej paub.
Judges9:26 Mas Enpe tus tub Ka‑a thiab nws cov kwvtij khiav mus nyob hauv lub moos Sekhee
Judges9:27 Lawv mus de txiv hmab coj los tsuj tsuam kua thiab pam noj haus rau hauv lawv lub tsev dab
Judges9:28 Mas Enpe tus tub Ka‑a thiaj hais tias
Judges9:29 Yog cia kuv kav cov neeg no mas kuv yuav muab Anpimelej rhuav tseg. Kuv yuav twv ntxhias Anpimelej tias
Judges9:30 Thaum tus tim xyoob Xenpu hauv lub moos Sekhee tau hnov tej lus uas Enpe tus tub Ka‑a hais nws chim heev.
Judges9:31 Nws thiaj tso neeg xa xov mus rau Anpimelej hauv lub moos Aluma hais tias
Judges9:32 Mas koj thiab koj cov neeg cia li sawv tsees hmo ntuj mus zov tos tom teb.
Judges9:33 Mas tagkis thaum hnub pib tawm koj cia li sawv ntxov txeem plaws tuaj ntaus lub moos. Mas thaum Ka‑a thiab nws cov tub rog tawm tuaj tiv nej
Judges9:34 Anpimelej thiab cov neeg sawvdaws uas nrog nws thiaj li tuaj hmo ntuj
Judges9:35 Thaum Enpe tus tub Ka‑a tawm mus sawv ntawm txojkev uas nkag rau hauv rooj loog
Judges9:36 Thaum Ka‑a pom cov neeg ntawd nws hais rau Xenpu tias
Judges9:37 Ka‑a rov hais dua tias
Judges9:38 Xenpu thiaj hais rau Ka‑a tias
Judges9:39 Mas Ka‑a thiaj ua ntej coj cov neeg Sekhee mus nrog Anpimelej ua rog.
Judges9:40 Anpimelej muab Ka‑a ntiab khiav mus thiab muaj neeg raug mob ntog coob kawg taug kev los txog ntua rooj loog.
Judges9:41 Anpimelej kuj nyob hauv Aluma
Judges9:42 Hnub tom qab muaj neeg hais rau Anpimelej tias cov neeg hauv moos tawm mus tom tej teb
Judges9:43 ces nws txawm muab nws cov tub rog faib ua peb pab zov tom tej teb. Nws saib pom cov neeg tawm hauv lub moos tuaj ces nws txawm sawv tsees muab tua kiag tuag.
Judges9:44 Anpimelej thiab pab tub rog uas nrog nws txawm txeem plaws mus nyob ntawm rooj loog
Judges9:45 Anpimelej tua lub moos ntawd ib hnub tsaus ntuj mas txeeb tau lub moos thiab tua cov pejxeem hauv lub moos ntawd tuag tag huvsi. Nws muab lub moos tsoo puam tsuaj tag thiab w ntsev rau hauv lub moos.
Judges9:46 Thaum cov neeg uas nyob ntawm lub chaw faj seeb hauv Sekhee tau hnov tej xwm no lawv khiav nkag rau hauv lub chaw ruaj khov uas yog tsev dab Eenpeli.
Judges9:47 Muaj neeg hais rau Anpimelej tias cov neeg uas nyob ntawm lub chaw faj seeb hauv Sekhee tau sau zog ua ke.
Judges9:48 Anpimelej thiaj coj nws cov neeg nce mus saum lub roob Xamoo
Judges9:49 Yog li ntawd cov neeg sawvdaws thiaj txiav taws kwv raws Anpimelej qab mus tib ua ib pawg rau ntawm lub chaw ruaj khov ntawd
Judges9:50 Anpimelej txawm mus rau ntawm lub moos Thenpes
Judges9:51 Tiamsis muaj ib lub chaw faj seeb ruaj khov hauv lub moos ntawd
Judges9:52 Anpimelej thiaj tuaj txog thiab ua rog rau lub chaw faj seeb ntawd. Nws mus ze lub qhov rooj yuav muab hluavtaws hlawv.
Judges9:53 Mas muaj ib tug pojniam muab txhib zeb txiv tso los tsoo Anpimelej taubhau ua nws taubhau tawg rhe.
Judges9:54 Nws thiaj qw ceev ceev rau tus hluas uas coj nws cuab yeej tias
Judges9:55 Thaum cov Yixayee pom tias Anpimelej tuag lawm lawv nyias taus nyias rov qab mus tsev.
Judges9:56 Qhov no yog Vajtswv ua pauj rau tej kev phem uas Anpimelej ua rau nws txiv uas yog nws tua nws xya caum leej kwvtij.
Judges9:57 Vajtswv muab tej kev phem uas cov neeg Sekhee ua no coj rov los poob rau saum cov Sekhee taubhau
Judges10:1 Dhau Anpimelej lawm muaj dua ib tug sawv los pab cov Yixayee dim yeeb ncuab
Judges10:2 Nws ua thawj kav cov Yixayee tau nees nkaum peb xyoos
Judges10:3 Dhau ntawd Ya‑i uas yog neeg Kile‑a ho sawv ua thawj kav cov Yixayee tau nees nkaum ob xyoos.
Judges10:4 Nws muaj peb caug tus tub uas caij peb caug tus nees luav. Lawv muaj peb caug lub moos hu ua Havauya‑i los txog niaj hnub nimno rau hauv Kile‑a tebchaws.
Judges10:5 Ya‑i tuag mas muab log rau hauv lub moos Khamoo.
Judges10:6 Cov Yixayee rov ua tej uas Yawmsaub pom tias phem. Lawv mus teev tej dab Npa‑as thiab tej dab Athalau
Judges10:7 Mas Yawmsaub npau taws rau cov Yixayee
Judges10:8 Luag thiaj tsim txom quab yuam cov Yixayee rau xyoo ntawd. Luag quab yuam cov Yixayee uas nyob sab dej Yaladee hnub tuaj hauv cov Amaulai tebchaws uas yog Kile‑a tau kaum yim xyoo.
Judges10:9 Cov Asmoo kuj hla tus dej Yaladee mus ua rog rau cov Yuda thiab Npeeyamee thiab Efa‑i. Cov Yixayee thiaj raug kev txom nyem heev kawg li.
Judges10:10 Cov Yixayee thiaj quaj thov Yawmsaub tias
Judges10:11 Mas Yawmsaub hais rau cov Yixayee tias
Judges10:12 Thiab cov Xaidoo
Judges10:13 Txawm yog li ntawd los nej tseem tso kuv tseg mus ua koom tu luag tej dab. Vim li no kuv yuav tsis pab nej dim dua li lawm.
Judges10:14 Cia li mus quaj thov tej dab uas nej xaiv los ntawd. Cia cov dab ntawd pab nej dim hauv nej tej kev txom nyem no.”
Judges10:15 Mas cov Yixayee hais rau Yawmsaub tias
Judges10:16 Ua li ntawd mas lawv thiaj muab lwm haiv neeg tej dab tso pov tseg los ua koom tu Yawmsaub. Mas Yawmsaub thiaj mob siab rau qhov uas cov Yixayee raug kev txom nyem lwj siab ntawd.
Judges10:17 Cov Asmoo thiaj li raug sau ua tub rog thiab ua lub yeej ua rog rau hauv Kile‑a. Cov Yixayee kuj sau zog tuaj ua ke ua yeej rau ntawm Mixapa.
Judges10:18 Cov neeg Kile‑a cov thawj hais tias
Judges11:1 Yetha uas yog neeg Kile‑a yog ib tug tub rog siab loj siab tuab. Nws niam yog ib tug poj muag cev
Judges11:2 Kile‑a tus niam tsav cuab muaj ob peb tug tub. Thaum cov tub ntawd hlob lawm lawv txawm ntiab Yetha khiav mus thiab hais tias
Judges11:3 Yetha txawm khiav ntawm cov kwvtij mus nyob hauv lub tebchaws Thauj. Cov neeg tsis tsheej haj tuaj koom nrog nws mus ua tub sab tub nyiag.
Judges11:4 Tom qab ntawd cov Asmoo ua rog rau cov Yixayee.
Judges11:5 Thaum cov Asmoo ua rog rau cov Yixayee ntawd
Judges11:6 Lawv hais rau Yetha tias
Judges11:7 Tiamsis Yetha hais rau Kile‑a cov kev txwj laus tias
Judges11:8 Kile‑a cov kev txwj laus hais rau Yetha tias
Judges11:9 Yetha thiaj hais rau Kile‑a cov kev txwj laus tias
Judges11:10 Kile‑a cov kev txwj laus hais rau Yetha tias
Judges11:11 Yetha thiaj nrog Kile‑a cov kev txwj laus mus mas cov pejxeem thiaj tsa nws ua tus thawj thiab ua tus kav hlo lawv. Yetha thiaj hais tej lus uas lawv hais hum huvsi ntawd tab meeg Yawmsaub ntawm lub moos Mixapa.
Judges11:12 Yetha thiaj tso neeg xa xov mus hais rau cov Asmoo tus vajntxwv tias
Judges11:13 Cov Asmoo tus vajntxwv teb Yetha tej tub xa xov tias
Judges11:14 Yetha tso neeg xa xov rov mus cuag cov Asmoo tus vajntxwv dua
Judges11:15 lawv hais tias
Judges11:16 Tiamsis thaum cov Yixayee tawm hauv Iyi tebchaws los
Judges11:17 Mas cov Yixayee tso neeg xa xov mus hais rau Edoo tus vajntxwv tias
Judges11:18 Ces lawv txawm mus hauv tebchaws moj sab qhua lug Edoo thiab Mau‑a lub tebchaws los txog ntawm Mau‑a lub tebchaws sab hnub tuaj thiab tsuam chaw nyob ntawm tus dej Anoo sab ped. Lawv twb tsis mus rau hauv Mau‑a tebchaws li
Judges11:19 Cov Yixayee thiaj tso neeg xa xov mus cuag cov Amaulai tus vajntxwv Xihoo hauv lub moos Hesanpoo. Cov Yixayee hais rau nws tias
Judges11:20 Tiamsis Xihoo tsis tso siab cia cov Yixayee hla nws lub tebchaws
Judges11:21 Mas Yawmsaub uas yog cov Yixayee tus Vajtswv thiaj muab Xihoo thiab nws cov neeg huvsi rau hauv cov Yixayee txhais tes
Judges11:22 Cov Yixayee txeeb kiag cov Amaulai lub tebchaws txij ntua tus dej Anoo mus txog tus dej Yanpo
Judges11:23 “Yog li no Yawmsaub uas yog cov Yixayee tus Vajtswv thiaj ntiab cov Amaulai khiav tawm ntawm nws haiv neeg Yixayee hauv ntej mus. Mas koj txawm yuav muab ua koj tug lov?
Judges11:24 Koj tsis ceev tej uas koj tus dab Khemauj muab cob rau koj lov? Txhua thaj uas peb tus Vajtswv Yawmsaub ntiab luag tawm ntawm peb hauv ntej mus es pub rau peb
Judges11:25 Koj zoo dua Xipau tus tub Npalaj uas ua vajntxwv hauv Mau‑a tebchaws lov? Npalaj txeev nrog cov Yixayee sib ntsuas zog thiab ua rog rau lawv lov?
Judges11:26 Cov Yixayee twb nyob hauv lub moos Hesanpoo thiab ib ncig lub moos ntawd thiab nyob hauv lub moos Alau‑aw thiab ib ncig ntawd thiab nyob hauv txhua lub moos raws tus ntug dej Anoo tau peb puas xyoo
Judges11:27 Yog li no kuv tsis tau ua txhaum rau koj
Judges11:28 Tiamsis cov Asmoo tus vajntxwv tsis mloog tej lus uas Yetha tso neeg mus hais ntawd.
Judges11:29 Mas Yawmsaub tus Ntsuj Plig los kav kiag Yetha
Judges11:30 Yetha thiaj fiv rau Yawmsaub hais tias
Judges11:31 mas leejtwg uas tawm hauv kuv lub qhov rooj tuaj tos kuv rau thaum kuv kov yeej cov Asmoo rov qab los
Judges11:32 Ces Yetha txawm hla mus ua rog rau cov Asmoo mas Yawmsaub muab lawv cob rau hauv nws txhais tes.
Judges11:33 Mas nws tua tau lawv txij ntua lub moos Alau‑aw mus yuav txog lub moos Minij
Judges11:34 Yetha txawm rov qab los tsev rau hauv Mixapa
Judges11:35 Thaum nws pom dheev tus ntxhais ntawd nws txawm dua rhe nws lub tsho thiab hais tias
Judges11:36 Nws thiaj hais rau leej txiv tias
Judges11:37 Nws kuj hais rau leej txiv tias
Judges11:38 Leejtxiv teb tias
Judges11:39 Thaum puv ob hlis lawd
Judges11:40 kom lawv tej ntxhais niaj xyoo quaj ntsuag txog Yetha uas yog neeg Kile‑a tus ntxhais ib xyoos mas plaub hnub.
Judges12:1 Cov neeg Efa‑i raug sau ua tub rog hla mus txog Xafoo mas lawv hais rau Yetha tias
Judges12:2 Yetha thiaj hais rau lawv tias
Judges12:3 Thaum kuv pom tias nej tsis pab kuv dim lawm kuv thiaj tso nyog kuv txojsia hla mus ua rog rau cov Asmoo
Judges12:4 Yetha thiaj sau zog cov neeg Kile‑a ua rog rau cov Efa‑i. Cov Kile‑a kuj tua cov Efa‑i rau qhov cov Efa‑i hais tias
Judges12:5 Cov Kile‑a kuj txeeb tau tej chaw uas hla tus dej Yaladee tag huvsi tsis kheev cov Efa‑i hla. Thaum cov Efa‑i tus twg khiav los hais tias
Judges12:6 ces lawv hais tias
Judges12:7 Yetha ua thawj kav cov Yixayee tau rau xyoo. Yetha uas yog neeg Kile‑a li tuag mas muab nws log rau ib lub moos hauv Kile‑a tebchaws.
Judges12:8 Dhau Yetha lawd mas Ixas uas nyob hauv Npelehee ua thawj kav cov Yixayee.
Judges12:9 Nws muaj peb caug leej tub thiab peb caug leej ntxhais
Judges12:10 Ixas li tuag mas muab nws log rau hauv Npelehee.
Judges12:11 Dhau Ixas lawd mas Eloo uas yog xeem Xenpuloo ua thawj kav cov Yixayee. Nws kav cov Yixayee tau kaum xyoo.
Judges12:12 Mas Eloo uas yog neeg Xenpuloo kuj tuag mas muab nws log rau hauv Aiyaloo hauv Xenpuloo tebchaws.
Judges12:13 Dhau Eloo lawd mas Hilee tus tub Adoo uas nyob hauv lub moos Pilathoo ua thawj kav cov Yixayee.
Judges12:14 Nws muaj plaub caug leej tub thiab muaj peb caug leej xeeb ntxwv caij xya caum tus nees luav. Nws kav cov Yixayee tau yim xyoo.
Judges12:15 Hilee tus tub Adoo uas nyob hauv Pilathoo kuj tuag mas muab nws log rau ntawm Pilathoo hauv Efa‑i tebchaws uas yog pem toj siab uas muaj cov Amalej nyob.
Judges13:1 Cov Yixayee rov qab ua tej uas Yawmsaub pom tias phem
Judges13:2 Muaj ib tug yawg yog xeem Daj nyob hauv lub moos Xaula
Judges13:3 Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj los tshwm rau tus pojniam ntawd thiab hais rau nws tias
Judges13:4 Vim li no koj yuav tsum ceev faj tsis txhob haus cawv txiv hmab thiab cawv ntxwg
Judges13:5 vim koj yuav xeeb menyuam thiab yug ib tug tub. Tsis txhob chais nws cov plaubhau rau qhov tus tub ntawd yuav muab cais ua Naxi pub rau Vajtswv txij thaum yug los li. Nws yuav pib cawm cov Yixayee dim hauv cov Filixatee txhais tes.”
Judges13:6 Tus pojniam ntawd txawm mus hais rau nws tus txiv tias
Judges13:7 Tiamsis nws hais rau kuv tias
Judges13:8 Ces Manau‑a txawm thov Yawmsaub tias
Judges13:9 Vajtswv mloog Manau‑a tej lus thov thiab Vajtswv tus tubtxib saum ntuj los tshwm dua ib zaug rau tus pojniam ntawd rau thaum nws zaum tom teb
Judges13:10 Nws thiaj dhia mus hais rau nws tus txiv tias
Judges13:11 Manau‑a thiaj li sawv tsees raws nws pojniam qab mus. Thaum nws mus txog tus yawg ntawd nws txawm hais tias
Judges13:12 Manau‑a thiaj hais tias
Judges13:13 Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj thiaj hais rau Manau‑a tias
Judges13:14 Nws tsis txhob noj ib yam dabtsi uas muab txiv hmab ua
Judges13:15 Manau‑a hais rau Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj tias
Judges13:16 Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj txawm hais rau Manau‑a tias
Judges13:17 Manau‑a thiaj hais rau Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj tias
Judges13:18 Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj hais rau nws tias
Judges13:19 Manau‑a txawm muab tus menyuam tshis thiab tej qoob loo uas xyeem tuaj xyeem rau saum lub pob zeb rau Yawmsaub uas ua tej txujci phimhwj.
Judges13:20 Thaum nplaim taws cig plaws saum lub thaj mus rau saum ntuj
Judges13:21 Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj tsis los tshwm rau Manau‑a thiab nws tus pojniam dua li lawm. Manau‑a thiaj paub tias tus ntawd yog Yawmsaub tus tubtxib saum ntuj.
Judges13:22 Manau‑a txawm hais rau nws tus pojniam tias
Judges13:23 Tiamsis nws tus pojniam hais rau nws tias
Judges13:24 Tus pojniam ntawd thiaj yug tau ib tug tub
Judges13:25 Thiab Yawmsaub tus Ntsuj Plig pib txhawb nws lub siab ntawm Mahane Daj uas nyob ntawm Xaula thiab Etha‑oo ntu nruab nrab.
Judges14:1 Xaxoo mus nram lub moos Thinaj
Judges14:2 Ces nws txawm rov los hais rau nws niam nws txiv tias
Judges14:3 Tiamsis leej txiv thiab leej niam hais rau nws tias
Judges14:4 Leej txiv thiab leej niam tsis paub tias qhov no yog los ntawm Yawmsaub los
Judges14:5 Ces Xaxoo txawm nrog nws niam nws txiv mus nram Thinaj. Thaum nws tuaj txog tej vaj txiv hmab ntawm Thinaj ua ciav muaj ib tug thav tsov ntxhuav dhia nyooj laws los rau nws.
Judges14:6 Yawmsaub tus Ntsuj Plig txawm los kav kiag Xaxoo
Judges14:7 Nws txawm mus nrog tus hluas nkauj ntawd tham
Judges14:8 Tsis ntev tom qab Xaxoo rov mus yuav tus hluas nkauj ntawd. Nws txawm mus xauj saib tug tsov ntxhuav lub cev tuag ntawd
Judges14:9 Nws txawm cev tes kaus cov zib ntab ntawd los noj taug kev mus. Nws los txog nws niam nws txiv nws txawm muab cev rau ob tug noj
Judges14:10 Nws txiv kuj mus rau nram tus hluas nkauj ntawd mas Xaxoo pam ib rooj mov qhov ntawd ib yam li tej hluas ib txwm ua.
Judges14:11 Thaum cov Filixatee pom nws lawd lawv coj peb caug leej tuaj ua qhua nrog nws nyob ua ke.
Judges14:12 Ces Xaxoo txawm hais rau lawv tias
Judges14:13 Yog nej txhais tsis tau
Judges14:14 Ces Xaxoo hais rau lawv tias
Judges14:15 Thaum txog hnub uas plaub lawv txawm mus hais rau Xaxoo tus pojniam tias
Judges14:16 Xaxoo tus pojniam mus quaj rau Xaxoo thiab hais tias
Judges14:17 Nws quaj rau Xaxoo xya hnub uas noj tshoob ntawd
Judges14:18 Ces hnub uas xya thaum hnub tsis tau poob qho cov neeg hauv lub moos ntawd thiaj hais rau Xaxoo tias
Judges14:19 Yawmsaub tus Ntsuj Plig los kav tag nrho Xaxoo
Judges14:20 Xaxoo tus pojniam ntawd mas luag muab qua rau nws tus phijlaj yuav lawm.
Judges15:1 Dhau ntawd thaum txog lub caij hlais mog
Judges15:2 Yawm txiv hais tias
Judges15:3 Xaxoo txawm hais rau lawv tias
Judges15:4 Xaxoo txawm tawm mus ntes peb puas tus hma coj los khi kotw sib txuas ua ib nkawg ib nkawg
Judges15:5 Thaum nws zes taws rau teg tsau lawd nws kuj muab tso rau hauv cov Filixatee tej teb mog mas hluavtaws kub lawv tej mog uas hlais tau thiab tej mog uas tseem tsis tau hlais thiab kub tej vaj txiv hmab thiab tej teb txiv aulib.
Judges15:6 Cov Filixatee thiaj hais tias
Judges15:7 Xaxoo txawm hais rau lawv tias
Judges15:8 Nws txawm ntaus lawv ua lwj ua liam ua rau lawv tuag coob kawg
Judges15:9 Ces cov Filixatee txawm mus ua lub yeej hauv Yuda thiab mus ntaus lub moos Lehi.
Judges15:10 Cov neeg Yuda nug tias
Judges15:11 Cov neeg Yuda peb txhiab leej txawm mus rau ntawm kem zeb Edas thiab hais rau Xaxoo tias
Judges15:12 Lawv thiaj hais rau nws tias
Judges15:13 Lawv hais rau nws tias
Judges15:14 Thaum nws mus txog lub moos Lehi
Judges15:15 Nws txawm pom ib daim puab tsaig nees luav nyoos nyoos ces nws cev tes khaws nkaus los ntaus cov Filixatee tuag ib txhiab leej.
Judges15:16 Mas Xaxoo hais tias
Judges15:17 Thaum nws hais li ntawd tag nws txawm muab daim puab tsaig ntawd laim pov tseg. Mas luag thiaj hu lub chaw ntawd tias Lamalehi.
Judges15:18 Xaxoo nqhis dej heev thiaj li hu thov Yawmsaub hais tias
Judges15:19 Vajtswv txawm qheb kiag ib lub qhov ntawm lub moos Lehi mas dej txhawv los. Thaum Xaxoo haus dej tag nws rov qab muaj zog thiab nws txojsia loj tuaj. Vim li ntawd thiaj hu qhov chaw ntawd tias Eehakhau
Judges15:20 Thaum cov Filixatee tseem kav ntawd
Judges16:1 Xaxoo mus rau hauv lub moos Kaxa mas pom ib tug poj muag cev ces txawm mus nrog pw ua ke.
Judges16:2 Muaj neeg mus hais rau cov neeg Kaxa tias
Judges16:3 Tiamsis Xaxoo pw txog ib tag hmo. Mas thaum ib tag hmo nws sawv tsees los rho kiag txhib qhov rooj loog thiab ob tug ncej rooj thiab tus las rooj kwv kiag saum xub pwg mus rau pem lub ncov roob uas nyob ncaj lub moos Heploo.
Judges16:4 Dhau los rau tom qab Xaxoo mus nyiam ib tug pojniam hauv lub hav Xaule npe hu ua Delila.
Judges16:5 Filixatee cov thawj mus hais rau tus pojniam ntawd tias
Judges16:6 Delila thiaj hais rau Xaxoo tias
Judges16:7 Xaxoo hais rau nws tias
Judges16:8 Filixatee cov thawj thiaj coj xya txoj hlua hneev uas tseem nyoos tsis tau qhuav tuaj rau Delila mas nws muab Xaxoo khi.
Judges16:9 Nws kuj npaj ib co neeg zov nyob dua ib chav tsev. Nws txawm hais rau Xaxoo tias
Judges16:10 Delila txawm hais rau Xaxoo tias
Judges16:11 Xaxoo hais rau nws tias
Judges16:12 Delila txawm muab cov hlua tshiab los khi nws thiab hais rau nws tias
Judges16:13 Mas Delila hais rau Xaxoo tias
Judges16:14 Yog li ntawd
Judges16:15 Mas Delila hais rau Xaxoo tias
Judges16:16 Thaum Delila txob txob hais tag hais thiab taij hnub tag hnub thiab
Judges16:17 Nws txawm qhia kiag nws lub siab rau Delila huvsi hais tias
Judges16:18 Thaum Delila pom tias nws qhia kiag lub siab huvsi lawm
Judges16:19 Delila txawm kom Xaxoo pw tsaug zog rau saum nws ncej qab
Judges16:20 Delila txawm hais tias
Judges16:21 Cov Filixatee thiaj muab nws ntes thiab muab nws ob lub qhov muag kaus pov tseg
Judges16:22 Txij thaum chais nws cov plaubhau lawd
Judges16:23 Filixatee cov thawj tuaj txoos ua ke yuav ua kevcai loj xyeem tsiaj rau lawv tus dab Dakoo
Judges16:24 Thaum cov pejxeem pom Xaxoo lawv kuj qhuas lawv tus dab tias
Judges16:25 Thaum lawv ua lomzem zoo siab ntawd
Judges16:26 Xaxoo hais rau tus menyuam tub uas tuav nws tes tias
Judges16:27 Muaj pojniam txivneej puv nkaus lub tsev ntawd. Filixatee cov thawj sawvdaws kuj nyob qhov ntawd
Judges16:28 Ces Xaxoo txawm quaj thov Yawmsaub tias
Judges16:29 Xaxoo txawm tuav ob tug ncej hauv nruab nrab tsev uas txheem lub tsev ntawd thiab nthia tes rau ob tug ncej ntawd
Judges16:30 Thiab Xaxoo hais tias
Judges16:31 Ces nws cov kwvtij thiab nws tsev neeg sawvdaws tuaj coj nws lub cev tuag mus log rau hauv nws txiv Manau‑a lub qhov ntxa uas nyob ntawm lub moos Xaula thiab lub moos Etha‑oo ntu nruab nrab. Nws ua thawj kav cov Yixayee tau nees nkaum xyoo.
Judges17:1 Muaj ib tug yawg yog neeg pem toj siab Efa‑i tebchaws hu ua Mikha.
Judges17:2 Nws hais rau nws niam tias
Judges17:3 Mikha thiaj muab ib txhiab ib puas daim nyiaj ntawd thim rau leej niam. Mas leej niam hais tias
Judges17:4 Thaum Mikha thim cov nyiaj rov rau leej niam lawm leej niam txawm coj ob puas daim mus rau tus Kws nyiaj muab txaug ua dab mlom thiab nchuav ua dab mlom. Mas tej dab mlom ntawd nyob hauv Mikha tsev.
Judges17:5 Tus Mikha no muaj ib lub tsev dab thiab ua ib lub efauj thiab teev dab qhuas
Judges17:6 Ncua sijhawm ntawd cov Yixayee tsis muaj vajntxwv mas txhua tus nyias ua raws li nyias pom zoo.
Judges17:7 Muaj ib tug hluas
Judges17:8 Nws tawm hauv Npelehee uas nyob hauv Yuda tebchaws mus nrhiav chaw nyob. Thaum nws taug kev mus ntawd nws mus txog pem toj siab Efa‑i tebchaws thiab mus txog Mikha lub tsev.
Judges17:9 Mikha thiaj hais rau nws tias
Judges17:10 Mikha txawm hais rau nws tias
Judges17:11 Tus Levi kuj txaus siab nrog tus yawg ntawd nyob. Tus hluas ntawd kuj zoo tam Mikha ib tug tub ntag.
Judges17:12 Mikha kuj tsa tus Levi ntawd mas tus Levi thiaj ua nws tus pov thawj thiab nyob hauv nws tsev.
Judges17:13 Mikha hais tias
Judges18:1 Ncua sijhawm ntawd cov Yixayee tsis muaj vajntxwv. Lub sijhawm ntawd xeem Daj tabtom nrhiav tebchaws rau lawv nyob ua lawv qub txeeg qub teg
Judges18:2 Mas cov Daj thiaj xa tsib tug txivneej uas siab tuab sawv cev lawv xeem tuaj hauv Xaula thiab Etha‑oo mus tshuaj tebchaws thiab saib tebchaws. Cov Daj hais rau lawv tias
Judges18:3 Thaum lawv tuaj ze ntawm Mikha tsev lawv cim tau tus hluas Levi ntawd lub suab
Judges18:4 Nws teb lawv tias
Judges18:5 Lawv txawm hais rau nws tias
Judges18:6 Tus pov thawj txawm hais rau lawv tias
Judges18:7 Tsib tug txivneej ntawd thiaj li tawm mus txog lub moos La‑i
Judges18:8 Thaum lawv rov los txog lawv tej kwvtij hauv Xaula thiab Etha‑oo
Judges18:9 Lawv teb tias
Judges18:10 Thaum uas nej mus txog yuav ntsib cov neeg uas tsis txob tsis txhawj dabtsi li. Lub tebchaws kuj dav
Judges18:11 Mas xeem Daj rau pua tus txivneej muaj cuab yeej ua rog tawm hauv Xaula thiab Etha‑oo mus.
Judges18:12 Lawv mus ua yeej ntawm Khiliya Ye‑ali hauv Yuda tebchaws. Vim li no lawv thiaj hu qhov chaw ntawd hais tias Mahane Daj
Judges18:13 Lawv kuj hla qhov ntawd mus rau pem toj siab Efa‑i tebchaws
Judges18:14 Mas tsib tug txivneej uas twb mus tshuaj tebchaws ntawm lub moos La‑i lawd hais rau lawv tej kwvtij tias
Judges18:15 Lawv thiaj nkag mus rau hauv tus Levi hluas ntawd lub tsev uas nyob ntawm Mikha tsev mas nug nws kev noj qab nyob zoo.
Judges18:16 Mas xeem Daj rau pua leej uas coj cuab yeej ua rog sawv ntawm rooj vag.
Judges18:17 Mas tsib tug uas mus tshuaj tebchaws ntawd kuj nkag mus muab tus dab mlom uas txaug thiab lub tsho efauj thiab tej dab qhuas thiab tus dab mlom uas nchuav ntawd. Mas tus pov thawj kuj sawv nrog rau pua tus txivneej uas coj cuab yeej ua rog sawv ntawm rooj vag ua ke.
Judges18:18 Thaum cov neeg no nkag mus rau hauv Mikha tsev muab tus dab mlom uas txaug thiab lub tsho efauj thiab tej dab qhuas thiab tus dab mlom uas nchuav ntawd los
Judges18:19 Lawv teb nws tias
Judges18:20 Mas tus pov thawj thiaj li zoo siab. Nws thiaj muab lub efauj thiab tej dab qhuas thiab tus dab mlom uas txaug coj nrog cov neeg ntawd mus.
Judges18:21 Lawv thiaj tig kiag ntawd mus
Judges18:22 Thaum lawv mus ntawd deb ntawm Mikha tsev lawd mas Mikha txawm hu cov neeg uas nyob ze nws tsev tuaj ua ke mas lawv caum cuag cov neeg Daj.
Judges18:23 Lawv qw hu cov Daj
Judges18:24 Nws teb tias
Judges18:25 Cov Daj thiaj hais rau nws tias
Judges18:26 Cov Daj cia li taug kev mus lawm. Thaum Mikha pom tias lawv muaj zog dua
Judges18:27 Cov neeg Daj coj tej uas Mikha ua thiab Mikha tus pov thawj mus mas mus txog lub moos La‑i
Judges18:28 Tsis muaj leejtwg tuaj pab cuam rau qhov lawv nyob deb lub moos Xaidoo thiab lawv tsis ntsig txog lwm tus. Lub moos La‑i nyob hauv lub hav ze lub moos Npelehau. Lawv muab lub moos ntawd ua dua tshiab rau lawv nyob.
Judges18:29 Lawv thiaj hu lub moos ntawd hu ua moos Daj raws li lawv yawg koob Daj uas yog Yixayee yug. Yav thaum ub lub moos ntawd hu ua La‑i.
Judges18:30 Cov Daj kuj muab tus dab mlom uas txaug txawb rau lawv teev. Mas Kawsoo tus tub Yaunathas uas yog Mauxe xeeb ntxwv thiab nws cov tub ua pov thawj rau xeem Daj mus txog lub sijhawm uas tebchaws poob.
Judges18:31 Lawv muab tus dab mlom txaug uas Mikha ua ntawd txawb teev mus tag lub sijhawm uas Vajtswv lub tsev nyob hauv Silau.
Judges19:1 Ncua sijhawm ntawd cov Yixayee tsis muaj vajntxwv
Judges19:2 Nws tus niam yau ntawd mus deev dua hluas nraug thiaj khiav tus txiv rov mus nrog leej txiv nyob hauv Npelehee hauv Yuda tebchaws
Judges19:3 Nws tus txiv ho mus tos nws
Judges19:4 Nws yawm txiv uas yog tus ntxhais txiv cheem nws nyob mas nws thiaj nyob tau peb hnub. Lawv kuj noj haus thiab pw qhov ntawd.
Judges19:5 Mas hnub uas plaub lawv thiaj sawv ntxov los hwbxwm yuav mus
Judges19:6 Ob tug ntawd thiaj li rov zaum noj haus ua ke. Mas tus ntxhais txiv cheem tus ntawd tias
Judges19:7 Thaum tus vauv sawv tsees yuav mus yawm txiv cheem cheem mas nws rov pw qhov ntawd.
Judges19:8 Mas hnub uas tsib nws sawv ntxov yuav mus tiamsis tus ntxhais txiv hais tias
Judges19:9 Thaum tus yawg ntawd thiab nws tus niam yau thiab tus tub qhe sawv tsees yuav mus
Judges19:10 Tiamsis tus yawg ntawd tsis yeem pw dua ib hmos lawm
Judges19:11 Thaum lawv los yuav txog lub moos Yenpu mas twb yuav tsaus ntuj
Judges19:12 Tus lospav teb tias
Judges19:13 Nws thiaj hais rau tus tub qhe tias
Judges19:14 Lawv thiaj hla kiag mus. Thaum lawv los ze Kinpe‑a uas yog xeem Npeeyamee lub moos mas hnub poob lawm.
Judges19:15 Lawv thiaj nkag mus yuav pw hauv Kinpe‑a. Nws thiaj mus zaum ntawm tshav puam hauv lub plawv moos vim yog tsis muaj leejtwg hu lawv mus pw hauv tsev.
Judges19:16 Thaum yuav tsaus ntuj muaj ib tug yawg laus mus teb los. Nws yog neeg pem toj siab Efa‑i tebchaws los nyob hauv lub moos Kinpe‑a
Judges19:17 Nws tsa muag ntsia mas pom cov qhua nyob ntawm tshav puam hauv lub moos
Judges19:18 Tus Levi teb tias
Judges19:19 Quav nyab thiab zaub nees luav peb kuj muaj txhij thiab peb uas yog koj cov qhev muaj mov noj thiab cawv txiv hmab txaus rau kuv thiab tus pojniam no thiab tus hluas uas nrog wb tuaj no huvsi
Judges19:20 Tus yawg laus ntawd thiaj hais tias
Judges19:21 Nws thiaj coj lawv los so hauv nws tsev
Judges19:22 Thaum lawv tabtom nyob zoo siab hlo mas cov txivneej phem hauv lub moos ntawd txawm tuaj vij lub tsev tsoo qhov rooj qw hu tus yawg laus uas yog tus tswv tsev ntawd tias
Judges19:23 Tus tswv tsev txawm mus hais rau lawv tias
Judges19:24 Kuv muaj ib tug ntxhais uas tsis tau deev dua hluas nraug li thiab muaj nws tus niam yau nyob no
Judges19:25 Tiamsis cov neeg ntawd tsis mloog kiag li. Mas tus yawg ntawd thiaj muab nws tus niam yau thawb kiag mus rau lawv. Cov txivneej ntawd thiaj li yuam nws ua phem rau nws ib hmos kaj ntug. Thaum kaj ntug txoog lawv muab nws tso mus.
Judges19:26 Thaum pom kev tseeb tus pojniam los ntog vau hlo rau ntawm lub tsev uas tus txiv pw taw rooj mus txog hnub tawm.
Judges19:27 Tagkis tus txiv sawv los qheb qhov rooj yuav mus ua ciav nws tus niam yau pw xyab luas ntawd ob txhais tes xyab khaum ntawm taw rooj.
Judges19:28 Nws hais rau tus niam yau tias
Judges19:29 Thaum nws mus rau hauv tsev lawd nws cia li muab riam txiav tus niam yau uas tuag ntawd ua kaum ob ya mas nws xa mus thoob plaws Yixayee tebchaws.
Judges19:30 Txhua tus uas pom kuj hais tias
Judges20:1 Ib tsoom Yixayee txij ntua Daj mus txog Npe‑awsenpa thiab cov hauv Kile‑a sawvdaws tawm tuaj txoos ua ke ua kiag ib lub siab tuaj rau ntawm Yawmsaub xubntiag hauv lub moos Mixapa.
Judges20:2 Thaum Vajtswv cov neeg tuaj sablaj ua ke mas cov thawj hauv txhua xeem Yixayee sawvdaws kuj tuaj koom thiab. Huvsi muaj 400
Judges20:3 (Thaum ntawd cov neeg Npeeyamee hnov tias cov Yixayee tuaj ua ke rau Mixapa.) Cov Yixayee hais tias
Judges20:4 Tus Levi uas yog tus niam yau uas raug tua ntawd tus txiv hais tias
Judges20:5 Thaum tsaus ntuj cov txivneej hauv lub moos Kinpe‑a txawm tuaj nrhiav kuv thiab vij nkaus lub tsev. Lawv yuav muab kuv tua pov tseg
Judges20:6 Kuv coj kuv tus niam yau lub cev tuag mus txiav ua tej ywb yav xa mus thoob plaws lub tebchaws uas yog cov Yixayee qub txeeg qub teg
Judges20:7 Saib lauj
Judges20:8 Cov pejxeem txhua tus ib txhij sawv tsees hais tias
Judges20:9 Peb yuav ua li no rau Kinpe‑a. Peb yuav rho ntawv mus ua rog rau lawv.
Judges20:10 Peb yuav rho cov Yixayee txhua xeem ib puas leej rho kaum leej
Judges20:11 Cov Yixayee sawvdaws kuj sau nthwv ua ib lub siab mus ua rog rau lub moos ntawd.
Judges20:12 Txhua xeem Yixayee thiaj xa neeg mus hais thoob plaws xeem Npeeyamee tias
Judges20:13 Nej cia li muab cov txivneej phem hauv Kinpe‑a rau peb coj mus tua pov tseg mas peb yuav rhuav tshem tej kev phem kom tawm hauv cov Yixayee mus.” Tiamsis cov Npeeyamee tsis yeem mloog lawv cov kwvtij Yixayee hais.
Judges20:14 Cov Npeeyamee txawm tawm hauv lawv tej moos sau nthwv tuaj rau Kinpe‑a yuav ua rog rau cov Yixayee.
Judges20:15 Hnub ntawd cov Npeeyamee txhij tau cov tub rog coj ntaj hauv lawv tej moos huvsi tuaj yog ob vam rau txhiab leej nrog cov Kinpe‑a uas txhij tau xya pua leej tub rog uas txawj tshaj plaws.
Judges20:16 Cov tub rog huvsi no muaj xya pua leej uas xis sab laug uas txawj ua rog tshaj plaws. Cov no txhua tus txawj xuas hlua fiav pob zeb ntaus kom raug txoj plaubhau tsis npig li.
Judges20:17 Cov Yixayee uas coj ntaj tsis suav cov Npeeyamee mas txhij tau 400
Judges20:18 Cov Yixayee thiaj mus rau ntawm Npe‑ee mus nug Vajtswv tias
Judges20:19 Tagkis cov Yixayee thiaj sawv ntxov mus ua yeej ntaus lub moos Kinpe‑a.
Judges20:20 Cov Yixayee tawm mus ua rog rau cov Npeeyamee
Judges20:21 Hnub ntawd cov Npeeyamee tawm hauv lub moos Kinpe‑a tuaj tua cov Yixayee ntog tuag tag ob vam ob txhiab leej.
Judges20:22 Tiamsis cov Yixayee ho sib cuab zog thiab rov tso dua tub rog ua tej pab tej pawg rau tej chaw uas tso thawj hnub.
Judges20:23 Thiab cov Yixayee kuj mus quaj rau ntawm Yawmsaub xubntiag ib hnub tsaus ntuj. Lawv nug Yawmsaub tias
Judges20:24 Mas hnub uas ob cov Yixayee thiaj txeem mus ze ze cov Npeeyamee.
Judges20:25 Mas hnub ob ntawd cov Npeeyamee kuj tawm hauv Kinpe‑a tuaj tua cov Yixayee tuag tag ib vam yim txhiab leej
Judges20:26 Yixayee cov tub rog sawvdaws thiaj li mus pem Npe‑ee lawv quaj quaj. Lawv zaum rau ntawm Yawmsaub xubntiag yoo mov ib hnub tsaus ntuj
Judges20:27 Cov Yixayee thiaj nug Yawmsaub. (Lub sijhawm ntawd Vajtswv lub phij xab sib cog lus nyob qhov ntawd.
Judges20:28 Mas Ele‑axa tus tub Fineha uas yog Aloo xeeb ntxwv ua haujlwm ntawm lub phij xab rau lub sijhawm ntawd.) Cov Yixayee nug tias
Judges20:29 Yog li no cov Yixayee thiaj tso tub rog mus nraim cev zov puag ncig Kinpe‑a.
Judges20:30 Mas cov Yixayee thiaj rov mus ntaus cov Npeeyamee rau hnub uas peb thiab tso tub rog ua tej pab tej pawg tiv Kinpe‑a yam li thawj ob zaug.
Judges20:31 Cov Npeeyamee tawm tuaj ua rog rau cov Yixayee mas raug ntxias tawm mus deb lub moos. Lawv pib ntaus thiab tua cov Yixayee ib txhia yam li thawj ob zaug
Judges20:32 Cov Npeeyamee hais tias
Judges20:33 Cov Yixayee sawvdaws kuj tawm hauv lawv tej chaw khiav mus ua tej pab tej pawg ntawm Npa‑as Thama
Judges20:34 Muaj ib vam tus tub rog Yixayee uas txawj tshaj plaws txawm txeem mus ntaus lub moos Kinpe‑a. Mas ua rog ceev heev
Judges20:35 Yawmsaub ua rau cov Yixayee kov yeej cov Npeeyamee. Hnub ntawd cov Yixayee tua tau cov Npeeyamee tuag ob vam tsib txhiab ib puas leej
Judges20:36 Yog li ntawd cov Npeeyamee thiaj pom tias lawv swb lawm. Cov Yixayee thim khiav cov Npeeyamee vim yog lawv tso siab rau cov uas nraim cev uas lawv tso mus zov lub moos Kinpe‑a.
Judges20:37 Cov uas nraim cev zov kuj sawv pes tsees txeem mus ntaus lub moos Kinpe‑a. Cov uas nraim cev ntawd tawm los xuas ntaj tua lub moos huvsi.
Judges20:38 Cov Yixayee nrog cov uas nraim cev teem hum tias thaum lawv ua pa taws ncho hlob hauv lub moos
Judges20:39 mas cov Yixayee yuav tig rov los tua. Cov Npeeyamee pib tua tau cov Yixayee kwvlam peb caug leej ces txawm hais tias
Judges20:40 Tiamsis thaum muaj pa taws ncho tshwm plaws hauv lub moos raws li uas teem cia ntawd
Judges20:41 Cov Yixayee tig loo rov los
Judges20:42 Lawv thiaj tig hlo khiav cov Yixayee taug txojkev uas mus rau tebchaws moj sab qhua
Judges20:43 Lawv muab cov Npeeyamee puav kev thiab caum tua mus rau ntawm tej chaw uas cov Npeeyamee so
Judges20:44 Cov Npeeyamee tuag ib vam yim txhiab leej
Judges20:45 Lawv kuj tig khiav mus rau tebchaws moj sab qhua mus txog lub pob tsuas Limoo. Cov Yixayee tua lawv tuag taug txojkev tsib txhiab leej thiab caum nrooj lawv mus txog ntua Kidoo mas tua tau ob txhiab leej.
Judges20:46 Npeeyamee cov tub rog siab loj siab tuab uas coj ntaj raug tuag tag rau hnub ntawd huvsi yog ob vam tsib txhiab leej.
Judges20:47 Tiamsis muaj rau pua leej tub rog tig khiav mus rau tebchaws moj sab qhua mus txog lub pob tsuas Limoo
Judges20:48 Cov Yixayee kuj rov mus ntaus cov Npeeyamee thiab xuas ntaj tua tej neeg thiab tej tsiaj txhu thiab txhua yam uas lawv pom. Thiab txhua lub moos uas lawv mus txog lawv muab hlawv huvsi pov tseg.
Judges21:1 Cov Yixayee tau cog lus twv ntawm Mixapa tias
Judges21:2 Cov pejxeem kuj tuaj rau ntawm Npe‑ee nyob ntawm Vajtswv xubntiag ib hnub tsaus ntuj lawv tsa suab quaj heev kawg li.
Judges21:3 Lawv hais tias
Judges21:4 Tagkis tom qab cov pejxeem sawv ntxov ua ib lub thaj thiab ua kevcai hlawv huvsi xyeem thiab ua kevcai xyeem sib raug zoo.
Judges21:5 Cov Yixayee txawm hais tias
Judges21:6 Cov Yixayee khuvleej lawv tus kwv Npeeyamee lawv hais tias
Judges21:7 Peb yuav ua li cas nrhiav pojniam rau cov Npeeyamee uas tseem tshuav nyob
Judges21:8 Mas lawv hais tias
Judges21:9 Rau qhov thaum lawv txheeb cov pejxeem yeej tsis pom muaj cov Yanpe Kile‑a ib tug nyob ntawd kiag li.
Judges21:10 Ua li ntawd cov pejxeem thiaj tso cov tub rog uas siab loj siab tuab ib vam ob txhiab leej mus rau Yanpe Kile‑a mas hais rau lawv tias
Judges21:11 Nej yuav tsum ua li no
Judges21:12 Hauv cov neeg Yanpe Kile‑a ntawd lawv pom muaj plaub puas tus nkauj xwb uas tsis tau nrog txivneej pw li
Judges21:13 Cov pejxeem sawvdaws kuj xa xov mus rau cov Npeeyamee uas nyob ntawm lub pob tsuas Limoo thiab tshaj xo rau lawv tias rov sib raug zoo lawm.
Judges21:14 Thaum ntawd cov Npeeyamee thiaj rov los
Judges21:15 Cov pejxeem khuvleej cov Npeeyamee rau qhov Yawmsaub ua rau cov Yixayee ntais ib xeem lawm.
Judges21:16 Mas cov kev txwj laus hauv cov pejxeem thiaj hais tias
Judges21:17 Lawv hais tias
Judges21:18 Tiamsis peb muab tsis tau peb tej ntxhais qua rau lawv yuav rau qhov cov Yixayee tau cog lus twv tias
Judges21:19 Lawv thiaj hais tias
Judges21:20 Lawv thiaj hais rau cov Npeeyamee tias
Judges21:21 mas saib
Judges21:22 Thaum tej ntxhais ntawd leej txiv lossis tej kwvtij tuaj yws rau peb mas peb yuav hais rau lawv tias
Judges21:23 Cov Npeeyamee nyias taus nyias ua raws li lawv hais thiaj tau pojniam txhua
Judges21:24 Thaum ntawd cov Yixayee nyias thiaj rov qab mus rau hauv nyias cum nyias xeem nyias mus nyob nyias tebchaws uas yog nyias qub txeeg qub teg.
Judges21:25 Ncua sijhawm ntawd cov Yixayee tsis muaj vajntxwv
Ruth1:1 Thaum cov thawj tseem kav Yixayee tebchaws mas muaj kev tshaib nqhis hauv lub tebchaws ib zaug. Muaj ib tug yawg nyob hauv lub moos Npelehee hauv Yuda tebchaws txawm coj pojniam thiab ob tug tub tsiv mus nyob ib ntus rau hauv Mau‑a tebchaws.
Ruth1:2 Tus yawg ntawd npe hu ua Elimelej
Ruth1:3 Ces Na‑aumi tus txiv Elimelej txawm tuag lawm tseg nws thiab nws ob tug tub.
Ruth1:4 Ob tug tub ntawd kuj yuav tau Mau‑a cov ntxhais ua pojniam. Ib tug npe hu ua Aupa
Ruth1:5 Ces Maloo thiab Khili‑oo ob tug txawm tuag lawm
