Jeremiah10:1 Ib tsoom Yixayee 'e
Jeremiah10:2 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah10:3 rau qhov ib tsoom neeg tej kab ke yog cuav xwb. Lawv txiav ib tug ntoo tom hav zoov los thiab tus Kws ntoo txhais tes xuas taus txua.
Jeremiah10:4 Luag muab nyiaj muab kub los luam rau
Jeremiah10:5 Lawv tej dab mlom kuj tsuas zoo ib yam nkaus li tej moj zeej hem noog hauv daim teb dib xwb
Jeremiah10:6 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah10:7 Ib tsoom tebchaws tus vajntxwv 'e
Jeremiah10:8 Lawv sawvdaws tsis thoob tsib thiab ruam
Jeremiah10:9 Luag thauj tej nyiaj uas ntaus tau lawm tuaj ntawm lub moos Thasi tuaj thiab coj kub ntawm lub moos Ufa tuaj. Tej dab mlom ntawd yog cov Kws txawj tes haujlwm thiab yog cov Kws txawj ntaus kub txhais tes ua. Tej ntaub uas muab kauv tej dab mlom ntawd yog ntaub xiav thiab ntaub tsamxem
Jeremiah10:10 Tiamsis Yawmsaub yog tus Vajtswv uas tseeb tiag
Jeremiah10:11 Koj yuav hais li no rau lawv tias
Jeremiah10:12 Yawmsaub yog tus uas siv nws lub hwjchim tsim lub ntiajteb
Jeremiah10:13 Thaum nws tsa nws lub suab hu
Jeremiah10:14 Txhua tus neeg tsis thoob tsib thiab tsis paub qabhau. Txhua tus Kws ntaus kub yuav txaj muag vim tej dab mlom uas nws ua
Jeremiah10:15 Tej dab mlom ntawd tsis muaj qabhau kiag li
Jeremiah10:16 Tus uas yog Yakhauj li Vajtswv tsis thooj li tej dab mlom ntawd
Jeremiah10:17 Nej cov uas raug luag muab vij tag lawm 'e
Jeremiah10:18 Rau qhov Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah10:19 Kuv raug txom nyem lauj vim yog kuv txojkev mob! Kuv tej qhov txhab kuj mob heev kawg
Jeremiah10:20 Kuv lub tsev ntaub kuj raug puam tsuaj
Jeremiah10:21 Cov uas yug yaj kuj tsis thoob tsib thiab tsis ua nug rau Yawmsaub
Jeremiah10:22 Cia li mloog
Jeremiah10:23 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah10:24 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah10:25 Thov koj nchuav koj txojkev npau taws rau saum cov tebchaws uas tsis paub koj
Jeremiah11:1 Tej lus uas Yawmsaub hais tuaj rau Yelemi.
Jeremiah11:2 “Koj cia li mloog tej lus cog tseg no thiab hais rau cov Yuda thiab cov uas nyob hauv Yeluxalees.
Jeremiah11:3 Koj cia li hais rau lawv tias
Jeremiah11:4 yog tej lus cog tseg uas kuv twb hais rau nej tej poj koob yawm txwv rau thaum kuv coj lawv tawm hauv Iyi tebchaws los
Jeremiah11:5 kom kuv thiaj ua tau tiav raws li tej lus uas kuv cog tseg khov kho rau nej tej poj koob yawm txwv tias yuav muab lub tebchaws uas muaj kua mis thiab zib ntab ntws nto rau lawv
Jeremiah11:6 Mas Yawmsaub thiaj hais rau kuv tias
Jeremiah11:7 Kuv twb ntuas nej tej poj koob yawm txwv rau thaum kuv coj lawv tawm hauv Iyi tebchaws los
Jeremiah11:8 Txawm li ntawd los lawv tsis mloog lus tsis tig ntsej mloog
Jeremiah11:9 Thiab Yawmsaub hais rau kuv tias
Jeremiah11:10 Lawv twb thim rov qab mus ua lawv tej poj koob yawm txwv tej kev txhaum txim
Jeremiah11:11 Vim li ntawd
Jeremiah11:12 Mas tej moos hauv Yuda thiab cov uas nyob hauv Yeluxalees yuav mus quaj thov tej dab uas lawv hlawv xyab teev
Jeremiah11:13 Yuda 'e
Jeremiah11:14 “Vim li no koj tsis txhob thov kuv pab haiv neeg no
Jeremiah11:15 Tus uas kuv hlub thaum nws ua kev phem kev qias lawm muaj feem dabtsi rau hauv kuv lub tuam tsev? Nws tej lus yeem tseg thiab tej tsiaj uas tua xyeem yuav tshem tau nws lub khuab lov? Yog zoo li no lawm nej tseem yuav xyiv fab thiab lov?
Jeremiah11:16 Yawmsaub twb txeev hu koj hais tias
Jeremiah11:17 Yawmsaub tus muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus uas cog koj
Jeremiah11:18 Yawmsaub qhia tej uas lawv ntaus tswvyim rau kuv
Jeremiah11:19 Kuv zoo yam li tus menyuam yaj seej seej uas raug coj mus tua. Kuv tsis paub tias lawv ntaus tswvyim txov kuv ntag
Jeremiah11:20 Au Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus
Jeremiah11:21 Vim li no
Jeremiah11:22 Vim li no Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais li no tias
Jeremiah11:23 Yuav tsis tshuav ib tug li
Jeremiah12:1 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah12:2 Koj cog lawv
Jeremiah12:3 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah12:4 Lub tebchaws yuav quaj ntsuag mus ntev li cas thiab tej nyom hauv txhua daim teb yuav qhuav tag mus ntev li cas? Vim cov uas nyob hauv lub tebchaws ntawd tej kev limhiam mas tej tsiaj txhu thiab tej nas noog thiaj yuav raug muab kuav hlo mus
Jeremiah12:5 “Yog koj nrog neeg sib tw dhia es lawv twb ua rau koj txog siav lawm
Jeremiah12:6 Txawm yog koj tej kwvtij
Jeremiah12:7 “Kuv tso kuv tsev neeg tseg
Jeremiah12:8 Kuv tej qub txeeg qub teg txia zoo li ib tug tsov ntxhuav tom hav zoov rau kuv
Jeremiah12:9 Kuv tej qub txeeg qub teg zoo yam li tus dav txho uas muaj tej dav nyob vij nws ntaus nws lov? Cia li mus hu tej tsiaj qus huvsi tuaj ua ke
Jeremiah12:10 Cov uas yug yaj muaj ntau leej tau ua kom kuv lub vaj txiv hmab puam tsuaj tag. Lawv tau muab tej uas yog kuv li feem tsuj tag
Jeremiah12:11 Lawv muab kuv li feem ua nyob do cuas cia. Thaum nyob do cuas lawm kuj quaj ntsuag rau kuv
Jeremiah12:12 Cov uas ua kom puam tsuaj twb tuaj txog saum tej roob do hau hauv ntuj nrag teb do
Jeremiah12:13 Kuv cov neeg cog mog
Jeremiah12:14 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah12:15 Tom qab uas kuv muab lawv dob mus tag lawm
Jeremiah12:16 Thiab yuav muaj li no
Jeremiah12:17 Tiamsis yog lub tebchaws twg tsis mloog
Jeremiah13:1 Yawmsaub hais li no rau kuv tias
Jeremiah13:2 Kuv thiaj yuav ib txoj siv sia raws li Yawmsaub hais
Jeremiah13:3 Mas Yawmsaub hais dua zaum ob tuaj rau kuv tias
Jeremiah13:4 “Cia li coj txoj siv uas koj yuav los sia ntawm koj lub duav
Jeremiah13:5 Kuv kuj mus thiab muab zais rau ntawm ntug dej Yufeti raws li Yawmsaub tau qhia rau kuv.
Jeremiah13:6 Dhau ntau hnub lawm
Jeremiah13:7 Ces kuv thiaj li mus rau ntawm tus dej Yufeti
Jeremiah13:8 Ces Yawmsaub thiaj hais tuaj rau kuv tias
Jeremiah13:9 “Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah13:10 Haiv neeg phem no uas tsis yeem mloog kuv tej lus thiab tawv ncauj ua raws li lawv lub siab thiab mus raws ncuj nciav ua koom pe luag tej dab
Jeremiah13:11 Rau qhov txoj siv sia ntawm neeg lub duav li cas
Jeremiah13:12 “Koj cia li hais tej lus no rau lawv
Jeremiah13:13 Mas koj yuav hais rau lawv tias
Jeremiah13:14 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah13:15 Nej cia li mloog
Jeremiah13:16 Cia li ua rau Yawmsaub uas yog nej tus Vajtswv tau koob meej ua ntej uas nws yuav coj kev tsaus ntuj los
Jeremiah13:17 Tiamsis yog nej tsis mloog
Jeremiah13:18 Cia li hais rau vajntxwv thiab nws niam hais tias
Jeremiah13:19 Tej moos hauv Neke raug muab kaw lawm tsis muaj leejtwg qheb tau. Yuda raug ntes coj mus poob tebchaws huvsi lawm
Jeremiah13:20 Cia li tsa koj lub qhov muag saib lawv cov uas tuaj sab ped tuaj. Pab yaj uas muab cob rau koj lawm nyob qhovtwg
Jeremiah13:21 Thaum lawv tsa cov neeg uas koj tau qhia kom nrog koj sib raug zoo ua loj kav koj
Jeremiah13:22 Yog koj hais rau hauv koj lub siab tias
Jeremiah13:23 Tus neeg Khuj hloov tau nws daim tawv dub lossis tsov pom txwv hloov tau daim tawv txaij lov? Yog tau
Jeremiah13:24 “Kuv yuav ua rau nej tawg ua sab ua sua zoo yam nkaus li tej npluag qoob uas raug cua hauv ntuj nrag teb do ntsawj ya mus.
Jeremiah13:25 No yog koj li feem
Jeremiah13:26 “Vim li no kuv yuav muab koj daim tiab yaws npog koj lub ntsej muag ua kom pom koj kev txaj muag.
Jeremiah13:27 Kuv twb pom koj tej kev qias vuab tsuab
Jeremiah14:1 No yog tej lus uas Yawmsaub hais tuaj rau Yelemi txog qhov uas ntuj qhua teb nkig.
Jeremiah14:2 “Yuda quaj ntsuag
Jeremiah14:3 Cov uas ua hlob txib lawv cov tub qhe mus nqa dej
Jeremiah14:4 Cov av qhuav tawg pleb vim tsis muaj nag los rau saum lub tebchaws
Jeremiah14:5 Tus maum muas lwj uas nyob hauv hav zoov kuj tso nws tus menyuam tseg vim tsis muaj zaub.
Jeremiah14:6 Tej nees luav qus kuj sawv saum tej roob do hau
Jeremiah14:7 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah14:8 Au koj uas yog cov Yixayee lub chaw vam
Jeremiah14:9 Ua cas koj yuav zoo li ib tug neeg uas nyob hab nuv
Jeremiah14:10 Yawmsaub hais li no txog haiv neeg no tias
Jeremiah14:11 Yawmsaub hais rau kuv tias
Jeremiah14:12 Txawm yog lawv yoo mov los kuv yuav tsis mloog lawv lub suab thov. Txawm yog lawv ua kevcai hlawv xyeem thiab ua kevcai xyeem qoob loo los kuv yuav tsis txais. Kuv yuav xuas ntaj xuas kev tshaib nqhis thiab mob kis muab lawv ua puam tsuaj.”
Jeremiah14:13 Mas kuv hais tias
Jeremiah14:14 Yawmsaub hais rau kuv tias
Jeremiah14:15 Vim li no Yawmsaub thiaj hais txog cov xibhwb cev lus li no tias
Jeremiah14:16 Thiab cov neeg uas mloog tej lus uas lawv cev ntawd yuav tuag rau hniav ntaj hniav riam thiab tuag tshaib tuag nqhis
Jeremiah14:17 “Koj cia li hais tej lus no rau lawv
Jeremiah14:18 Yog kuv tawm mus tom teb
Jeremiah14:19 Koj tau muab Yuda tso tseg tag huvsi lawm lov? Koj lub siab ntxub Xi‑oo heev lov? Ua cas koj nplawm peb tsis muaj kev kho kom peb zoo kiag li? Peb nrhiav kev thaj yeeb tiamsis tsis tau qhov zoo kiag li. Peb nrhiav sijhawm kho kom zoo tiamsis tsuas yog muaj kev txhawj ntshai xwb.
Jeremiah14:20 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah14:21 Vim saib rau koj lub npe
Jeremiah14:22 Ib tsoom tebchaws tej dab mlom cuav muaj ib tug twg ua tau nag los? Lossis lub ntuj ua tau nag los thiab lov? Au Yawmsaub uas yog peb tus Vajtswv
Jeremiah15:1 Yawmsaub hais rau kuv tias
Jeremiah15:2 Mas thaum lawv nug koj tias
Jeremiah15:3 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah15:4 Kuv yuav ua rau lawv ua lub chaw uas ib tsoom tebchaws hauv ntiajteb huvsi ceeb thiab ntshai vim tej uas Hexekhiya tus tub Manaxe uas yog Yuda tus vajntxwv tau ua rau hauv Yeluxalee.”
Jeremiah15:5 “Yeluxalees 'e
Jeremiah15:6 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah15:7 Kuv twb xuas ntxuam ntxuaj lawv ntawm tej rooj loog hauv lub tebchaws no Kuv ua rau lawv tej menyuam tuag
Jeremiah15:8 Kuv ua rau lawv cov poj ntsuam coob dua tej xuab zeb ntawm hiavtxwv. Thaum tav su kuv coj tus uas ua kom puam tsuaj tuaj txog cov tub hluas leej niam. Ib pliag ntshis xwb kuv ua kom kev lwj siab kev txhawj kev ntshai poob rau saum lawv.
Jeremiah15:9 Tus uas muaj xya tus menyuam nws kuj qaug zog tag
Jeremiah15:10 Kuv niam
Jeremiah15:11 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah15:12 Muaj leejtwg lov tau hlau
Jeremiah15:13 Nej tej nyiaj txiag cuab txhiaj cuab tam kuv yuav pub rau luag txeeb tau tsis yuav nqe
Jeremiah15:14 Kuv yuav ua rau nej mus ua nej cov yeeb ncuab qhev rau hauv l ub tebchaws uas nej tsis tau paub dua li
Jeremiah15:15 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah15:16 Thaum uas ntsib koj tej lus lawm kuv cia li muab noj kiag
Jeremiah15:17 Kuv tsis nrog cov neeg uas ua lomzem zaum ua ke thiab kuv tsis nrog lawv zoo siab. Kuv nyob tib leeg xwb
Jeremiah15:18 Ua li cas kuv tej kev mob tseem mob tsis tu ncua li
Jeremiah15:19 Vim li no Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah15:20 Kuv yuav muab koj ua lub ntsa loog tooj liab uas ruaj khov rau haiv neeg no. Lawv yuav tawm tsam koj tiamsis lawv kov tsis yeej koj
Jeremiah15:21 “Kuv yuav cawm koj dim hauv cov neeg limhiam txhais tes thiab txhiv koj hauv cov neeg ua nruj ua tsiv txhais tes.”
Jeremiah16:1 Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau kuv tias
Jeremiah16:2 “Koj tsis txhob yuav pojniam
Jeremiah16:3 Rau qhov Yawmsaub hais li no txog tej tub tej ntxhais uas yug ntawm lub chaw no thiab hais txog cov niam cov txiv uas yug lawv hauv lub tebchaws no tias
Jeremiah16:4 “Lawv yuav tuag rau tej mob phem. Yuav tsis muaj leejtwg quaj ntsuag lawv thiab muab lawv log. Lawv yuav zoo yam li tej quav tsiaj txhu nyob saum npoo av. Lawv yuav puam tsuaj vim raug hniav ntaj hniav riam thiab kev tshaib nqhis. Thiab tej liaj dav saum nruab ntug thiab tej tsiaj qus hauv ntiajteb yuav noj lawv tej cev tuag.”
Jeremiah16:5 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah16:6 “Cov uas ua hlob thiab cov yau yuav tuag tag rau hauv lub tebchaws no. Yuav tsis muaj leejtwg muab lawv log tsis muaj leejtwg quaj ntsuag lawv thiab chais plaubhau thiab muab lub cev suam xyom cov tuag.
Jeremiah16:7 Tsis muaj leejtwg ntais ib qho ncuav nplij tsev xyom cuab lub siab uas muaj tus tuag. Thiab tsis muaj leejtwg muab ib khob rau lawv haus nplij lawv lub siab vim lawv niam lawv txiv tuag.
Jeremiah16:8 Koj tsis txhob mus zaum nrog lawv noj lawv haus hauv lub tsev uas pam noj pam haus.
Jeremiah16:9 Rau qhov
Jeremiah16:10 “Thaum koj hais tej lus no huvsi rau haiv neeg no
Jeremiah16:11 Ces koj hais rau lawv tias
Jeremiah16:12 thiab vim yog nej ua phem heev dua nej tej poj koob yawm txwv
Jeremiah16:13 Vim li no kuv yuav muab nej laim tawm hauv lub tebchaws no mus rau lub tebchaws uas nej thiab nej tej poj koob yawm txwv tsis tau paub dua
Jeremiah16:14 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah16:15 tiamsis yuav hais tias
Jeremiah16:16 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah16:17 Kuv lub qhov muag ntsia ntsoov tej uas lawv ua huvsi
Jeremiah16:18 Kuv yuav ua pauj lawv tej kev txhaum txim ob npaug
Jeremiah16:19 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah16:20 Neeg yuav tsim tej timtswv rau nws tau lov? Tej uas zoo li ntawd tsis yog timtswv.”
Jeremiah16:21 “Vim li no
Jeremiah17:1 “Yuda lub txim yog muab tus cwjmem hlau sau cia
Jeremiah17:2 Lawv tej tub ki kuj nco txog lawv tej thaj teev dab thiab lawv tej ncej dab Asela uas nyob ntawm txhua tsob ntoo ntsuab thiab saum tej pov roob siab
Jeremiah17:3 thiab saum tej roob tom tej plawv tiaj. Kuv yuav muab koj tej nyiaj txiag cuab txhiaj cuab tam rau luag txeeb mus
Jeremiah17:4 Koj yuav tsum tso koj txhais tes uas tuav tej qub txeeg qub teg uas kuv muab rau koj
Jeremiah17:5 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah17:6 Nws zoo li tsob nyuag ntoo uas nyob hauv ntuj nrag teb do
Jeremiah17:7 Tus uas tso siab rau Yawmsaub yeej tau nyob kaj siab lug
Jeremiah17:8 Nws zoo ib yam li tsob ntoo uas cog ntawm ntug dej
Jeremiah17:9 Lub siab yog tus uas dag ntxias heev dua lwm yam huvsi
Jeremiah17:10 Kuv yog Yawmsaub uas tshuaj saib tej uas neeg xav thiab sim lub siab
Jeremiah17:11 Yam nkaus li tus ws uas sau tej menyuam uas tsis yog nws puag qe daug
Jeremiah17:12 Peb lub chaw pe Yawmsaub yog lub zwm txwv ci ntsa iab uas tsim rau saum lub chaw siab thaum chiv keeb los lawm.
Jeremiah17:13 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah17:14 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah17:15 Saib maj
Jeremiah17:16 Kuv tsis tau txhib kom koj tso xwm txheej phem los
Jeremiah17:17 Thov tsis txhob ua rau kuv ntshai ceeb nkaus
Jeremiah17:18 Cov uas tsim txom kuv cia lawv raug kev txaj muag
Jeremiah17:19 Yawmsaub hais li no rau kuv tias
Jeremiah17:20 mas hais tias
Jeremiah17:21 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah17:22 Tsis txhob ris lub nra dabtsi tawm hauv nej lub tsev lossis ua ib yam haujlwm dabtsi rau hnub Xanpatau
Jeremiah17:23 Txawm li ntawd los lawv tsis mloog thiab tsis tig ntsej mloog
Jeremiah17:24 “Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah17:25 mas yuav muaj vajntxwv uas nyob saum Davi lub zwm txwv thiab lawv cov thawj caij tsheb ua rog thiab caij nees nkag tej rooj loog nkag rau hauv lub nroog no
Jeremiah17:26 Mas tej pejxeem yuav tuaj hauv Yuda tej moos thiab hauv tej chaw uas nyob ib ncig Yeluxalees
Jeremiah17:27 Tiamsis yog nej tsis mloog kuv lus es hwm hnub Xanpatau ua hnub uas dawb huv thiab tseg qhov uas ris nra nkag tej rooj loog los rau hauv Yeluxalees rau hnub Xanpatau
Jeremiah18:1 Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah18:2 “Cia li sawv tsees mus rau ntawm tus Kws puab laujkaub av lub tsev
Jeremiah18:3 Kuv txawm nqes mus rau ntawm tus Kws puab laujkaub av lub tsev
Jeremiah18:4 Mas lub laujkaub av uas nws tabtom puab ntawd txawm piam rau hauv tus Kws puab laujkaub txhais tes
Jeremiah18:5 Ces Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau kuv tias
Jeremiah18:6 “Cov Yixayee 'e
Jeremiah18:7 Thaum twg kuj xij kuv tshaj tawm txog haiv neeg twg lossis lub tebchaws twg hais tias kuv yuav muab dob thiab muab rhuav tshem thiab ua kom puam tsuaj
Jeremiah18:8 yog tias haiv neeg uas kuv tau hais txog ntawd tig ntawm lawv txojkev phem
Jeremiah18:9 Thiab thaum twg kuj xij kuv tshaj tawm txog haiv neeg twg lossis lub tebchaws twg hais tias kuv yuav tsim tsa thiab muab cog cia
Jeremiah18:10 yog tias haiv neeg ntawd ua tej uas kuv pom tias phem kawg tsis mloog kuv tej lus
Jeremiah18:11 Vim li no
Jeremiah18:12 “Tiamsis lawv hais tias
Jeremiah18:13 Vim li ntawd Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah18:14 Tej daus xib daus npu saum lub roob Lenpanoo yuav ploj ntawm tej pob tsuas Xili‑oo lov? Tej dej saum roob yuav qhuav lov
Jeremiah18:15 Tiamsis kuv haiv neeg tsis nco qab kuv lawm
Jeremiah18:16 ua rau lawv lub tebchaws ua chaw ceeb thiab ntshai
Jeremiah18:17 Kuv yuav ua kom lawv tawg ri sua mus ntawm lawv cov yeeb ncuab hauv ntej yam li raug cua ntsawj sab hnub tuaj. Hnub uas lawv raug xwm txheej phem ntawd kuv yuav tig nrob qaum rau lawv tsis tig xubntiag.”
Jeremiah18:18 Lawv txawm hais tias
Jeremiah18:19 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah18:20 Tsim nyog ua kev phem pauj kev zoo lov? Lawv kuj tseem khawb qhov taub txov kuv txojsia. Thov nco txog tias kuv sawv ntsug rau ntawm koj xubntiag pab lawv thov thiab thov koj thim koj txojkev npau taws ntawm lawv.
Jeremiah18:21 Vim li no thov koj muab lawv tej menyuam cob rau kev tshaib nqhis
Jeremiah18:22 Thov cia hnov lub suab quaj qw hauv lawv tej tsev rau thaum koj coj tub rog tuaj lws lawv tamsid
Jeremiah18:23 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah19:1 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah19:2 mus rau hauv lub hav Npeehinoo ncaj txojkev uas nkag lub Rooj Loog Txhais Laujkaub thiab piav tej lus uas kuv hais rau koj rau lawv mloog qhov ntawd.
Jeremiah19:3 Koj yuav tsum hais tias
Jeremiah19:4 rau qhov cov neeg no tau tso kuv tseg thiab tau hlawv hmoov xyab xyeem rau luag tej dab uas lawv thiab lawv tej poj koob yawm txwv thiab Yuda tej vajntxwv tsis tau paub dua thiaj ua qias puas tsuas lub chaw no
Jeremiah19:5 thiab tib tej chaw siab teev dab Npa‑as thiab muab lawv tej tub hlawv xyeem rau Npa‑as
Jeremiah19:6 Vim li no Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah19:7 Kuv yuav ua rau tej uas Yuda thiab Yeluxalees npaj tseg lawd ploj tag rau ntawm lub chaw no
Jeremiah19:8 Kuv yuav muab lub nroog no ua lub chaw uas luag ceeb thiab ntshai thiab thuam. Txhua tus uas hla mus yuav ceeb thiab ntshai thiab yuav thuam vim yog qhov uas raug kev puam tsuaj tag.
Jeremiah19:9 Kuv yuav ua rau lawv noj lawv tej tub tej ntxhais li nqaij
Jeremiah19:10 “Ces koj cia li muab lub tais av tsoo tawg tag tab meeg cov neeg uas nrog koj mus ntawd
Jeremiah19:11 thiab hais rau lawv tias
Jeremiah19:12 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah19:13 Yeluxalees tej tsev thiab Yuda tej vajntxiv tej tsev
Jeremiah19:14 Ces Yelemi txawm tawm ntawm Thaufe uas Yawmsaub txib nws mus cev lus ntawd los. Nws mus sawv ntsug hauv Yawmsaub lub tshav puam tuam tsev
Jeremiah19:15 “Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus
Jeremiah20:1 Thaum tus pov thawj Pasaw uas yog Imaw uas ua thawj saib xyuas haujlwm hauv Yawmsaub lub tuam tsev tus tub hnov Yelemi cev Vajtswv tej lus no
Jeremiah20:2 Pasaw cia li ntaus Yelemi uas yog xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus thiab muab nws kotaw cuab rau hauv rab cuab ntawm lub rooj loog Npeeyamee uas yog lub sab ped uas mus rau hauv Yawmsaub lub tuam tsev.
Jeremiah20:3 Tagkis tom qab thaum Pasaw muab Yelemi tso dim hauv rab cuab
Jeremiah20:4 Rau qhov Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah20:5 Tsis tag li ntawd xwb
Jeremiah20:6 Pasaw
Jeremiah20:7 Au Yawmsaub
Jeremiah20:8 Kuv hais lus thaum twg
Jeremiah20:9 Yog kuv hais tias
Jeremiah20:10 Kuv hnov neeg coob kawg sib ntxhi tias
Jeremiah20:11 Tiamsis Yawmsaub nrog nraim kuv yam li tus tub rog uas txaus ntshai kawg
Jeremiah20:12 Au Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus
Jeremiah20:13 Cia li hu nkauj rau Yawmsaub. Cia li qhuas Yawmsaub
Jeremiah20:14 Cia hnub uas yug kuv raug foom tsis zoo. Cia hnub uas kuv niam yug kuv tsis txhob tau hmoov zoo.
Jeremiah20:15 Cia li foom tsis zoo rau tus uas xa xov rau kuv txiv hais tias
Jeremiah20:16 Thov cia tus ntawd zoo yam nkaus li tej moos uas Yawmsaub muab rhuav puam tsuaj tag tsis khuvleej li. Thov cia nws hnov lub suab quaj thaum tagkis thiab hnov lub suab txhib tub rog thaum tav su
Jeremiah20:17 rau qhov nws tsis muab kuv tua thaum nruab thiab
Jeremiah20:18 Ua cas kuv tawm hauv plab los
Jeremiah21:1 No yog tej lus uas Yawmsaub hais tuaj rau Yelemi
Jeremiah21:2 “Cia li thov nug Yawmsaub rau peb
Jeremiah21:3 Mas Yelemi hais rau ob tug tias
Jeremiah21:4 “Neb cia li hais li no rau Xedekhiya tias
Jeremiah21:5 Yog kuv ua rog rau nej ntag. Kuv yuav tsa hlo kuv txhais tes thiab siv kuv txhais npab uas muaj zog ntaus nej npau taws vog thiab chim heev thiab npau taws ceev.
Jeremiah21:6 Thiab kuv yuav ntaus cov uas nyob hauv lub nroog no
Jeremiah21:7 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah21:8 “Thiab koj yuav hais rau cov pejxeem tias
Jeremiah21:9 Tus uas nyob hauv lub nroog no yuav tuag hniav ntaj hniav riam thiab tuag tshaib tuag nqhis thiab tuag mob kis
Jeremiah21:10 Kuv tsom ntsoov ua xwm txheej phem rau lub nroog no tsis yog ua zoo. Lub nroog no yuav raug muab cob rau tus vajntxwv hauv Npanpiloo txhais tes mas nws yuav muab hlawv pov tseg.’ Yawmsaub hais li no ntag.”
Jeremiah21:11 “Cia li hais rau Yuda tus vajntxwv caj ces tias
Jeremiah21:12 Davi caj ces 'e
Jeremiah21:13 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah21:14 Kuv yuav rau txim rau nej raws li uas nej tau ua lawm. Kuv yuav zes taws rau nej lub hav zoov mas hluavtaws yuav kub txhua yam ib ncig ntawd huvsi.’ ” Yawmsaub hais li no ntag.
Jeremiah22:1 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah22:2 ‘Yuda tus vajntxwv uas nyob saum Davi lub zwm txwv 'e
Jeremiah22:3 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah22:4 Yog nej mloog tej lus no tiag tiag mas yuav muaj vajntxwv nyob saum Davi lub zwm txwv nkag tej rooj loog hauv lub tsev no
Jeremiah22:5 Tiamsis yog nej tsis mloog tej lus no
Jeremiah22:6 Yawmsaub hais li no txog Yuda tus vajntxwv lub tsev tias
Jeremiah22:7 Kuv yuav npaj cov uas ua kom puam tsuaj tuaj tawm tsam koj
Jeremiah22:8 “Thiab tej tebchaws coob yuav hla lub nroog no mus
Jeremiah22:9 Mas lawv yuav teb tias
Jeremiah22:10 Tsis txhob quaj tus vajntxwv uas tuag lawd
Jeremiah22:11 Yawmsaub hais li no txog Yauxiya tus tub Salu uas ua vajntxwv kav Yuda sawv nyob nws txiv Yauxiya chaw
Jeremiah22:12 Nws yuav tuag rau hauv lub chaw uas luag ntes nws coj mus nyob thiab nws yuav tsis pom lub tebchaws no dua li lawm.”
Jeremiah22:13 “Tus uas ua nws lub tsev los ntawm txojkev tsis ncaj ncees yuav raug txom nyem lauj! Nws ua txheej saud kuj tsis ua ncaj ua ncees thiab nws quab yuam kwvtij zej zog ua haujlwm dawb rau nws xwb tsis them nqe zog rau lawv li.
Jeremiah22:14 Nws hais tias
Jeremiah22:15 Koj xav tias qhov uas koj muab ntoo ciab ntau dua lwm tus li ua tsev yuav ua rau koj tau ua vajntxwv lov? Koj txiv kuj tau noj tau haus thiab txiav txim ncaj thiab ua ncaj ncees
Jeremiah22:16 Nws tu plaub rau tej pluag thiab tej txom nyem
Jeremiah22:17 “Tiamsis koj lub qhov muag lub siab lub ntsws tsuas yog xam pom qhov uas ua tsis ncaj es tau ntau xwb
Jeremiah22:18 Vim li no Yawmsaub hais li no txog Yauxiya tus tub Yehauyakhi uas yog Yuda tus vajntxwv tias
Jeremiah22:19 Yuav muab nws log ib yam li faus nees luav
Jeremiah22:20 “Yeluxalees
Jeremiah22:21 Thaum koj tseem vam meej kuv twb hais rau koj tiamsis koj hais tias
Jeremiah22:22 Cua yuav qhwv nkaus koj cov neeg yug yaj huvsi
Jeremiah22:23 Tus uas nyob hauv Lenpanoo 'e
Jeremiah22:24 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah22:25 thiab muab koj cob rau hauv cov uas txov koj txojsia txhais tes
Jeremiah22:26 Kuv yuav muab koj thiab koj niam uas yug koj laim mus rau lwm lub tebchaws uas tsis yog yug neb
Jeremiah22:27 Tiamsis lub tebchaws uas lawv xav xav rov qab los nyob ntawd
Jeremiah22:28 Tus txivneej Khauniya no yog lub laujkaub uas luag saib tsis taus thiab tawg lawm
Jeremiah22:29 Tebchaws 'e
Jeremiah22:30 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah23:1 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah23:2 Vim li no
Jeremiah23:3 “Mas kuv yuav sau kuv pab yaj uas tseem tshuav nyob tawm hauv txhua lub tebchaws uas kuv ntiab lawv mus nyob rov qab los
Jeremiah23:4 Kuv yuav tsa cov yug yaj los kav lawv yog cov uas mob siab saib xyuas lawv thiab lawv yuav tsis ntshai li lawm
Jeremiah23:5 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah23:6 Thaum nws ua vajntxwv kav
Jeremiah23:7 Vim li no Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah23:8 tiamsis yuav hais tias
Jeremiah23:9 Tej lus hais txog cov xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus. Kuv siab ntsws puas tag
Jeremiah23:10 Cov uas ua nkauj ua nraug muaj puv nkaus hauv lub tebchaws. Vim tej lus uas Yawmsaub foom tsis zoo lub tebchaws thiaj quaj ntsuag
Jeremiah23:11 “Txawm yog cov xibhwb cev kuv lus thiab cov pov thawj los kuj tsis hwm kuv
Jeremiah23:12 “Vim li ntawd mas lawv txojkev yuav zoo yam li txojkev nplua rau thaum tsaus ntuj
Jeremiah23:13 “Cov xibhwb cev kuv lus hauv Xamali mas kuv pom muaj kev phem kev qias. Lawv tuav dab Npa‑as lub npe cev lus thiab ua rau kuv cov neeg Yixayee yuam kev.
Jeremiah23:14 Tiamsis cov xibhwb cev kuv lus hauv Yeluxalees mas kuv pom muaj tej uas ntxim ntxub kawg li. Lawv ua nkauj ua nraug
Jeremiah23:15 Vim li no Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais li no txog cov xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus tias
Jeremiah23:16 Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais li no tias
Jeremiah23:17 Lawv hais tsis tu rau cov uas saib tsis taus Yawmsaub tej lus tias
Jeremiah23:18 “Cov xibhwb ntawd muaj tus twg tau sawv hauv cov neeg uas nrog Yawmsaub sablaj es pom thiab hnov Yawmsaub tej lus
Jeremiah23:19 Saib maj
Jeremiah23:20 Yawmsaub txojkev chim yuav tsis thim rov qab mus txog thaum nws ua kom tiav raws li nws lub siab xav tseg lawm. Yav tom hauv ntej nej yuav nkag siab zaj no meej.
Jeremiah23:21 Kuv twb tsis txib cov xibhwb cev lus ntawd mus
Jeremiah23:22 Yog lawv tau sawv hauv cov neeg uas nrog kuv sablaj mas lawv twb cev kuv tej lus rau kuv cov neeg
Jeremiah23:23 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah23:24 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah23:25 Kuv twb hnov cov xibhwb uas tuav kuv lub npe cev lus dag
Jeremiah23:26 Tej lus dag yuav nyob hauv cov xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus lub siab mus ntev li cas? Lawv pheej cev lus dag raws li lawv lub siab dag ntxias.
Jeremiah23:27 Lawv pheej xav hais tias muab tej uas lawv ua npau suav pom piav ib leeg dhau ib leeg es yuav ua rau kuv cov neeg tsis nco qab kuv lub npe
Jeremiah23:28 Cia cov xibhwb uas ua npau suav piav lawv tej npau suav
Jeremiah23:29 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah23:30 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah23:31 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah23:32 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah23:33 “Thaum muaj tus pejxeem twg lossis xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus twg lossis tus pov thawj twg nug koj hais tias
Jeremiah23:34 Yog cov xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus thiab cov pov thawj thiab cov pejxeem tus twg lam hais tias
Jeremiah23:35 Nej yuav tsum hais li no txhua tus nyias hais rau nyias tej phoojywg thiab nyias hais rau nyias tej kwvtij tias
Jeremiah23:36 Nej tsis txhob lam mus hais txog ‘Yawmsaub lub nra
Jeremiah23:37 Nej yuav tsum hais li no rau cov xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus tias
Jeremiah23:38 Tiamsis yog nej cov xibhwb lam hais tias
Jeremiah23:39 Vim li no
Jeremiah23:40 Thiab kuv yuav cia nej raug txaj muag ib txhis thiab raug thuam mus ib txhis li
Jeremiah24:1 Thaum vajntxwv Nenpukhanexa hauv Npanpiloo twb ntes Yehauyakhi tus tub Yekhauniya uas ua Yuda tus vajntxwv coj tawm hauv Yeluxalees ua ke nrog Yuda cov thawj thiab tej Kws txawj txhua yam thiab tej Kws tooj Kws hlau
Jeremiah24:2 Ib lub tawb muaj cov txiv cev uas zoo heev ib yam li cov txiv cev uas siav thawj phaum
Jeremiah24:3 Mas Yawmsaub hais rau kuv tias
Jeremiah24:4 Mas Yawmsaub hais tuaj rau kuv tias
Jeremiah24:5 “Yawmsaub uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais li no tias
Jeremiah24:6 Kuv yuav saib xyuas lawv kom lawv tau zoo
Jeremiah24:7 Kuv yuav pub lawv muaj lub siab uas xav paub tias kuv yog Yawmsaub. Lawv yuav ua kuv haiv neeg
Jeremiah24:8 “Thiab Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah24:9 Kuv yuav ua rau lawv ua lub chaw uas ib tsoom tebchaws hauv ntiajteb sawvdaws ceeb thiab ntshai
Jeremiah24:10 Kuv yuav tso hniav ntaj hniav riam thiab kev tshaib nqhis thiab mob kis los raug lawv mus txog thaum lawv puam tsuaj tag huvsi hauv lub tebchaws uas kuv muab pub rau lawv thiab lawv tej poj koob yawm txwv.’ ”
Jeremiah25:1 Tej lus uas hais tuaj rau Yelemi ntsig txog cov neeg Yuda sawvdaws yog xyoo plaub uas Yauxiya tus tub Yehauyakhi ua vajntxwv kav Yuda. Xyoo ntawd yog thawj xyoo uas Nenpukhanexa ua vajntxwv hauv Npanpiloo.
Jeremiah25:2 Mas Yelemi uas ua xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus hais tej lus ntawd rau cov neeg Yuda sawvdaws thiab cov uas nyob hauv Yeluxalees sawvdaws tias
Jeremiah25:3 “Yawmsaub hais nws tej lus rau kuv tau nees nkaum peb xyoos lawm
Jeremiah25:4 Txawm yog Yawmsaub txib nws cov tub qhe uas yog xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus sawvdaws los rau nej tsis tu ncua li
Jeremiah25:5 Lawv hais tias
Jeremiah25:6 Tsis txhob mus raws ncuj nciav luag tej dab thiab txhob ua koom txhob pe tej dab ntawd
Jeremiah25:7 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah25:8 Vim li no Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais li no tias
Jeremiah25:9 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah25:10 Tsis yog li ntawd xwb
Jeremiah25:11 Tag nrho lub tebchaws no yuav pob tag thiab liamsim tag
Jeremiah25:12 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah25:13 Kuv yuav tso txhua yam uas kuv twb hais tseg tawm tsam lub tebchaws ntawd lawm
Jeremiah25:14 Txawm yog cov Npanpiloo los yuav muaj ntau lub tebchaws thiab tej vajntxwv loj yuav muab lawv ua qhev. Kuv yuav ua pauj rau lawv raws li lawv tej haujlwm thiab raws li tej uas lawv txhais tes ua.”
Jeremiah25:15 Yawmsaub uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais li no rau kuv tias
Jeremiah25:16 Lawv yuav haus thiab qaug yoj yuj yees tsis meej pem vim yog rab ntaj uas kuv xa mus rau hauv lawv nruab nrab.”
Jeremiah25:17 Mas kuv thiaj txais lub khob ntawm Yawmsaub txhais tes thiab yuam txhua lub tebchaws uas Yawmsaub txib kuv mus ntawd haus.
Jeremiah25:18 Yeluxalees thiab Yuda tej moos thiab tej vajntxwv thiab cov thawj hauv Yuda kuj haus ua rau lawv piam tag nyob do cuas
Jeremiah25:19 Iyi tus vajntxwv Falau thiab nws cov tub teg tub taws thiab nws cov thawj thiab nws cov pejxeem sawvdaws
Jeremiah25:20 thiab lwm haiv neeg uas nrog lawv nyob sawvdaws kuj haus. Tej vajntxwv hauv tebchaws Us txhua tus thiab tej vajntxwv hauv tebchaws Filixatee txhua tus kuj haus
Jeremiah25:21 Edoo
Jeremiah25:22 Cov vajntxwv hauv lub nroog Thailab txhua tus thiab cov vajntxwv hauv lub moos Xaidoo txhua tus thiab cov vajntxwv raws ntug dej hiavtxwv sab tid txhua tus kuj haus.
Jeremiah25:23 Lub moos Dedas
Jeremiah25:24 Cov vajntxwv hauv Alanpia txhua tus thiab cov vajntxwv txhua tus uas kav ntau haiv neeg uas nyob hauv ntuj nrag teb do kuj haus.
Jeremiah25:25 Cov vajntxwv hauv lub moos Xili thiab hauv lub moos Elas thiab hauv tebchaws Midia txhua tus puavleej haus.
Jeremiah25:26 Thiab cov vajntxwv uas nyob sab ped
Jeremiah25:27 “Mas koj hais li no rau lawv tias
Jeremiah25:28 Yog lawv tsis kam txais lub khob ntawm koj txhais tes mus haus
Jeremiah25:29 Saib maj
Jeremiah25:30 “Vim li no koj yuav tsum cev tej lus no huvsi tawm tsam lawv
Jeremiah25:31 Lub suab yuav nrov ntxhe mus thoob qab ntuj kawg
Jeremiah25:32 Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais li no tias
Jeremiah25:33 Cov uas Yawmsaub tua rau hnub ntawd yuav muaj thoob plaws sab ntuj no mus txog sab ntuj tim ub. Lawv cov ntawd tsis muaj leejtwg yuav quaj ntsuag lossis muab sau coj mus log. Lawv yuav zoo li quav tsiaj txhu saum npoo av.
Jeremiah25:34 Nej cov uas yug yaj
Jeremiah25:35 Cov uas yug yaj tsis tau kev khiav thiab cov tswv yaj tsis muaj kev dim.
Jeremiah25:36 Cia li mloog cov yug yaj lub suab quaj thiab cov tswv yaj lub suab quaj nyiav
Jeremiah25:37 Tej nkuaj yaj uas nyob thaj yeeb kuj puam tsuaj tag vim yog qhov uas Yawmsaub chim heev.
Jeremiah25:38 Yawmsaub tawm hauv nws lub chaw yam nkaus li tus tsov ntxhuav
Jeremiah26:1 Thaum Yehauyakhi uas yog Yauxiya tus tub pib ua vajntxwv kav Yuda tebchaws
Jeremiah26:2 “Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah26:3 Tej zaum lawv yuav mloog thiab txhua tus yuav tig ntawm lawv txojkev phem rov los
Jeremiah26:4 Koj yuav tsum hais rau lawv tias
Jeremiah26:5 thiab tsis quav ntsej kuv cov tub qhe tej lus
Jeremiah26:6 mas kuv yuav ua rau lub tuam tsev no zoo yam nkaus li lub moos Silau
Jeremiah26:7 Cov pov thawj thiab cov xibhwb cev lus thiab cov pejxeem sawvdaws tau hnov Yelemi hais tej lus no hauv Yawmsaub lub tuam tsev.
Jeremiah26:8 Thaum Yelemi hais tej lus huvsi uas Yawmsaub kom nws hais rau cov neeg sawvdaws xaus nkaus
Jeremiah26:9 Ua cas koj yuav tuav Yawmsaub lub npe cev lus tias
Jeremiah26:10 Thaum Yuda cov thawj hnov tej xwm txheej no
Jeremiah26:11 Mas cov pov thawj thiab cov xibhwb cev lus hais rau cov thawj thiab rau cov neeg sawvdaws tias
Jeremiah26:12 Yelemi thiaj hais rau cov thawj sawvdaws thiab hais rau cov neeg sawvdaws tias
Jeremiah26:13 Vim li no
Jeremiah26:14 Kuv mas kuv nyob hauv nej txhais tes lawm. Nej cia li ua rau kuv raws li nej pom zoo thiab raug cai.
Jeremiah26:15 Nej cia li paub tseeb tias yog nej muab kuv tua pov tseg
Jeremiah26:16 Cov thawj thiab cov neeg sawvdaws txawm hais rau cov pov thawj thiab cov xibhwb cev lus tias
Jeremiah26:17 Muaj cov kev txwj laus hauv lub tebchaws qee leej sawv tsees hais rau cov neeg uas tuaj txoos ua ke ntawd tias
Jeremiah26:18 “Mikha uas yog neeg hauv moos Maulese tau cev Vajtswv lus rau thaum Hexekhiya ua vajntxwv kav Yuda
Jeremiah26:19 Yuda tus vajntxwv Hexekhiya thiab cov Yuda sawvdaws muab nws tua lawm lov? Hexekhiya ntshai Yawmsaub thiab thov Yawmsaub hlub los tsis yog? Thiab Yawmsaub tau hloov siab tsis tso tej xwm txheej phem uas nws twb hais rau lawv lawd los raug lawv los tsis yog? Tiamsis peb tabtom yuav coj tej xwm txheej phem loj no los raug peb tus kheej.”
Jeremiah26:20 Tseem muaj dua ib tug xibhwb uas tuav Yawmsaub lub npe cev lus
Jeremiah26:21 Mas thaum vajntxwv Yehauyakhi thiab nws cov tub rog sawvdaws thiab nws cov thawj sawvdaws hnov Uliya tej lus ntawd
Jeremiah26:22 Ces vajntxwv Yehauyakhi txawm tso Eenathas uas yog Anpau tus tub thiab dua lwm tus caum mus rau Iyi tebchaws.
Jeremiah26:23 Lawv ntes tau Uliya hauv Iyi tebchaws los thiab coj nws los cuag vajntxwv Yehauyakhi
Jeremiah26:24 Tiamsis Ahikhas uas yog Safas tus tub tuaj Yelemi tog
Jeremiah27:1 Thaum Xedekhiya uas yog Yauxiya tus tub pib ua vajntxwv kav Yuda
Jeremiah27:2 Yawmsaub hais li no rau kuv tias
Jeremiah27:3 Thiab xa xov rau Edoo tus vajntxwv
Jeremiah27:4 Muab tej lus no rau cov tub teg tub taws ntawd coj mus rau lawv cov vajntxwv hais tias
Jeremiah27:5 Yeej yog kuv ntag uas siv kuv lub hwjchim loj kawg thiab kuv txhais npab uas muaj zog tsim lub ntiajteb thiab neeg thiab tej tsiaj txhu uas nyob hauv ntiajteb
Jeremiah27:6 Nimno kuv pub tej tebchaws no huvsi rau hauv kuv tus tub qhe Nenpukhanexa txhais tes uas ua vajntxwv hauv Npanpiloo
Jeremiah27:7 Ib tsoom tebchaws sawvdaws yuav ua num rau nws thiab nws tus tub thiab nws tus xeeb ntxwv
Jeremiah27:8 “ ‘ “Tiamsis yog haiv neeg twg lub tebchaws twg tsis ua num rau tus Nenpukhanexa no uas ua vajntxwv hauv Npanpiloo thiab tsis cug caj qwb kwv vajntxwv Npanpiloo tus quab
Jeremiah27:9 Vim li no tsis txhob mloog nej cov xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus thiab nej cov uas hais pom tom hauv ntej thiab nej cov uas ua npau suav thiab nej cov saib sij saib yaig uas hais rau nej tias
Jeremiah27:10 Tej uas lawv cev Vajtswv lus rau nej ntawd yog lus cuav xwb
Jeremiah27:11 Tiamsis yog haiv neeg twg cug caj qwb kwv vajntxwv Npanpiloo tus quab thiab ua num rau nws
Jeremiah27:12 Kuv hais rau Yuda tus vajntxwv Xedekhiya ib yam nkaus tias
Jeremiah27:13 Ua cas koj thiab koj cov neeg yuav tuag hniav ntaj tuag tshaib thiab tuag mob kis raws li Yawmsaub tau hais txog tej tebchaws uas tsis ua num rau vajntxwv Npanpiloo?
Jeremiah27:14 Koj tsis txhob mloog cov xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus uas hais rau koj tias
Jeremiah27:15 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah27:16 Thiab kuv kuj hais rau cov pov thawj thiab cov pejxeem no sawvdaws tias
Jeremiah27:17 Tsis txhob mloog lawv li. Cia li ua num rau vajntxwv Npanpiloo thiaj ciaj sia nyob. Ua cas yuav cia lub nroog no pob tag nyob do cuas cia?
Jeremiah27:18 Yog lawv cov ntawd yog tseem xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus thiab yog Vajtswv tej lus nyob hauv lawv tiag
Jeremiah27:19 Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais li no txog tej ncej thiab lub rhawv dej thiab tej ceg txawb thiab lwm yam twj siv uas tshuav nyob hauv lub nroog no
Jeremiah27:20 uas vajntxwv Nenpukhanexa hauv Npanpiloo tsis tau coj mus rau thaum nws ntes Yehauyakhi tus tub Yekhauniya uas yog Yuda tus vajntxwv thiab cov thawj hauv Yuda thiab cov hauv Yeluxalees coj tawm hauv Yeluxalees mus rau Npanpiloo.
Jeremiah27:21 Yawmsaub tus muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus
Jeremiah27:22 ‘Tej twj siv no yuav raug muab thauj mus rau Npanpiloo mas yuav nyob qhov ntawd txog hnub uas kuv xav txog dua ces kuv li coj rov qab los thiab muab cia rau hauv lub qub chaw no.’ Yawmsaub hais li no ntag.”
Jeremiah28:1 Tib xyoo ntawd
Jeremiah28:2 “Yawmsaub tus muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais li no tias
Jeremiah28:3 Tshuav ob xyoos kuv yuav coj tej twj siv hauv Yawmsaub lub tuam tsev huvsi rov qab los rau lub chaw no
Jeremiah28:4 Kuv kuj yuav coj Yehauyakhi tus tub Yekhauniya uas ua vajntxwv kav Yuda thiab cov uas raug ntes coj tawm hauv Yuda mus rau Npanpiloo lawm rov qab los huvsi
Jeremiah28:5 Ces Yelemi uas ua xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus txawm hais rau Hananiya tab meeg cov pov thawj thiab cov pejxeem sawvdaws uas nyob hauv Yawmsaub lub tuam tsev hnov.
Jeremiah28:6 Yelemi uas cev Vajtswv lus hais tias
Jeremiah28:7 Tiamsis koj cia li mloog tej lus uas kuv yuav hais rau koj thiab rau cov neeg sawvdaws tau hnov.
Jeremiah28:8 Cov xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus uas nyob ua kuv thiab koj ntej thaum ub los lawm
Jeremiah28:9 Tiamsis tus xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus uas cev hais tias yuav muaj kev thaj yeeb
Jeremiah28:10 Mas Hananiya uas cev Vajtswv lus muab tus quab ntawm Yelemi uas cev Vajtswv lus caj qwb daws thiab muab lov pov tseg.
Jeremiah28:11 Hananiya hais tab meeg cov pejxeem sawvdaws tias
Jeremiah28:12 Tsis ntev tom qab uas xibhwb Hananiya uas cev Vajtswv lus muab tus quab ntawm xibhwb Yelemi uas cev Vajtswv lus caj qwb lov lawm
Jeremiah28:13 “Cia li mus hais rau Hananiya tias
Jeremiah28:14 Rau qhov Yawmsaub tus uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais li no tias
Jeremiah28:15 Thiab xibhwb Yelemi uas cev Vajtswv lus hais rau xibhwb Hananiya uas cev Vajtswv lus tias
Jeremiah28:16 Vim li no Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah28:17 Tib xyoo ntawd lub xya hli xibhwb Hananiya kuj tuag lawm.
Jeremiah29:1 Ntawm no mus yog tej lus hauv tsab ntawv uas xibhwb Yelemi uas cev Vajtswv lus xa hauv Yeluxalees mus rau cov kev txwj laus uas poob tebchaws thiab cov pov thawj thiab cov xibhwb cev lus thiab cov pejxeem sawvdaws uas Nenpukhanexa muab kuav tawm hauv Yeluxalees mus rau hauv Npanpiloo.
Jeremiah29:2 Tej no yog tom qab uas vajntxwv Yekhauniya thiab nws niam thiab cov nraug sam thiab Yuda thiab Yeluxalees cov thawj
Jeremiah29:3 Tsab ntawv no yog muab rau Elaxa uas yog Safas tus tub thiab Kemaliya uas yog Hikhiya tus tub coj mus
Jeremiah29:4 Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus
Jeremiah29:5 “Cia li ua vaj ua tsev thiab nyob rau hauv
Jeremiah29:6 Cia li yuav pojniam thiab muaj tub muaj ntxhais
Jeremiah29:7 Cia li pab kom lub nroog uas kuv ntiab nej mus poob tebchaws ntawd noj qab nyob zoo
Jeremiah29:8 Cov Yixayee tus Vajtswv Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais li no tias
Jeremiah29:9 Lawv tuav kuv lub npe cev lus dag rau nej
Jeremiah29:10 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah29:11 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah29:12 Thaum ntawd nej yuav thov hu kuv thiab los taij kuv mas kuv yuav mloog nej.
Jeremiah29:13 Nej yuav nrhiav kuv thiab ntsib kuv rau thaum nej nrhiav kuv kawg siab kawg ntsws.”
Jeremiah29:14 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah29:15 Vim nej tau hais tias
Jeremiah29:16 mas Yawmsaub hais li no txog tus vajntxwv uas nyob saum Davi lub zwm txwv thiab hais txog cov neeg sawvdaws uas nyob hauv lub nroog no
Jeremiah29:17 Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais li no tias
Jeremiah29:18 Kuv yuav xuas ntaj thiab kev tshaib nqhis thiab mob kis raws caum lawv
Jeremiah29:19 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah29:20 Nej cov uas poob tebchaws sawvdaws uas kuv ntiab tawm hauv Yeluxalees mus rau Npanpiloo
Jeremiah29:21 Cov Yixayee tus Vajtswv Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais li no txog Ahaj uas yog Khaulaya tus tub thiab hais txog Xedekhiya uas yog Ma‑axeya tus tub uas tabtom tuav kuv lub npe cev lus dag rau nej. “Saib nawj
Jeremiah29:22 Vim yog tim ob tug mas cov Yuda sawvdaws uas poob tebchaws mus nyob hauv Npanpiloo sawvdaws yuav siv lo lus tsawm foom li no hais tias
Jeremiah29:23 Rau qhov ob tug ua tej uas ruam kawg li rau hauv cov Yixayee. Ob tug tau deev kwvtij zej zog tej pojniam thiab tau tuav kuv lub npe hais tej lus dag uas tsis yog kuv kom ob tug hais. Kuv yog tus paub thiab kuv ua timkhawv.” Yawmsaub hais li no ntag.
Jeremiah29:24 Koj cia li hais rau Semaya uas yog neeg hauv lub moos Nehelas tias
Jeremiah29:25 “Cov Yixayee tus Vajtswv Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais li no tias
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Yawmsaub tau tsa koj ua pov thawj nyob tug pov thawj Yehauyada chaw saib xyuas Yawmsaub lub tuam tsev thiab muaj hwjchim muab txhua tus neeg vwm uas cev Vajtswv lus ntxig rau hauv rab cuab thiab muab saw hlau khi caj dab.
Jeremiah29:27 Nimno ua cas koj tsis txwv Yelemi uas yog neeg Anathau uas cev Vajtswv lus rau nej?
Jeremiah29:28 Rau qhov nws tau xa ntawv tuaj rau peb uas nyob hauv Npanpiloo tias
Jeremiah29:29 Pov thawj Xefaniya nyeem tsab ntawv no rau Yelemi uas yog xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus mloog.
Jeremiah29:30 Mas Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah29:31 “Cia li sau ntawv mus rau cov uas poob tebchaws sawvdaws tias
Jeremiah29:32 vim li no Yawmsaub thiaj hais li no tias
Jeremiah30:1 Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah30:2 “Yawmsaub uas yog cov Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais li no tias
Jeremiah30:3 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah30:4 Ntawm no mus yog tej lus uas Yawmsaub hais txog cov Yixayee thiab cov Yuda.
Jeremiah30:5 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah30:6 Cia li nug thiab tshuaj saib
Jeremiah30:7 Hnub ntawd yuav txaus ntshai kawg li lauj! Tsis muaj ib hnub twg yuav thooj li hnub ntawd
Jeremiah30:8 Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais tias
Jeremiah30:9 Mas lawv yuav ua koom tu Yawmsaub uas yog lawv tus Vajtswv thiab tu lawv tus vajntxwv Davi tus uas kuv yuav tsa sawv los ua vajntxwv kav lawv.”
Jeremiah30:10 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah30:11 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah30:12 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah30:13 Tsis muaj leejtwg yuav pab hais koj tshaj plaub
Jeremiah30:14 Cov uas koj nyiam sawvdaws tsis nco qab koj lawm
Jeremiah30:15 Ua cas koj yuav quaj qhov uas mob? Qhov uas koj mob kho tsis tau li. Vim koj ua txhaum ntau kawg thiab koj muaj txim loj
Jeremiah30:16 Vim li no txhua tus uas noj koj nws yuav raug luag noj
Jeremiah30:17 Kuv yuav kho kom koj cev nqaij rov zoo li qub thiab kuv yuav kho koj tej qhov txhab kom zoo
Jeremiah30:18 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah30:19 Yuav muaj suab hu nkauj ua tsaug thiab suab xyiv fab tawm qhov chaw ntawd tuaj. Kuv yuav ua rau lawv huaj vam coob tuaj
Jeremiah30:20 Lawv tej tub ki yuav zoo ib yam li thaum ub
Jeremiah30:21 Lawv tus thawj yeej yuav yog ib tug hauv lawv cov neeg
Jeremiah30:22 “Nej yuav ua kuv haiv neeg
Jeremiah30:23 Cia li saib Yawmsaub tej cua daj cua dub. Txojkev npau taws tawm mus lawm
Jeremiah30:24 Yawmsaub txojkev chim heev yuav tsis thim rov qab mus txog thaum nws ua tej uas nws xav hauv lub siab tiav. Nej yuav nkag siab tej no rau yav tom hauv ntej.
Jeremiah31:1 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah31:2 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah31:3 Yawmsaub los tshwm rau lawv pom deb deb. Kuv hlub nej hauv txojkev hlub uas muaj mus ib txhis
Jeremiah31:4 Yixayee uas yog tus nkauj dawb huv 'e
Jeremiah31:5 Koj yuav rov cog vaj txiv hmab rau saum Xamali tej roob
Jeremiah31:6 Tseem yuav muaj ib hnub uas tus faj xwm yuav qw pem toj siab Efa‑i tebchaws tias
Jeremiah31:7 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah31:8 Saib maj
Jeremiah31:9 Lawv yuav quaj laws los
Jeremiah31:10 “Ib tsoom tebchaws 'e
Jeremiah31:11 Rau qhov Yawmsaub twb txhiv Yakhauj cia lawm
Jeremiah31:12 Lawv yuav los qw zoo siab rau saum lub roob Xi‑oo
Jeremiah31:13 Cov ntxhais hluas yuav zoo siab thiab yuav seev cev
Jeremiah31:14 Kuv yuav muab tej qoob loo ntau nplua mias yug cov pov thawj tsau npo
Jeremiah31:15 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah31:16 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah31:17 “Koj lub neej tom hauv ntej tseem muaj vam
Jeremiah31:18 “Kuv tau hnov Efa‑i quaj hais tias
Jeremiah31:19 Thaum kuv tig xubntiag mus lawd
Jeremiah31:20 Efa‑i tsis yog tus tub uas kuv hlub lov? Nws tsis yog tus menyuam uas kuv nyiam lov? Kuv yws nws thaum twg
Jeremiah31:21 “Koj cia li rhais phua qhia kev rau koj
Jeremiah31:22 Tus ntxhais uas tso kuv tseg 'e
Jeremiah31:23 Cov Yixayee tus Vajtswv Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais li no tias
Jeremiah31:24 “Yuda thiab Yuda tej moos huvsi thiab cov uas ua liaj ua teb thiab cov uas yug yaj uas mus mus los los yuav nyob ua ke qhov ntawd.
Jeremiah31:25 “Kuv yuav ua kom lub siab uas qaug zog tsau npo
Jeremiah31:26 Tamsim ntawd kuv tsim dheev los thiab tsa muag ntsia
Jeremiah31:27 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah31:28 Kuv ntsia ntsoov lawv thiab muab lawv dob thiab muab ua pob tag thiab ua kom puam tsuaj thiab coj xwm txheej phem los raug lawv li cas
Jeremiah31:29 “Thaum ntawd lawv yuav tsis hais dua tias
Jeremiah31:30 Tiamsis txhua tus yuav tuag rau nws lub txim. Txhua tus uas noj txiv hmab qaub kuj yuav rhiab hniav.”
Jeremiah31:31 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah31:32 tsis thooj li uas kuv cog rau lawv tej poj koob yawm txwv rau thaum kuv cab lawv tes coj lawv tawm hauv Iyi tebchaws los. Kuv twb yog lawv tus txiv los lawv muab kuv tej lus cog tseg rhuav lawm.” Yawmsaub hais li no ntag.
Jeremiah31:33 “No yog tej lus cog tseg uas kuv yuav cog rau cov Yixayee ua qab ncua sijhawm ntawd.” Yawmsaub hais li no ntag. “Kuv yuav muab kuv txoj kevcai tso rau hauv lawv
Jeremiah31:34 Txhua tus yuav tsis qhia nws kwvtij zej zog thiab nws tej kwvtij txheeb kom paub Yawmsaub dua li lawm
Jeremiah31:35 Yawmsaub uas ua lub hnub ci pom kev nruab hnub
Jeremiah31:36 “Yog tej kevcai ruaj khov no ploj ntawm kuv xubntiag lawm
Jeremiah31:37 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah31:38 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah31:39 Thiab txoj hlua ntsuas yuav dhau plaws ncaj nraim mus txog lub pov roob Kale li tig mus txog Kau‑a.
Jeremiah31:40 Tag nrho lub hav uas pov neeg tuag thiab tej tshauv
Jeremiah32:1 No yog tej lus uas Yawmsaub hais tuaj rau Yelemi rau xyoo kaum uas Xedekhiya ua vajntxwv kav Yuda
Jeremiah32:2 Thaum ntawd vajntxwv Npanpiloo cov tub rog tabtom vij lub nroog Yeluxalees thiab Yelemi uas ua xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus kuj raug muab kaw rau hauv cov tub rog uas zov vajntxwv lub loog uas nyob hauv Yuda tus vajntxwv lub vaj.
Jeremiah32:3 Yuda tus vajntxwv Xedekhiya tau muab Yelemi kaw thiab hais tias
Jeremiah32:4 Yuda tus vajntxwv Xedekhiya yuav khiav tsis dim cov Kheedia txhais tes
Jeremiah32:5 Vajntxwv Npanpiloo yuav coj Xedekhiya mus rau Npanpiloo
Jeremiah32:6 Yelemi hais tias
Jeremiah32:7 Saib maj
Jeremiah32:8 Mas kuv tus kwvtij Hanamee tuaj cuag kuv ntawm cov tub rog uas zov vajntxwv lub loog raws li tej lus uas Yawmsaub tau hais rau kuv lawm
Jeremiah32:9 “Mas kuv thiaj yuav daim teb hauv Anathau ntawm kuv tus kwvtij Hanamee
Jeremiah32:10 Kuv thiaj sau npe rau hauv daim ntawv teb thiab ntaus cim nias rau
Jeremiah32:11 Kuv thiaj txais daim ntawv yuav teb uas ntaus cim rau lawm uas muaj ntsiab los muag thiab yuav
Jeremiah32:12 Mas kuv muab daim ntawv yuav teb rau Npalu uas yog Neliya tus tub
Jeremiah32:13 Kuv thiaj hais rau Npalu tab meeg lawv tias
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Yawmsaub tus muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais li no tias
Jeremiah32:15 rau qhov Yawmsaub tus muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais li no tias
Jeremiah32:16 “Thaum kuv muab daim ntawv yuav teb rau Neliya tus tub Npalu lawm
Jeremiah32:17 Au Vajtswv Yawmsaub
Jeremiah32:18 Koj yog tus uas ua txojkev hlub ruaj khov tshwm rau ntau txhiab leej
Jeremiah32:19 Koj yog lub chaw sablaj ntxig nug zoo heev thiab koj tej haujlwm muaj hwjchim loj kawg. Koj lub qhov muag pom ntsoov txhua yam uas neeg ua
Jeremiah32:20 Koj yog tus uas ua txujci tseem ceeb thiab txujci phimhwj tshwm rau hauv Iyi tebchaws
Jeremiah32:21 Koj ua txujci tseem ceeb thiab txujci phimhwj coj koj haiv neeg Yixayee tawm hauv Iyi tebchaws los
Jeremiah32:22 Koj muab lub tebchaws no rau lawv
Jeremiah32:23 Lawv tau txeem los thiab tuav tau lub tebchaws no ua lawv tug. Tiamsis lawv tsis mloog koj lus thiab tsis ua raws li koj txoj kevcai thiab tsis ua ib yam dabtsi raws li koj hais kom lawv ua kiag li. Vim li no koj thiaj tso tej xwm txheej phem no huvsi los raug lawv.
Jeremiah32:24 “ ‘Saib maj
Jeremiah32:25 Au Vajtswv Yawmsaub
Jeremiah32:26 Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah32:27 “Saib maj
Jeremiah32:28 Vim li no Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah32:29 Cov Kheedia uas ua rog ntaus lub nroog no yuav tuaj muab lub nroog no hlawv kub hnyiab tag
Jeremiah32:30 Yixayee caj ces thiab Yuda caj ces tsis tau ua ib yam dabtsi zoo tsuas yog ua kev phem rau kuv pom txij thaum yau los li xwb. Yixayee caj ces tsis tau ib yam dabtsi li
Jeremiah32:31 Lub nroog no tau zes kom kuv chim thiab npau taws txij hnub uas rhawv los txog niaj hnub nimno. Vim li no kuv yuav muab rhuav tshem ntawm kuv lub qhov muag mus
Jeremiah32:32 vim yog Yixayee caj ces thiab Yuda caj ces tej kev phem txhua yam uas zes ua rau kuv chim
Jeremiah32:33 Lawv tau tig nrob qaum rau kuv
Jeremiah32:34 Lawv muab tej uas qias vuab tsuab txawb rau hauv lub tuam tsev uas hu raws li kuv lub npe thiaj puas tsuas lub tuam tsev.
Jeremiah32:35 Lawv ua lub chaw siab teev dab Npa‑as rau hauv lub hav Npeehinoo lawv thiaj muab lawv tej tub tej ntxhais txi rau dab Maulej
Jeremiah32:36 “Vim li no Yawmsaub uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv thiaj hais txog lub nroog no uas nej hais tias
Jeremiah32:37 Saib maj
Jeremiah32:38 Lawv yuav ua kuv haiv neeg
Jeremiah32:39 Kuv yuav ua kom lawv ua ib lub siab thiab taug ib txojkev
Jeremiah32:40 Kuv yuav cog lus tseg rau lawv mus ib txhis tias kuv yuav tsis tseg qhov uas ua zoo rau lawv
Jeremiah32:41 Kuv yuav zoo siab qhov uas ua zoo rau lawv
Jeremiah32:42 “Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah32:43 Lawv yuav muag thiab yuav tej teb hauv lub tebchaws no uas nej hais tias
Jeremiah32:44 Yuav rho nyiaj yuav tej teb
Jeremiah33:1 Yawmsaub hais lus zaum ob tuaj rau Yelemi yog thaum uas Yelemi tseem raug kaw rau hauv cov tub rog uas zov vajntxwv lub loog
Jeremiah33:2 “Yawmsaub uas tsim ntiajteb
Jeremiah33:3 ‘Cia li thov kuv
Jeremiah33:4 Rau qhov Yawmsaub uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv tau hais li no txog tej tsev hauv lub nroog no thiab Yuda tej vajntxwv tej tsev uas nej muab rhuav tag thiaj ua tau lub chaw tiv thaiv tej chaw siab uas tib vij lub nroog thiab tiv thaiv hniav ntaj.
Jeremiah33:5 ‘Cov Kheedia yuav tuaj ua rog thiab ua rau tej vaj tse ntawd puv nkaus neeg tuag
Jeremiah33:6 Saib maj
Jeremiah33:7 Kuv yuav pub kom Yuda thiab Yixayee rov vam meej li qub
Jeremiah33:8 Kuv yuav muab lawv lub txim uas ua txhaum rau kuv ntxuav huvsi mus
Jeremiah33:9 Thiab lub nroog no lub koob meej yuav ua rau kuv zoo siab xyiv fab thiab ua rau luag qhuas kuv thiab tau ntsej muag tab meeg ib tsoom tebchaws sawvdaws hauv ntiajteb uas tau hnov txog tej kev zoo huvsi uas kuv tau ua rau lawv lawm. Lawv yuav ntshai tshee hnyo vim yog tej kev zoo thiab tej kev vam meej huvsi uas kuv pub rau lub nroog no.’
Jeremiah33:10 “Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah33:11 lub suab luag thiab lub suab zoo siab
Jeremiah33:12 “Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais li no tias
Jeremiah33:13 Hauv tej moos pem toj siab thiab hauv tej moos ntawm tej pov roob Sefela
Jeremiah33:14 “Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah33:15 “ ‘Hnub ntawd thiab lub sijhawm ntawd kuv yuav ua kom ib tug ceg uas ncaj ncees yug tshwm hauv Davi los. Nws yuav txiav txim ncaj thiab ua ncaj ncees rau hauv lub tebchaws.
Jeremiah33:16 Lub sijhawm ntawd Yuda yuav tau kev dim thiab Yeluxalees yuav nyob tso siab plhuav. Yuav hu lub nroog ntawd npe hais tias Yawmsaub yog peb txojkev ncaj ncees.’
Jeremiah33:17 Rau qhov Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah33:18 thiab xeem Levi yuav tsis tu ncua tus pov thawj uas sawv ntawm kuv xubntiag ua kevcai hlawv xyeem thiab ua kevcai xyeem qoob loo thiab ua kevcai tua tsiaj xyeem mus ib txhis.’ ”
Jeremiah33:19 Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah33:20 “Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah33:21 ces nej li rhuav tau tej lus uas kuv cog tseg rau kuv tus qhev Davi
Jeremiah33:22 Tej hnub qub saum ntuj suav tsis txheeb thiab tej xuab zeb ntawm hiavtxwv suav tsis tag li cas
Jeremiah33:23 Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah33:24 “Koj tsis tau tshuaj pom tias cov neeg no hais li cas lov? Lawv hais tias
Jeremiah33:25 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah33:26 ces kuv yuav tso Yakhauj thiab kuv tus qhev Davi caj ces pov tseg thiab tsis xaiv ib tug hauv nws caj ces los kav Aplahas
Jeremiah34:1 No yog tej lus uas Yawmsaub hais tuaj rau Yelemi rau thaum vajntxwv Nenpukhanexa hauv Npanpiloo thiab nws cov tub rog huvsi thiab txhua lub tebchaws hauv ntiajteb thiab txhua haiv neeg uas nws kav tabtom ua rog rau Yeluxalees thiab tej moos ib ncig.
Jeremiah34:2 “Yawmsaub uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais li no tias
Jeremiah34:3 Koj yuav tsis dim hauv nws txhais tes li
Jeremiah34:4 Au vajntxwv Xedekhiya uas kav Yuda
Jeremiah34:5 Koj yuav tuag siab tus yees. Luag hlawv tshuaj tsw qab pam koj tej poj koob yawm txwv uas yog tej vajntxwv nyob ua koj ntej li cas
Jeremiah34:6 Mas Yelemi uas cev Vajtswv lus hais tej lus no huvsi rau vajntxwv Xedekhiya uas kav Yuda hauv lub nroog Yeluxalees
Jeremiah34:7 rau thaum vajntxwv Npanpiloo cov tub rog tabtom ua rog rau Yeluxalees thiab Yuda txhua lub moos uas tseem tshuav
Jeremiah34:8 Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi tom qab uas vajntxwv Xedekhiya tau cog lus rau cov neeg hauv Yeluxalees sawvdaws tias yuav tshaj tawm kevcai tso cov qhev nyob ywj pheej.
Jeremiah34:9 Txhua tus nyias yuav tsum tso nyias tej qhev uas yog neeg Henplais tsis hais pojniam txivneej kom nyob ywj pheej
Jeremiah34:10 Mas cov thawj coj sawvdaws thiab cov pejxeem sawvdaws tau cog lus tseg tias nyias yuav tso nyias tej tub qhe nkauj qhev dim kom lawv thiaj tsis raug rov muab ua qhev dua. Lawv mloog lus thiab tso tej qhev dim nyob ywj pheej lawm.
Jeremiah34:11 Tiamsis tom qab lawv rov qab fav dua thiab ntes tej tub qhe nkauj qhev uas lawv muab tso nyob ywj pheej lawm rov los quab yuam ua qhev dua.
Jeremiah34:12 Mas Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah34:13 “Yawmsaub uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais li no tias
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Thaum puv rau xyoo lawm nej txhua tus yuav tsum tso tej kwvtij Henplais uas luag muag rau nej thiab tau ua haujlwm rau nej tau rau xyoo lawm. Nej yuav tsum tso lawv nyob ywj pheej tsis txhob ua haujlwm rau nej lawm.’ Tiamsis nej tej poj koob yawm txwv tsis mloog thiab tsis tig ntsej mloog kuv hais.
Jeremiah34:15 Tsis ntev los no nej tau ntxeev dua siab ua yam uas kuv pom zoo es tshaj tawm kev ywj pheej nyias tshaj tawm rau nyias kwvtij uas ua qhev
Jeremiah34:16 Tiamsis dhau ntawd lawm nej rov fav dua thiab ua puas tsuas kuv lub npe rau thaum uas nej txhua tus ntes nej tej tub qhe nkauj qhev uas nej twb muab tso nyob ywj pheej lawm raws li lawv lub siab xav
Jeremiah34:17 “Vim li no
Jeremiah34:18 Thiab cov neeg uas ua txhaum kuv tej lus cog tseg thiab tsis ua raws li tej nqe lus hais hum uas lawv cog lus tseg tab meeg kuv ntawd
Jeremiah34:19 Tag nrho Yuda cov thawj thiab Yeluxalees cov thawj thiab cov nraug sam
Jeremiah34:20 mas kuv yuav muab lawv cob rau hauv lawv cov yeeb ncuab txhais tes thiab rau hauv cov uas nrhiav txov lawv txojsia txhais tes. Lawv tej cev tuag mas tej liaj dav saum nruab ntug thiab tej tsiaj qus hauv ntiajteb yuav noj.
Jeremiah34:21 Kuv yuav muab vajntxwv Xedekhiya uas kav Yuda thiab nws cov thawj cob rau hauv lawv cov yeeb ncuab thiab rau hauv cov uas nrhiav txov lawv txojsia txhais tes
Jeremiah34:22 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah35:1 Thaum Yauxiya tus tub Yehauyakhi ua vajntxwv kav Yuda
Jeremiah35:2 “Cia li mus cuag Lekhaj caj ces thiab nrog lawv tham thiab coj lawv tuaj rau ntawm Yawmsaub lub tuam tsev nkag mus nyob hauv ib chav thiab muab cawv txiv hmab rau lawv haus.”
Jeremiah35:3 Mas kuv thiaj coj Ya‑axaniya thiab nws cov kwvtij thiab nws cov tub huvsi thiab Lekhaj caj ces sawvdaws tuaj. Ya‑axaniya txiv yog Yelemi
Jeremiah35:4 Kuv coj lawv tuaj rau ntawm Yawmsaub lub tuam tsev mus rau hauv Hanas cov tub chav tsev. Hanas yog Idaliya tus tub thiab yog Vajtswv tus neeg. Chav tsev ntawd npuas cov thawj uas saib xyuas lub tuam tsev chav
Jeremiah35:5 Mas kuv muab tej hwj cawv txiv hmab thiab tej khob txawb rau ntawm Lekhaj cov neeg xubntiag
Jeremiah35:6 Tiamsis lawv teb tias
Jeremiah35:7 Nej tsis txhob ua tsev
Jeremiah35:8 Peb mloog peb yawg koob Yaunada uas yog Lekhaj tus tub tej lus txhua lo lus uas nws hais kom peb ua
Jeremiah35:9 thiab tsis txhob ua tsev nyob. Peb tsis muaj vaj txiv hmab thiab teb thiab qoob loo.
Jeremiah35:10 Peb tsuas yog nyob hauv tej tsev ntaub xwb thiab peb mloog lus thiab ua txhua yam raws li peb yawg koob Yaunada hais cia rau peb.
Jeremiah35:11 Tiamsis thaum vajntxwv Nenpukhanexa hauv Npanpiloo tuaj ua rog rau tebchaws no
Jeremiah35:12 Mas Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah35:13 “Yawmsaub tus muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais li no tias
Jeremiah35:14 Lekhaj tus tub Yaunada hais rau nws tej tub ki kom tsis txhob haus cawv txiv hmab
Jeremiah35:15 Kuv tau txib kuv cov tub qhe uas yog cov xibhwb cev lus txhua tus tuaj rau nej
Jeremiah35:16 Lekhaj tus tub Yaunada tej caj ces twb ua raws li tej lus uas lawv yawg koob hais cia rau lawv
Jeremiah35:17 Yog li no Yawmsaub
Jeremiah35:18 Tiamsis Yelemi hais rau Lekhaj caj ces tias
Jeremiah35:19 Vim li no Yawmsaub tus muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais tias
Jeremiah36:1 Xyoo plaub uas Yauxiya tus tub Yehauyakhi ua vajntxwv kav Yuda
Jeremiah36:2 “Koj cia li muab ib thooj ntawv mas sau tej lus huvsi uas kuv tau hais rau koj
Jeremiah36:3 Nyaj cov Yuda yuav hnov txog tej xwm txheej phem huvsi uas kuv xav tseg yuav ua rau lawv
Jeremiah36:4 Mas Yelemi thiaj hu Npalu uas yog Neliya tus tub los
Jeremiah36:5 Thiab Yelemi qhia Npalu hais tias
Jeremiah36:6 Yog li ntawd
Jeremiah36:7 Mas tej zaum lawv tej lus taij thov yuav mus txog Yawmsaub
Jeremiah36:8 Neliya tus tub Npalu ua txhua yam raws li Yelemi hais rau nws kom mus nyeem Yawmsaub tej lus hauv thooj ntawv ntawd rau hauv Yawmsaub lub tuam tsev.
Jeremiah36:9 Lub cuaj hli xyoo tsib uas Yauxiya tus tub Yehauyakhi ua vajntxwv kav Yuda
Jeremiah36:10 Ces Npalu thiaj nyeem Yelemi tej lus hauv thooj ntawv rau cov neeg sawvdaws mloog hauv Yawmsaub lub tuam tsev
Jeremiah36:11 Thaum Mikhaya uas yog Kemaliya tus tub thiab yog Safas tus xeeb ntxwv tau hnov Yawmsaub tej lus huvsi hauv thooj ntawv ntawd
Jeremiah36:12 nws txawm mus rau hauv vajntxwv lub tsev
Jeremiah36:13 Ces Mikhaya txawm piav tej lus huvsi uas nws tau hnov Npalu nyeem hauv thooj ntawv rau cov pejxeem mloog.
Jeremiah36:14 Cov thawj sawvdaws thiaj txib Nethaniya tus tub Yehudi
Jeremiah36:15 Lawv txawm hais rau nws tias
Jeremiah36:16 Thaum lawv tau hnov tej lus huvsi ntawd
Jeremiah36:17 Lawv txawm nug Npalu tias
Jeremiah36:18 Npalu teb lawv tias
Jeremiah36:19 Mas cov thawj hais rau Npalu tias
Jeremiah36:20 Thaum lawv muab thooj ntawv ntawd khaws cia rau hauv Elisama uas ua tus tub sau ntawv chav tsev lawm
Jeremiah36:21 Vajntxwv txawm txib Yehudi mus muab thooj ntawv ntawd los. Yehudi thiaj mus muab ntawm Elisama uas ua tus tub sau ntawv chav tsev los
Jeremiah36:22 Thaum ntawd yog lub cuaj hli
Jeremiah36:23 Thaum Yehudi nyeem tag peb plaub pwm
Jeremiah36:24 Vajntxwv thiab nws cov tub teg tub taws uas tau hnov tej lus huvsi ntawd kuj tsis muaj ib tug twg ntshai thiab muab tej tsho dua tseg.
Jeremiah36:25 Txawm yog Eenathas thiab Delaya thiab Kemaliya lawv thov vajntxwv tsis txhob muab thooj ntawv ntawd hlawv
Jeremiah36:26 Vajntxwv tseem hais kom Yelame‑ee uas yog nws tus tub
Jeremiah36:27 Thaum vajntxwv muab thooj ntawv uas Npalu sau raws li Yelemi hais hlawv tag lawm
Jeremiah36:28 “Cia li muab dua ib thooj ntawv thiab muab tej lus uas nyob hauv thawj thooj ntawv uas Yuda tus vajntxwv Yehauyakhi muab hlawv tag lawd sau huvsi rau hauv.
Jeremiah36:29 Hais txog Yuda tus vajntxwv Yehauyakhi ntawd koj cia li hais tias
Jeremiah36:30 Vim li no Yawmsaub thiaj hais txog Yuda tus vajntxwv Yehauyakhi tias
Jeremiah36:31 Kuv yuav rau txim rau nws thiab nws caj ces thiab nws tej tub teg tub taws vim yog tim lawv tej kev txhaum. Thiab kuv yuav coj tej xwm txheej phem huvsi uas kuv tau hais tawm tsam lawv los lawv tsis mloog ntawd los raug cov uas nyob hauv Yeluxalees thiab cov neeg Yuda.’ ”
Jeremiah36:32 Yelemi thiaj muab dua ib thooj ntawv los cob rau Neliya tus tub Npalu uas ua tus tub sau ntawv
Jeremiah37:1 Yauxiya tus tub Xedekhiya uas vajntxwv Nenpukhanexa hauv Npanpiloo muab tsa ua vajntxwv hauv Yuda tebchaws
Jeremiah37:2 Txawm yog nws thiab nws cov tub teg tub taws thiab nws cov pejxeem los puavleej tsis mloog Yawmsaub tej lus uas nws kom Yelemi uas yog xibhwb cev lus hais rau lawv.
Jeremiah37:3 Vajntxwv Xedekhiya txib Yehukhas uas yog Selemiya tus tub thiab pov thawj Xefaniya uas yog Ma‑axeya tus tub mus cuag Yelemi uas yog xibhwb cev lus thiab hais tias
Jeremiah37:4 Thaum ntawd Yelemi tseem mus los hauv cov pejxeem tau
Jeremiah37:5 Mas Falau pab tub rog tawm hauv Iyi tuaj. Thaum cov Kheedia uas vij lub nroog Yeluxalees hnov li ntawd
Jeremiah37:6 Thaum ntawd Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi uas yog xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus tias
Jeremiah37:7 “Yawmsaub uas yog cov Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais li no tias
Jeremiah37:8 Mas cov Kheedia yuav rov qab tuaj ua rog rau lub nroog no
Jeremiah37:9 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah37:10 Txawm yog nej kov yeej tau cov Kheedia pab tub rog huvsi uas tabtom ua rog rau nej
Jeremiah37:11 Thaum cov Kheedia cov tub rog thim ntawm Yeluxalees vim yog Falau pab tub rog tuaj ze
Jeremiah37:12 Yelemi kuj tawm hauv Yeluxalees mus rau Npeeyamee tebchaws thiaj tau nws li feem uas nyob hauv cov neeg ntawd.
Jeremiah37:13 Thaum nws nyob ntawm lub Rooj Loog Npeeyamee
Jeremiah37:14 Yelemi hais tias
Jeremiah37:15 Cov thawj chim heev rau Yelemi
Jeremiah37:16 Thaum Yelemi raug muab tso rau hauv lub nkuaj av thiab nyob qhov ntawd ntau hnub lawd
Jeremiah37:17 vajntxwv Xedekhiya txib neeg mus coj Yelemi los cuag nws
Jeremiah37:18 Yelemi hais ntxiv rau vajntxwv Xedekhiya tias
Jeremiah37:19 Koj cov xibhwb cev lus uas hais rau koj tias
Jeremiah37:20 Au vajntxwv uas yog kuv tus tswv
Jeremiah37:21 Vajntxwv Xedekhiya thiaj li hais kom lawv coj Yelemi mus kaw cia rau hauv cov tub rog uas zov vajntxwv lub loog. Ib hnub lawv coj ib lub ncuav ntawm txojkev uas luag ua ncuav los rau nws noj mus txog thaum tej ncuav hauv lub nroog tag huvsi lawm. Yog li no Yelemi thiaj nyob hauv cov tub rog zov vajntxwv lub loog.
Jeremiah38:1 Mathas tus tub Sefathiya
Jeremiah38:2 “Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah38:3 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah38:4 Cov thawj thiaj hais rau vajntxwv Xedekhiya tias
Jeremiah38:5 Vajntxwv Xedekhiya hais tias
Jeremiah38:6 Lawv txawm coj Yelemi mus thiab muab hlua tso nws nqes rau hauv vajntxwv tus tub Makhia lub qhov dej uas nyob hauv cov tub rog zov vajntxwv lub loog. Lub qhov dej ntawd tsis muaj dej
Jeremiah38:7 Thaum Enpemelej uas yog neeg Khuj yog ib tug nraug sam nyob hauv vajntxwv lub tsev hnov tias lawv muab Yelemi tso rau hauv lub qhov dej ntawd
Jeremiah38:8 Enpemelej txawm tawm hauv vajntxwv lub tsev mus hais rau vajntxwv tias
Jeremiah38:9 “Au vajntxwv uas yog kuv tus tswv
Jeremiah38:10 Ces vajntxwv thiaj hais rau Enpemelej uas yog neeg Khuj tias
Jeremiah38:11 Enpemelej thiaj coj neeg nrog nws mus rau ntawm vajntxwv lub tsev chav uas rau qhov txhia chaw uas muaj ib lub phij xab rau khaubncaws
Jeremiah38:12 Mas Enpemelej uas yog neeg Khuj hais rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah38:13 Lawv txawm muab txoj hlua rub Yelemi tawm hauv lub qhov dej los. Mas Yelemi tseem nyob hauv cov tub rog zov vajntxwv lub loog.
Jeremiah38:14 Vajntxwv Xedekhiya txib neeg mus coj Yelemi uas cev Vajtswv lus los cuag nws ntawm txojkev uas nkag lub rooj loog uas peb rau hauv Yawmsaub lub tuam tsev. Vajntxwv hais rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah38:15 Yelemi thiaj hais rau Xedekhiya tias
Jeremiah38:16 Mas vajntxwv Xedekhiya cog lus twv rau Yelemi twjywm tias
Jeremiah38:17 Yelemi thiaj hais rau Xedekhiya tias
Jeremiah38:18 Tiamsis yog koj tsis yeem muab koj cob rau Npanpiloo tus vajntxwv cov thawj
Jeremiah38:19 Vajntxwv Xedekhiya hais rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah38:20 Yelemi hais tias
Jeremiah38:21 Tiamsis yog koj tsis yeem muab koj tus kheej cob rau lawv
Jeremiah38:22 Kuv pom cov pojniam sawvdaws uas tshuav nyob hauv Yuda tus vajntxwv lub tsev raug muab coj mus pub rau Npanpiloo tus vajntxwv cov thawj
Jeremiah38:23 “Koj cov pojniam sawvdaws thiab koj cov tub yuav raug muab coj mus rau cov Kheedia
Jeremiah38:24 Xedekhiya txawm hais rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah38:25 Yog cov thawj hnov tias kuv tau nrog koj hais lus
Jeremiah38:26 koj cia li hais rau lawv tias
Jeremiah38:27 Mas cov thawj sawvdaws kuj tuaj cuag Yelemi thiab nug nws
Jeremiah38:28 Yelemi txawm nyob hauv cov tub rog uas zov vajntxwv lub loog mus txog hnub uas Yeluxalees poob lawm.
Jeremiah39:1 Xyoo cuaj uas Xedekhiya ua vajntxwv kav Yuda
Jeremiah39:2 Xyoo kaum ib uas Xedekhiya ua vajntxwv hnub xiab cuaj lub plaub hlis
Jeremiah39:3 Thaum txeeb tau Yeluxalees lawm
Jeremiah39:4 Thaum Yuda tus vajntxwv Xedekhiya thiab cov tub rog sawvdaws pom li ntawd
Jeremiah39:5 Tiamsis Kheedia cov tub rog raws lawv qab thiab caum cuag Xedekhiya rau ntawm lub tiaj Yelikhau. Thaum lawv ntes tau nws lawm
Jeremiah39:6 Npanpiloo tus vajntxwv tua Xedekhiya cov tub rau ntawm lub moos Linpla tab meeg nws
Jeremiah39:7 Nws muab Xedekhiya ob lub qhov muag kaus pov tseg thiab muab saw hlau khi coj nws mus rau Npanpiloo.
Jeremiah39:8 Cov Kheedia muab vajntxwv lub vaj tse thiab tej pejxeem tej vaj tse hlawv thiab tsoo tej ntsa loog Yeluxalees pob tag huvsi.
Jeremiah39:9 Nenpuxaladas uas yog tus thawj rog zov vajntxwv kuav kiag cov pejxeem uas tseem tshuav nyob hauv lub nroog thiab cov uas khiav mus zwm rau nws lawm tawm tebchaws mus rau Npanpiloo.
Jeremiah39:10 Nenpuxaladas uas yog tus thawj rog zov vajntxwv tsuas yog tseg cov neeg pluag uas tsis muaj dabtsi li cia nyob hauv Yuda tebchaws xwb
Jeremiah39:11 Npanpiloo tus vajntxwv Nenpukhanexa hais txog Yelemi rau Nenpuxaladas uas yog tus thawj rog zov vajntxwv tias
Jeremiah39:12 “Cia li coj Yelemi mus
Jeremiah39:13 Nenpuxaladas uas yog tus thawj rog zov vajntxwv
Jeremiah39:14 thiaj txib neeg mus coj Yelemi tawm hauv cov tub rog zov vajntxwv lub loog los. Lawv muab Yelemi cob rau Ahikhas tus tub Kedaliya uas yog Safas tus xeeb ntxwv coj nws mus tsev. Yog li ntawd Yelemi thiaj tau nrog cov pejxeem nyob ua ke.
Jeremiah39:15 Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi rau thaum nws tseem raug kaw hauv cov tub rog zov vajntxwv lub loog hais tias
Jeremiah39:16 “Cia li mus hais rau Enpemelej uas yog neeg Khuj tias
Jeremiah39:17 Yawmsaub hais tias

Jeremiah40:1 Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi yog tom qab uas Nenpuxaladas uas yog tus thawj rog zov vajntxwv tau muab Yelemi tso dim ntawm Lama lawm
Jeremiah40:2 Tus thawj rog uas zov vajntxwv thiaj coj Yelemi los mas hais rau nws tias
Jeremiah40:3 Nimno Yawmsaub yeej ua kom tiav thiab ua raws li nws twb hais tseg lawm. Vim yog nej tau ua txhaum rau Yawmsaub thiab tsis mloog nws tej lus
Jeremiah40:4 Saib maj
Jeremiah40:5 Yog koj yuav nyob ntawm no
Jeremiah40:6 Yelemi thiaj mus cuag Ahikhas tus tub Kedaliya ntawm Mixapa
Jeremiah40:7 Thaum Yuda cov thawj tub rog huvsi uas tsiv nraim lawm thiab lawv cov tub rog tau hnov hais tias vajntxwv hauv Npanpiloo tau tsa Ahikhas tus tub Kedaliya ua tus thawj kav lub tebchaws thiab muab tej pojniam txivneej menyuam uas pluag kawg hauv lub tebchaws cob rau nws kav
Jeremiah40:8 Nethaniya tus tub Yisama‑ee thiab Khale‑a tus tub Yauhanas
Jeremiah40:9 Kedaliya uas yog Ahikhas tus tub
Jeremiah40:10 Kuv tus kheej mas kuv yuav nyob hauv Mixapa
Jeremiah40:11 Ib yam li ntawd
Jeremiah40:12 mas cov Yudai sawvdaws kuj rov qab los ntawm txhua lub tebchaws uas lawv raug ntiab mus nyob ntawd
Jeremiah40:13 Khale‑a tus tub Yauhanas thiab cov thawj tub rog sawvdaws uas tsiv nraim lawm tuaj cuag Kedaliya ntawm Mixapa
Jeremiah40:14 thiab hais rau nws tias
Jeremiah40:15 Mas Khale‑a tus tub Yauhanas hais twjywm rau Kedaliya hauv Mixapa tias
Jeremiah40:16 Tiamsis Ahikhas tus tub Kedaliya hais rau Khale‑a tus tub Yauhanas tias
Jeremiah41:1 Lub xya hli
Jeremiah41:2 Nethaniya tus tub Yisama‑ee thiab kaum leej uas nrog nws tuaj txawm sawv tsees xuas ntaj muab Kedaliya uas yog Ahikhas tus tub thiab yog Safas tus xeeb ntxwv tua tuag
Jeremiah41:3 Yisama‑ee kuj tua cov Yudai uas nrog Kedaliya nyob hauv Mixapa huvsi
Jeremiah41:4 Hnub tom qab uas Kedaliya raug tua lawm thiab tsis tau muaj leejtwg paub li
Jeremiah41:5 muaj yim caum tus txivneej tuaj ntawm lub moos Sekhee thiab lub moos Silau thiab lub nroog Xamali tuaj. Lawv chais hwj txwv du lug thiab tej ris tsho ntuag tag
Jeremiah41:6 Mas Nethaniya tus tub Yisama‑ee tawm hauv Mixapa los ntsib nthav lawv cov ntawd
Jeremiah41:7 Thaum lawv tuaj txog hauv lub nroog
Jeremiah41:8 Tiamsis cov uas tuaj ntawd muaj kaum leej hais rau Yisama‑ee tias
Jeremiah41:9 Lub pas dej uas Yisama‑ee muab cov uas nws tua tuag pov rau hauv yog lub pas dej loj uas vajntxwv Axa khawb los tau dej siv rau thaum cov Yixayee tus vajntxwv Npa‑asa tuaj ua rog rau lawv. Mas Nethaniya tus tub Yisama‑ee kuj muab cov uas nws tua tuag tso puv nkaus rau hauv.
Jeremiah41:10 Mas Yisama‑ee ntes cov neeg hauv Mixapa huvsi
Jeremiah41:11 Thaum Khale‑a tus tub Yauhanas thiab cov thawj rog uas nrog nws ua ke hnov tej xwm txheej phem uas Nethaniya tus tub Yisama‑ee tau ua ntawd
Jeremiah41:12 lawv txawm txhij lawv cov neeg sawvdaws mus ua rog rau Nethaniya tus tub Yisama‑ee. Lawv ntsib nws ntawm lub pas dej loj uas nyob ntawm lub moos Kinpe‑oo.
Jeremiah41:13 Thaum cov neeg sawvdaws uas Yisama‑ee ntes mus pom Khale‑a tus tub Yauhanas thiab cov thawj rog uas nrog nws ua ke
Jeremiah41:14 Cov neeg uas Yisama‑ee tau ntes coj hauv Mixapa mus txawm tig kiag khiav rov qab
Jeremiah41:15 Ces Nethaniya tus tub Yisama‑ee thiab yim leej uas nrog nws ua ke txawm khiav dim ntawm Yauhanas mus rau hauv cov neeg Asmoo.
Jeremiah41:16 Mas Khale‑a tus tub Yauhanas thiab cov thawj tub rog uas nrog nws ua ke coj cov pejxeem sawvdaws uas Nethaniya tus tub Yisama‑ee tau ntes coj hauv Mixapa mus lawm rau thaum uas nws tua Ahikhas tus tub Kedaliya
Jeremiah41:17 Lawv mus nyob rau ntawm Kelukhihas uas ze Npelehee. Lawv npaj siab yuav khiav mus rau Iyi tebchaws
Jeremiah41:18 vim yog lawv ntshai cov Kheedia rau qhov uas Nethaniya tus tub Yisama‑ee tau tua Ahikhas tus tub Kedaliya
Jeremiah42:1 Cov thawj tub rog sawvdaws thiab Khale‑a tus tub Yauhanas thiab Hausaya tus tub Axaliya thiab cov pejxeem txij tus yau kawg mus txog tus loj kawg sawvdaws tau tuaj
Jeremiah42:2 thiab hais rau Yelemi uas yog xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus tias
Jeremiah42:3 Thov Yawmsaub uas yog koj tus Vajtswv qhia rau peb paub txojkev uas peb yuav tsum mus thiab qhia tej uas peb yuav tsum ua.”
Jeremiah42:4 Yelemi uas cev Vajtswv lus hais rau lawv tias
Jeremiah42:5 Mas lawv hais rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah42:6 Txawm yog nws teb zoo thiab tsis zoo los peb yuav mloog Yawmsaub uas yog peb tus Vajtswv tej lus uas peb txib koj mus thov
Jeremiah42:7 Thaum puv kaum hnub lawm Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi.
Jeremiah42:8 Mas nws thiaj hu Khale‑a tus tub Yauhanas thiab cov thawj tub rog sawvdaws uas nrog nws nyob thiab cov pejxeem sawvdaws txij tus yau kawg mus txog tus loj kawg tuaj
Jeremiah42:9 thiab hais rau lawv tias
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Yog nej nyob hauv lub tebchaws no kuv yuav tsim tsa nej thiab tsis muab nej rhuav
Jeremiah42:11 Tsis txhob ntshai tus vajntxwv hauv Npanpiloo uas nej yeej los ntshai ntawd.’ Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah42:12 Kuv yuav khuvleej nej xwv nws thiaj khuvleej nej thiab kheev nej nyob hauv nej lub tebchaws.’
Jeremiah42:13 Tiamsis yog nej tsis mloog Yawmsaub uas yog nej tus Vajtswv tej lus
Jeremiah42:14 thiab hais tias
Jeremiah42:15 cov Yuda uas tseem tshuav nyob 'e
Jeremiah42:16 mas rab ntaj uas nej ntshai yuav caum cuag nej rau hauv Iyi tebchaws
Jeremiah42:17 Txhua tus uas npaj siab mus nyob rau hauv Iyi tebchaws yuav tuag hniav ntaj hniav riam thiab tuag tshaib tuag nqhis thiab tuag mob kis
Jeremiah42:18 “Yawmsaub tus muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais li no tias
Jeremiah42:19 Cov Yuda uas tseem tshuav nyob 'e
Jeremiah42:20 nej tau yuam kev puas rau nej txojsia
Jeremiah42:21 Mas hnub no kuv twb qhia Yawmsaub tej lus rau nej lawm
Jeremiah42:22 Vim li no nimno cia li paub tseeb tias nej yuav tuag hniav ntaj thiab tuag tshaib tuag nqhis thiab tuag mob kis rau hauv lub chaw uas nej ntshaw mus nyob ntawd.”
Jeremiah43:1 Thaum Yelemi hais Yawmsaub uas yog lawv tus Vajtswv tej lus txhua lo rau cov pejxeem mloog tag lawm
Jeremiah43:2 mas Hausaya tus tub Axaliya thiab Khale‑a tus tub Yauhanas thiab txhua tus txivneej uas khav theeb hais rau Yelemi tias
Jeremiah43:3 Tiamsis Neliya tus tub Npalu tshum kom koj tawm tsam peb
Jeremiah43:4 Khale‑a tus tub Yauhanas thiab cov thawj tub rog txhua tus thiab cov pejxeem sawvdaws tsis mloog Yawmsaub tej lus uas hais kom nyob hauv Yuda tebchaws xwb.

Jeremiah43:10 thiab hais rau lawv tias

Jeremiah44:1 Yawmsaub hais lus tuaj rau Yelemi ntsig txog cov Yudai sawvdaws hauv Iyi tebchaws
Jeremiah44:2 “Yawmsaub tus muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus
Jeremiah44:3 Twb yog vim tej kev phem uas lawv ua zes ua rau kuv chim
Jeremiah44:4 Tiamsis kuv twb tso kuv cov tub qhe uas yog cov xibhwb cev kuv lus sawvdaws tuaj rau nej tsis tu ncua hais tias
Jeremiah44:5 Tiamsis lawv tsis mloog
Jeremiah44:6 Vim li no kuv thiaj nchuav kuv txojkev chim kev npau taws los rau hauv Yuda tej moos thiab hauv tej kev hauv lub nroog Yeluxalees
Jeremiah44:7 Mas nimno Vajtswv Yawmsaub tus muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus
Jeremiah44:8 Ua cas nej txhais tes yuav ua tej uas zes ua rau kuv chim? Yog qhov uas nej hlawv xyab rau luag tej dab hauv Iyi tebchaws uas nej los nyob no
Jeremiah44:9 Nej tsis nco qab tej kev phem uas nej tej poj koob yawm txwv ua
Jeremiah44:10 Txawm yog niaj hnub nimno los lawv tsis txo hwjchim
Jeremiah44:11 “Vim li no
Jeremiah44:12 Kuv yuav muab cov Yuda uas tseem tshuav nyob yog cov uas tau npaj siab mus nyob rau hauv Iyi tebchaws
Jeremiah44:13 Kuv yuav rau txim rau lawv cov uas mus nyob hauv Iyi tebchaws ib yam li kuv xuas ntaj xuas kev tshaib nqhis thiab mob kis rau txim rau Yeluxalees
Jeremiah44:14 ua rau cov neeg Yuda uas tseem tshuav nyob uas tuaj nyob hauv Iyi tebchaws yuav tsis dim ib tug li thiab tsis tshuav uas yuav rov mus nyob hauv Yuda tebchaws
Jeremiah44:15 Mas cov txivneej sawvdaws uas paub hais tias nws pojniam tau hlawv xyab rau luag tej dab
Jeremiah44:16 “Tej lus uas koj tuav Yawmsaub lub npe hais rau peb
Jeremiah44:17 Peb yuav ua txhua yam raws li peb yeem lus cia
Jeremiah44:18 Tiamsis txij thaum peb tseg tsis hlawv xyab rau tus dab poj vaj saum ntuj thiab tsis hliv cawv xyeem rau nws peb txawm pluag txhua yam thiab raug kev puam tsuaj ntawm hniav ntaj thiab kev tshaib nqhis.”
Jeremiah44:19 Cov pojniam hais tias
Jeremiah44:20 Mas Yelemi hais rau cov pojniam txivneej sawvdaws uas teb nws
Jeremiah44:21 “Tej xyab uas nej hlawv hauv Yuda tej moos thiab tej kev hauv Yeluxalees tsis hais nej thiab nej tej poj koob yawm txwv thiab nej tej vajntxwv thiab nej cov thawj thiab tej pejxeem
Jeremiah44:22 Yawmsaub thev tsis taus nej tej kev phem kev qias vuab tsuab uas nej ua ntawd ntxiv mus lawm. Vim li no nej lub tebchaws thiaj raug muab tso tseg nyob do cuas thiab ua lub chaw uas tsawm foom
Jeremiah44:23 Vim yog nej hlawv xyab thiab vim yog nej ua txhaum rau Yawmsaub thiab tsis mloog Yawmsaub tej lus thiab tsis ua raws nws txoj kevcai thiab nws tej kab ke thiab nws tej lus qhia
Jeremiah44:24 Yelemi hais rau cov neeg huvsi thiab cov pojniam huvsi tias

Jeremiah45:1 Xyoo plaub uas Yauxiya tus tub Yehauyakhi ua vajntxwv kav mas Neliya tus tub Npalu tau muab cov lus no los sau rau hauv thooj ntawv raws li xibhwb Yelemi kom nws sau. No yog tej lus uas Yelemi hais ntxiv.
Jeremiah45:2 “Npalu 'e
Jeremiah45:3 Koj hais tias
Jeremiah45:4 Koj cia li hais rau nws tias
Jeremiah45:5 Mas koj tseem yuav nrhiav meej mom loj rau koj no lov? Tsis txhob nrhiav lawm lauj. Rau qhov Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah46:1 Yawmsaub tej lus uas hais tuaj rau Yelemi uas yog xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus ntsig txog ib tsoom tebchaws.
Jeremiah46:2 No yog tej uas hais txog Iyi tebchaws
Jeremiah46:3 “Cia li npaj daim hlau tiv thaiv loj thiab daim uas me
Jeremiah46:4 Cia li nog eeb rau nees

Jeremiah46:7 “No yog leejtwg nev
Jeremiah46:8 Iyi nyab kiag tuaj zoo yam nkaus li tus dej Nai
Jeremiah46:9 Tej nees 'e
Jeremiah46:10 Hnub ntawd yog Vajtswv Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg hnub
Jeremiah46:11 Iyi tus ntxhais uas dawb huv 'e
Jeremiah46:12 Tej tebchaws twb hnov txog koj txojkev txaj muag
Jeremiah46:13 Yawmsaub tej lus uas hais rau Yelemi uas yog xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus hais txog qhov uas vajntxwv Nenpukhanexa hauv Npanpiloo tuaj ntaus Iyi tebchaws.
Jeremiah46:14 “Cia li tshaj tawm hauv Iyi
Jeremiah46:15 Ua cas tus dab Api khiav lawm? Ua cas nej tus dab mlom txiv nyuj nyob tsis ruaj? Vim yog Yawmsaub muab nws thawb ntog.
Jeremiah46:16 Nej cov neeg coob coob kuj dawm thiab ntog
Jeremiah46:17 Cia li hu cov Iyi tus vajntxwv Falau lub npe hais tias
Jeremiah46:18 Tus vajntxwv uas lub npe hu ua Yawmsaub uas muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus hais tias
Jeremiah46:19 Cov neeg Iyi 'e
Jeremiah46:20 “Iyi yog tus xyuas nyuj uas zoo nkauj
Jeremiah46:21 Txawm yog nws cov tub rog uas ntiav nrog nws nyob zoo yam nkaus li tej menyuam nyuj rog rog
Jeremiah46:22 Nws ua lub suab zoo yam li tus nab uas tabtom ntaug leev mus
Jeremiah46:23 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah46:24 Iyi tus ntxhais yuav raug txaj muag
Jeremiah46:25 Yawmsaub tus muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais tias
Jeremiah46:26 Kuv yuav muab lawv cob rau hauv cov uas nrhiav txov lawv txojsia txhais tes
Jeremiah46:27 “Kuv tus qhev Yakhauj 'e
Jeremiah46:28 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah47:1 Yawmsaub tej lus uas hais tuaj rau Yelemi uas yog xibhwb cev Vajtswv lus hais txog cov Filixatee
Jeremiah47:2 Yawmsaub hais li no tias
Jeremiah47:3 Thaum uas hnov nws tej txiv nees suab rau nrov
Jeremiah47:4 vim yog hnub uas cov Filixatee yuav puam tsuaj huvsi twb los txog lawm
Jeremiah47:5 Lub moos Kaxa chais plaubhau nyob do hau cuas lawm
Jeremiah47:6 Au Yawmsaub rab ntaj
Jeremiah47:7 Thaum Yawmsaub txib lawm nws yuav nyob twjywm tau li cas? Yawmsaub tsa rab ntaj ntawd tawm tsam Akheloo thiab cov uas nyob ntawm ntug hiavtxwv.”
Jeremiah48:1 Tej lus uas hais txog Mau‑a. Yawmsaub tus muaj hwjchim loj kawg nkaus uas yog Yixayee tus Vajtswv hais li no tias
Jeremiah48:2 Mau‑a lub koob meej ploj tag. Cov neeg hauv lub moos Hesanpoo ntaus tswvyim ua phem rau Mau‑a. Lawv hais tias
Jeremiah48:3 Mloog saib
Jeremiah48:4 Mau‑a tebchaws raug puam tsuaj lawm
Jeremiah48:5 Lawv quaj heev taug kev nce mus pem lub moos Luhij. Lawv hnov lub suab quaj ntsuag vim yog raug kev puam tsuaj
Jeremiah48:6 Cia li khiav
Jeremiah48:7 Vim nej tso siab rau nej tej haujlwm thiab nej tej nyiaj txiag
Jeremiah48:8 Tus uas ua kom puam tsuaj yuav los rau saum txhua lub moos
Jeremiah48:9 “Cia li muab kooj tis rau Mau‑a
Jeremiah48:10 Cia tus uas tsis kub siab ua Yawmsaub tej haujlwm raug foom tsis zoo
Jeremiah48:11 “Mau‑a yeej nyob siab tus yees txij thaum yau los
Jeremiah48:12 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah48:13 Mas Mau‑a yuav txaj muag tus dab Khemauj ib yam nkaus cov Yixayee txaj muag qhov uas lawv tso siab rau dab ntawm Npe‑ee.
Jeremiah48:14 “Nej cov Mau‑a yuav ua li cas hais tau tias
Jeremiah48:15 Tus uas ua rau Mau‑a thiab Mau‑a tej moos puam tsuaj tag tuaj txog lawm
Jeremiah48:16 “Vij sub vij sw twb los txog Mau‑a tes lawm
Jeremiah48:17 Nej cov uas nyob ib ncig nws sawvdaws thiab nej cov uas paub nws lub npe sawvdaws
Jeremiah48:18 “Cov neeg hauv lub moos Dinpoo 'e
Jeremiah48:19 Cov neeg hauv lub moos Alau‑aw 'e
Jeremiah48:20 Mau‑a raug txaj muag
Jeremiah48:21 Kev teem txim poob rau saum tej nras tiaj toj siab
Jeremiah48:22 Dinpoo
Jeremiah48:23 Khiliyatha‑i
Jeremiah48:24 Kheli‑au thiab Npauxa thiab tej moos huvsi hauv Mau‑a tebchaws tsis hais deb thiab ze.
Jeremiah48:25 Mau‑a txwm kub raug muab txiav lawm
Jeremiah48:26 “Vim yog nws tsab ua loj tawm tsam Yawmsaub
Jeremiah48:27 Yixayee tsis raug koj thuam luag lov? Koj pom nws yog tub sab lov es koj thiaj hais co hau nto txog nws?
Jeremiah48:28 Cov Mau‑a 'e
Jeremiah48:29 “Peb twb hnov txog Mau‑a tej kev khav theeb
Jeremiah48:30 Yawmsaub hais tias
Jeremiah48:31 Vim li no kuv thiaj quaj nyiav txog Mau‑a
Jeremiah48:32 Tej txiv hmab ntawm lub moos Xima 'e
